This Administration, along with Sean Patrick Maloney, Nancy Pelosi, and other Democrats have failed the American people every step of the way.

****Americans are worse off than a year ago.****

They promised “bold progress” for the people, yet Joe Biden and House Democrats have delivered nothing but chaos.

Migrants are surging across our southern border, prices of every goods and gas are surging, and crime is surging.

Friends,

Will you stand up for America?

Our freedoms, our way of life, and our country are UNDER ATTACK.

The Radical Left wants to:
* Completely open our borders to any and all illegal immigrants (and give them money!)
* Legalize abortion on demand for all nine months, and use YOUR taxpayer dollars to pay for it
* Rig our elections, change the rules, and make them less secure
* Implement anti-scientific, anti-American COVID mandates
* Take away our 2nd Amendment rights

They’re truly an embarrassment. They don’t know how to, nor do they want to, stand up for America and our freedoms.
**We need to stop the Radical Left now.
We need to stop Career Politicians now.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jenni=2C=20Team=20Perdue?=
subject: Campaign Update – March 6, 2022
body:
| | | [ ](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=64f8ca47a4&e=89fb4d5220)
---
| Friends,

We've got an exciting week coming up on the campaign trail! Here are some key updates from our campaign. Thank you for your continued support.

– Team Perdue

* * *
_**Don Jr. In Georgia**_

On Monday, March 7, Donald Trump Jr. will be in Georgia to rally for David Perdue. It's not too late to join us! Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=6f243b21e6&e=89fb4d5220) for more details on our rallies in [Cumming](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=02c623caa2&e=89fb4d5220) and [Tifton](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=f872928304&e=89fb4d5220).

Watch a personal message from David about this: [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=890ffd96fe&e=89fb4d5220) David has been fighting alongside President Trump since day one, and that's why President Trump has endorsed him. _"David Perdue is an outstanding man. He’s tough. He’s smart.
He has my complete and total endorsement."_
– President Trump _**Kemp Let Us Down**_

Last week, David highlighted how Brian Kemp continues to let us down.

Kemp gave our elections over to Stacey Abrams. He gamed the system for career politicians. He refused a vote on Buckhead City. And now, he's made a deal with George Soros to give him our tax dollars and is calling it "economic development."

Kemp did all of this to help himself – not Georgia. We deserve a Governor who will fight for us, not special interests.

_“You guys want to be heard, but your Governor
is refusing to listen. I’m here to tell you that
I hear you, I see you, and I stand with you.”_
– David Perdue _**Protecting The Second Amendment**_

On Saturday, David joined a rally to highlight the need to protect our God-given right to bear arms.

"The only weapon to secure your weapons is your vote," David said. _**Bold Vision For Georgia**_

In an interview with Right Side Broadcasting Network at CPAC, David talked about his bold vision for Georgia: securing our elections, abolishing the state income tax, putting parents in charge of their kids' education, and making our cities and state safe again.

Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=2ac8d49dae&e=89fb4d5220) to watch. [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=dac8f8848a&e=89fb4d5220)

###
---

name: Maggie Dunn
subject: There's no doubt my son made the right decision…
body:
You and I haven't met. But I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son. His name is M
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9c257ociumecp9ms98e5lhsugtenbnljr9m7dc8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5oe4o376gq72db0chor2obm65qj0pjge5gb4s9mm8oecsdichr68p37cjim7dpnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphlc2qr6o3i61j3cpplmgrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or1cdhmao30s5im49fg)
You and I haven't met. But I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son.

His name is Michael. That's him in the photo.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlfdbjsot5lfjbadtttpb0onhudqfe00g6d0v4r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdim0o71clh2bs)

In addition to being a Marine reservist, Michael is a police officer.

He should be out keeping our Farmers Branch, Texas, community safe right now.

Instead, Michael's facing unjust criminal charges.

He was wrongly accused of murder for shooting a career criminal who tried to run him down in a stolen truck.

Thinking this criminal was about to kill him or his fellow officers, Michael pulled his weapon and defended himself.

Now he's facing life behind bars.

**And I never thought that it would come to this, but now I have no choice but to reach out to complete strangers like you and ask for your help in keeping him out of prison**. [**_Will you please help me save my son?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqksj09qc73jdunt66td92fq2ea70evh6klq3bq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdim0o71clh2bs)

Let me tell you what happened...

On the evening of June 12, 2019, Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a career car thief who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the thief came back to the truck, Michael pulled up close in his marked police vehicle.

As Michael stepped out of his car, the car thief sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they _never_ have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. Michael suffered back and leg injuries.

Any military service member or police officer will tell you it's never easy when you're forced to take a life in the line of duty.

No matter the circumstances, it weighs on your soul.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he thought was right. Michael did what he thought would save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

You can imagine how hard it would be to make such a life-or-death decision - seeing a truck driven by a known criminal coming right at you.

But there's no doubt in my mind Michael made the right choice that day.

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. [**_Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4bemsmtelr523nk45viv0s1bnl9nsgs50qph17g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdim0o71clh2bs)

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the car thief's death. His voice was shaky, words strained.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

Despite Michael's statement that he feared for his life and the confidence in his actions from the Farmers Branch Police...

**...Michael was indicted by a Grand Jury just 8 days after the incident. **

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - but we had no choice but to continue the legal process of defending Michael in court.

Not long after the indictment, we started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

You see, the car thief was a Hispanic man, and Michael is a white police officer.

So, in the toxic, anti-police climate sweeping across America, people saw that a white police officer shot a person of color - and the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. _

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. **

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

Law and justice experts work on LELDF's Board - like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General, Edwin Meese, and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

[**_Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm2dr27h4vhb3et86ustt610f5icpuilnottapng_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdim0o71clh2bs)

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael.

And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible.

Believe me, your kind[ **_donation today of $35, $50, or $100_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn2id6a7bcmkds3tdb25oqe4mvmaff028h3r6b6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdim0o71clh2bs) to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a [**_gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc0kk6kkr50hciqjeqplum0jahhjetvoim0rt10o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdim0o71clh2bs) I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn4cagbcd8vk7ac0nitjrfnibhvepr1pa89c4bf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdim0o71clh2bs)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

**[Support our Mission to Protect America's Protectors](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zohvl5mldrjsgmdkpaui8kdtpl3mtmc0lns9dv7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdim0o71clh2bs "http://links1.policedefense.org/u/click?_t=e4d7f9337b6a4e09a13674110e77bd4b&_m=a7f7fcf6535743fc9cfa40a2e57d55eb&_e=AsjM76be0BQnmPrP2AizrCCeKThkT-tb0jZgpdnpcIJgEUqfNhaoNrF715bYIZgV0P_AOwjzkAVNKFKGkMq2HvtNh8G7iR56k9tpMQB__beEGK_EBUhAnAHse9UYPzzK7CnGvZBbLPF7dyEWoO1ee6uI6WrAa5aUNUysihyrE7IrnkFqaLoLYMgFq87aByzykhP7dshTlJfjfPsW0rnOj7wWM5ytV7vqE0rJuDGwnLAzZK2JOkRaYd6jRGMgsAW_DrTNdNxEZ7VI5Op2L--4TZWQJroVjbbcKmZgcgCH06obQcHKHNmnh2Qkz90V6Kv5w9eHG82PsNUpRqF8Q5S3Iw%3D%3D")**

clean_body: You and I haven't met. But I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son. His name is M You and I haven't met. But I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son. His name is Michael. That's him in the photo. In addition to being a Marine reservist, Michael is a police officer. He should be out keeping our Farmers Branch, Texas, community safe right now. Instead, Michael's facing unjust criminal charges. He was wrongly accused of murder for shooting a career criminal who tried to run him down in a stolen truck. Thinking this criminal was about to kill him or his fellow officers, Michael pulled his weapon and defended himself. Now he's facing life behind bars. And I never thought that it would come to this, but now I have no choice but to reach out to complete strangers like you and ask for your help in keeping him out of prison. Let me tell you what happened... On the evening of June 12, 2019, Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a career car thief who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the thief came back to the truck, Michael pulled up close in his marked police vehicle. As Michael stepped out of his car, the car thief sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. Michael suffered back and leg injuries. Any military service member or police officer will tell you it's never easy when you're forced to take a life in the line of duty. No matter the circumstances, it weighs on your soul. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he thought was right. Michael did what he thought would save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. You can imagine how hard it would be to make such a life-or-death decision - seeing a truck driven by a known criminal coming right at you. But there's no doubt in my mind Michael made the right choice that day. That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the car thief's death. His voice was shaky, words strained. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. Despite Michael's statement that he feared for his life and the confidence in his actions from the Farmers Branch Police... ...Michael was indicted by a Grand Jury just 8 days after the incident. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - but we had no choice but to continue the legal process of defending Michael in court. Not long after the indictment, we started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. You see, the car thief was a Hispanic man, and Michael is a white police officer. So, in the toxic, anti-police climate sweeping across America, people saw that a white police officer shot a person of color - and the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. Law and justice experts work on LELDF's Board - like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General, Edwin Meese, and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Believe me, your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! name: Ashley Ward
subject: Weekly Update: Out and about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
www.ashleywardforcongress.com [www.ashleywardforcongress.com]
Weekly Updates
A MESSAGE FROM ASHLEY
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/GraduationDay_Girls%20%281%29.JPG] As I was out in the community this week, several people asked me why I'm so passionate about community colleges. When I graduated from high school, I was like many young people. I wanted to go to college, but I wasn't sure how to get there. I questioned whether I was "college material."
I enrolled at Piedmont Community College. The instructors I met there changed my life. They gave me confidence. They helped me believe in myself.
More importantly, the community college prepared me for my next steps. I never dared imagine myself with a PhD. They helped me make that a reality. I didn't continue that academic journey right away. I married and had two daughters. But when I did return to school at UNC-Chapel Hill, I was ready. Whether the next step in the journey is higher education, starting a business, a promotion at work, learning new skills, or a career change, the community college is a launching point for so many of us.
We currently face a labor shortage in the trades. As the baby boomer generation retires, they leave a large gulf in the number of people trained in the trades. We have an unmet need and we also have a way to meet that need: the community college system. It is time we reduce the stigma associated with both community colleges and trade work by fully investing in community colleges and encouraging young people to pursue trades.
We can do this through expansion of the Pell Grant program to include certificate or short term training, streamlining the application process for student aide, and allowing community colleges to borrow the needed dollars for capital investments. An investment in the community college is an investment in our futures.
OUT AND ABOUT
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7953.JPG] We started this week visiting my alma mater, Piedmont Community College, and meeting with community leaders in Person County. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7949.JPG]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7957.JPG] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7961.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7963.JPG]
We also visited small businesses and community leaders in Alamance County!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7974.JPG] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7980.JPG]
Small businesses are an important priority for me. As the daughter of a small business owner, I'm particularly passionate about supporting small businesses with a fairer tax structure and better access to capital so they can grow their business or protect their investments during periods of economic stress. In the U.S., small businesses employ about 60% of our labor force - they are the true job creators! It is time we value the contribution of small businesses with effective policies.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7991.JPG] We also met a professional fisherman! While his home is Alamance County, he travels up and down the coast. He is very aware of the impact of climate change on his livelihood. A great conversation! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_7972.JPG]
And we met with several community leaders to learn about their priorities.
IMPORTANT DATES & UPCOMING EVENTS
Upcoming events: Mark your calendars!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Virtual%20Meet%26Greet%20Instagram%20%282%29.png] It isn't too late to sign up!
Join us THIS Wednesday at 6pm in Hillsborough to fellowship with other volunteers.
Don't like to write postcards? No problem! We have lots of tasks to prepare outreach materials.
If you can't stay to volunteer, come on by even for a few minutes to meet Ashley!
RSVP [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Volunteer%20Opportunity&body=Count%20me%20in%21]
ABOUT THE EVENT: The event will take place at the Kerr Scott homestead. It is a kid-friendly event, and there are numerous things to do including playing with baby goats and chickens, touring the home, and of course talking with Ashley about what she will bring to Congress! Hope you can make it! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Farm%20Tour%20and%20Meet.png]
ABOUT THE HOME: The home is over 100 years old with quite an amazing history, and is on the National Historic Registry. Check out the links below for more information!
LET US KNOW YOU ARE COMING! [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Farm%20Tour%20and%20Meet%20the%20Candidate&body=I%27ll%20be%20there%21]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Virtual%20Meet%26Greet_Person.jpg] Join us for a virtual meet & greet! This is a great way to meet Ashley, learn about her priorities, and tell her about yours!
Registration is free but required to get the Zoom link. Register today!
REGISTER [https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJIldu6trTMtHtMUMdIuk7lelq13NqdhA996]
Hello Person County! Come out and have coffee and pastries with Ashley at 9am on Saturday, March 26th. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/PC_Kickoff.jpg]
Then stick around to help distribute literature around Roxboro, beginning at 10am. This is a great way to get your steps in!
Look forward to seeing you all!
SIGN UP [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0f44aeaa22a6ffc43-persontoperson]
GET INVOLVED
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_8007.JPG] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/6229A4D0-4B45-47FF-A5DC-E58E2CB2E945.JPG]
What a beautiful weekend for canvassing! Today we were all OUT for Ashley! We have lots of ground to cover across five counties. As the weather warms, I hope you will join us as well. Sign up below!
If you'd like to get involved, consider joining us for a Lit Drop. A lit drop is distributing literature. It is no-contact, so COVID safe, and takes about 2 hours. We are out with volunteers every Saturday and Sunday!
You can also sign up to write postcards. We have thousands of postcards to write so we can do outreach to the areas of the district that are hard to reach with lit drops.
And finally, I hope you'll consider hosting an in-person or virtual event. These are a great way to introduce me to your friends, neighbors, and colleagues.
LIT DROP [https://www.signupgenius.com/go/10c0f44aeaa22a6ffc43-litdrop] POSTCARDS [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=PostCards&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20write%20postcards.%20Tell%20me%20how%20to%20get%20involved%21] HOST EVENT [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Host%20an%20Event&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20host%20an%20event%21%20Let%20me%20know%20how%20I%20can%20get%20involved.]
CAMPAIGN T-SHIRTS!
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/IMG_2345.png] “Made in North Carolina from Dirt to Shirt!” from TS Designs.
TS Designs uses cotton grown in North Carolina, shirts are preshrunk, and use water-based inks. I am thrilled to work with a company committed to sustainability. Just like me, these shirts are “Made in NC!”
Donate $20 today and get your t-shirt. Minimum $20 donation required (shipping included). Limited quantities and colors available. Colors may vary slightly.
ORDER T-SHIRT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/arwardtshirts]
YARD SIGNS ARE HERE!
image of ... [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Yard%20Sign%20%287%29.png] Yard signs are an effective way to get word out about my campaign. We need as many folks as possible to show their support and put a yard sign in their yard! Pick one up for you and your neighbor!
REQUEST A YARD SIGN [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/yard-sign]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/8b27e7cb-2b9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/3c975589-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzk3NTU4OS0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OttC6b1HQQUKasOHV7zcpO_PXhCWUOsxiqP6fOQ9RkU=&id=107267475 .

I enrolled at Piedmont Community College. The instructors I met there changed my life. They gave me confidence. They helped me believe in myself. More importantly, the community college prepared me for my next steps. I never dared imagine myself with a PhD. They helped me make that a reality. I didn't continue that academic journey right away. I married and had two daughters. But when I did return to school at UNC-Chapel Hill, I was ready. Whether the next step in the journey is higher education, starting a business, a promotion at work, learning new skills, or a career change, the community college is a launching point for so many of us. We currently face a labor shortage in the trades. As the baby boomer generation retires, they leave a large gulf in the number of people trained in the trades. We have an unmet need and we also have a way to meet that need: the community college system. It is time we reduce the stigma associated with both community colleges and trade work by fully investing in community colleges and encouraging young people to pursue trades. We can do this through expansion of the Pell Grant program to include certificate or short term training, streamlining the application process for student aide, and allowing community colleges to borrow the needed dollars for capital investments. An investment in the community college is an investment in our futures. OUT AND ABOUT [] We started this week visiting my alma mater, Piedmont Community College, and meeting with community leaders in Person County. [] [] [] [] We also visited small businesses and community leaders in Alamance County! [] [] Small businesses are an important priority for me. As the daughter of a small business owner, I'm particularly passionate about supporting small businesses with a fairer tax structure and better access to capital so they can grow their business or protect their investments during periods of economic stress. In the U.S., small businesses employ about 60% of our labor force - they are the true job creators! It is time we value the contribution of small businesses with effective policies. [] We also met a professional fisherman! While his home is Alamance County, he travels up and down the coast. He is very aware of the impact of climate change on his livelihood. A great conversation! [] And we met with several community leaders to learn about their priorities. IMPORTANT DATES & UPCOMING EVENTS Upcoming events: Mark your calendars! [] It isn't too late to sign up! Join us THIS Wednesday at 6pm in Hillsborough to fellowship with other volunteers. Don't like to write postcards? No problem! We have lots of tasks to prepare outreach materials. If you can't stay to volunteer, come on by even for a few minutes to meet Ashley! RSVP [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Volunteer%20Opportunity&body=Count%20me%20in%21] ABOUT THE EVENT: The event will take place at the Kerr Scott homestead. It is a kid-friendly event, and there are numerous things to do including playing with baby goats and chickens, touring the home, and of course talking with Ashley about what she will bring to Congress! Hope you can make it! [] ABOUT THE HOME: The home is over 100 years old with quite an amazing history, and is on the National Historic Registry. Check out the links below for more information! LET US KNOW YOU ARE COMING! [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Farm%20Tour%20and%20Meet%20the%20Candidate&body=I%27ll%20be%20there%21] [] Join us for a virtual meet & greet! This is a great way to meet Ashley, learn about her priorities, and tell her about yours! Registration is free but required to get the Zoom link. Register today! REGISTER [] Hello Person County! Come out and have coffee and pastries with Ashley at 9am on Saturday, March 26th. [] Then stick around to help distribute literature around Roxboro, beginning at 10am. This is a great way to get your steps in! Look forward to seeing you all! SIGN UP [] GET INVOLVED [] [] What a beautiful weekend for canvassing! Today we were all OUT for Ashley! We have lots of ground to cover across five counties. As the weather warms, I hope you will join us as well. Sign up below! If you'd like to get involved, consider joining us for a Lit Drop. A lit drop is distributing literature. It is no-contact, so COVID safe, and takes about 2 hours. We are out with volunteers every Saturday and Sunday! You can also sign up to write postcards. We have thousands of postcards to write so we can do outreach to the areas of the district that are hard to reach with lit drops. And finally, I hope you'll consider hosting an in-person or virtual event. These are a great way to introduce me to your friends, neighbors, and colleagues. LIT DROP [] POSTCARDS [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=PostCards&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20write%20postcards.%20Tell%20me%20how%20to%20get%20involved%21] HOST EVENT [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Host%20an%20Event&body=Hi%20Ashley%21%20I%27d%20like%20to%20host%20an%20event%21%20Let%20me%20know%20how%20I%20can%20get%20involved.] CAMPAIGN T-SHIRTS! [] “Made in North Carolina from Dirt to Shirt!” from TS Designs. TS Designs uses cotton grown in North Carolina, shirts are preshrunk, and use water-based inks. I am thrilled to work with a company committed to sustainability. Just like me, these shirts are “Made in NC!” Donate $20 today and get your t-shirt. Minimum $20 donation required (shipping included). Limited quantities and colors available. Colors may vary slightly. ORDER T-SHIRT [] YARD SIGNS ARE HERE! image of ... [] Yard signs are an effective way to get word out about my campaign. We need as many folks as possible to show their support and put a yard sign in their yard! Pick one up for you and your neighbor! REQUEST A YARD SIGN [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward Friends of Ashley Ward P.O. Box 1092 Mebane, NC 27302 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Former National Security Adviser Robert O'Brien endorses Jake
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| For immediate release March 7th, 2022 news@jakeevans.org Former National Security Adviser Robert O'Brien endorses Jake Trump administration National Security Adviser Robert O'Brien today added his name to a long list of Trump's top staffers to endorse Jake Evans for Georgia's 6th Congressional District. "I know Jake will contribute to the strong legacy of Georgia leaders who have led on strengthening our nation's defenses," said O'Brien. "From my position as National Security Advisor, I know that our adversaries fear a "peace-through-strength" approach to national security. Jake will boldly support the America First policies that kept us safe during the Trump years - and that are under assault right now. I'm proud to support Jake because we must elect the next generation, fearless conservative leaders who can carry those principles into the future." While serving in the Trump administration, O'Brien played leading roles in taking a tougher stand against China and in brokering peace accords between Israel and other nations in the Mideast. "When we had President Trump and National Security Adviser O'Brien in the White House, we slept secure at night knowing we had leaders who would keep us safe," said Jake. "I want to restore those America First priorities, and I'm honored to have the support of such a strong leader."
---

name: Charlie Gearing
subject: Thankful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter

Rachael and I just wanted to take a moment to express my gratitude and appreciation for your support throughout this campaign, while we came up short on Election Day we couldn’t be more grateful for everything you did to help us along the way.

The outpouring of support we saw from our friends, family, and neighbors from across the 114th District has been incredible and I wanted you to know how thankful Rachael and I are for your support. We built a strong coalition of grassroots supporters who believe in a better future for our families, children, schools, neighborhoods, and communities here in Texas. Rachael and I are incredibly proud to be a part of that coalition with all of you. So, thank you again for being with us on this journey with us - your support during this campaign has meant the world to us and our team.

Thank you again,

- Charlie

Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas

subject: Your encouragement keeps me going!
body:
Dear Peter,

THANK YOU to everyone who sent birthday wishes my way last week!

With a little over five months left in this campaign, your encouragement keeps me going . . .

name: Alex Showell
subject: Fwd: FW: Run-Off Election for CD 7 and CD 11 Will Be Held on Thursday and Friday
body:
Hi Fred,

Great talking with you yesterday. Thank you for staying until the end of Friday night, and we appreciate your support. I don't know if you saw it, but here's the email about absentee voting for the runoff. Absentee voting will take place on Thursday, March 10th. Let me know if you have any questions.

Best,
Alex

**From:** Laura Marie Ali, Chairwoman <[morriscountygop+gmail.com@ccsend.com](mailto:morriscountygop%2Bgmail.com@ccsend.com)>
**Sent:** Sunday, March 6, 2022 10:59 AM
**To:** Amy Wiehl <[amy@fairviewpartnersllc.com](mailto:amy@fairviewpartnersllc.com)>
**Subject:** Run-Off Election for CD 7 and CD 11 Will Be Held on Thursday and Friday ____
____
____
| | | | ____
---
____
____
---
____
Dear County Committee Member:________We will be hosting our Run-Off election on Thursday March 10th and Friday, March 11th. Here are the details for the election:__________1. __The run-off is a continuation of our meeting/Convention. Only people that voted in person at the Convention, Absentee or Drive by will be permitted to vote in the run-off election.______2. __Electronic voting will take place Thursday, March 10 th from 12pm – 7pm via Election Runner. This will be run by a third party, not MCRC. ______3. __In person voting will take place on Friday, March 11 th from 12pm – 8pm. This will take place at MCRC at 51 Gibraltar Drive in Morris Plains. ________[**IMPORTANT: If you plan on voting On-Line you must pre-register. Please click here to do so.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-eRu36scZ6qDfL98KrJhrP4weW_fDOQF_Zm1DYs9YmWVwdJVvH4x0mpiai3LB4e9FzUvflK0XzuSmlidagLtDIm-cVfayqGMnIsVzv8lb0z1hHXjhtrHAo6ymVIMRoW3Tqx_FLjW2C2ULZ-AFPlFmNIUrFxqWFklRqnlE2sGQVCFoXCXBwUlqr1DkYW2YdtpISq-vCl03D_leZCYRsfrBAyMDagUP4c_s103A5JuInvN6c-PMmlLxTgz1luLqoDN9z9SP8CW8fOQOSHwHQQo3Q==&c=Mw02CfsAH9RD3CEF4zNx-UAJIT99b--m6caiIt6k5FRNMO3MDPDKPQ==&ch=O2i-g5xEROJnooO7sUokcp57kmAeO5Qn09IuDLwl2IkdDarZLL2yOQ==)________Feel free to reach out to me with any questions! Have a wonderful day!________Most Sincerely,________Laura Marie Ali ____Chairwoman ____
---
____
| ____
---
____
[**www.morrisgop.org**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-eRu36scZ6qDfL98KrJhrP4weW_fDOQF_Zm1DYs9YmWVwdJVvH4x0v6U2oIMxYx7a3iBo_p1pZrmVcLTa8yeuuHQNZ1bwYanxF-EpA0-7-gv-rNnSG45mzqouObH4wJjKKstbF-m9lNRTSeu8BEdOg==&c=Mw02CfsAH9RD3CEF4zNx-UAJIT99b--m6caiIt6k5FRNMO3MDPDKPQ==&ch=O2i-g5xEROJnooO7sUokcp57kmAeO5Qn09IuDLwl2IkdDarZLL2yOQ==) ____

clean_body: Hi Fred, Great talking with you yesterday. Thank you for staying until the end of Friday night, and we appreciate your support. I don't know if you saw it, but here's the email about absentee voting for the runoff. Absentee voting will take place on Thursday, March 10th. Let me know if you have any questions. Best, Alex From: Laura Marie Ali, Chairwoman <mailto:morriscountygop%2Bgmail.com@ccsend.com> Sent: Sunday, March 6, 2022 10:59 AM To: Amy Wiehl <mailto:amy@fairviewpartnersllc.com> Subject: Run-Off Election for CD 7 and CD 11 Will Be Held on Thursday and Friday __ | | | | Dear County Committee Member:____We will be hosting our Run-Off election on Thursday March 10th and Friday, March 11th. Here are the details for the election:______1. The run-off is a continuation of our meeting/Convention. Only people that voted in person at the Convention, Absentee or Drive by will be permitted to vote in the run-off election.____2. Electronic voting will take place Thursday, March 10 th from 12pm – 7pm via Election Runner. This will be run by a third party, not MCRC. ____3. In person voting will take place on Friday, March 11 th from 12pm – 8pm. This will take place at MCRC at 51 Gibraltar Drive in Morris Plains. ______ free to reach out to me with any questions! Have a wonderful day!____Most Sincerely,____Laura Marie Ali Chairwoman | == __ | | | | | | | | Morris County Republican Committee | 51 Gibraltar Drive, Suite 1D, Morris Plains, NJ 07950 | | Sent bymailto:morriscountygop@gmail.com in collaboration with | __ __ __ Alexander Showell Deputy Campaign Manager (973) 219-4093 mailto:alex@johnisemann.com

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The media is coordinating their attacks
body:
It’s all a part of their playbook, and frankly it’s predictable.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x_UiO9c-unk1OyjIxMatqnpkrFAWy6acup9NKF2j1crfjoFNVsyNmErfgv7YPpDY8fWJZ8usV1B8JaAUg_PsUjMHgVbXli9ccZyPG-MT5_uphjSrDtGEIYdUYO4YqRfDOEx1TbNbn6I76hWVKoxCaVVsKWVIGltPTGOW1VOEgAIMCplblYQMQ6P0JEVT1u50grIYugH0xD5ZJ7nFdIvYtSvdFO7uSxO-&c=aawon6u88IuxkXpY8aUK9WoHEmysndGIZAiXwpMuWc6vR51sKkUNCg==&ch=zN127tvhUEaV_EDdVaUxnbyJPkyl0CZ_j3kfy_JNHQ0pvtKB8x124Q==)
---
| The corrupt legacy media just can't get enough of me, Peter. They love nothing more than taking a completely harmless situation and ginning up phony, pent-up outrage to turn it into a full-fledged meltdown campaign. It's all a part of their playbook, and frankly it's predictable.
[>>> HELP ME FIGHT BACK <<< ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x_UiO9c-unk1OyjIxMatqnpkrFAWy6acup9NKF2j1crfjoFNVsyNmErfgv7YPpDY8fWJZ8usV1B8JaAUg_PsUjMHgVbXli9ccZyPG-MT5_uphjSrDtGEIYdUYO4YqRfDOEx1TbNbn6I76hWVKoxCaVVsKWVIGltPTGOW1VOEgAIMCplblYQMQ6P0JEVT1u50grIYugH0xD5ZJ7nFdIvYtSvdFO7uSxO-&c=aawon6u88IuxkXpY8aUK9WoHEmysndGIZAiXwpMuWc6vR51sKkUNCg==&ch=zN127tvhUEaV_EDdVaUxnbyJPkyl0CZ_j3kfy_JNHQ0pvtKB8x124Q==) But that's exactly what they're doing with this "outrage" around me telling students they didn't have to wear masks if they didn't want to this week. And, predictably, all the familiar faces of Democrat propaganda had something to say:

* The so-called "news" network CNN whose viewership is down [77 percent](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x_UiO9c-unk1OyjIxMatqnpkrFAWy6acup9NKF2j1crfjoFNVsyNmErfgv7YPpDY75L2yztt3Gy5PBRRSMUuOPm_ylP_4gRbaupQoC5BH0TULiMiMsbOeT58DMk4KsX0q9OolqCKwZ3RXaddzGb0ZlV3P_Wn4kxoxFK8PQNkMksqi0kqE6qtuID7h1SMtiXU&c=aawon6u88IuxkXpY8aUK9WoHEmysndGIZAiXwpMuWc6vR51sKkUNCg==&ch=zN127tvhUEaV_EDdVaUxnbyJPkyl0CZ_j3kfy_JNHQ0pvtKB8x124Q==) in the last year covered it.
* Liberal newspaper outlets like The New York Times, The Washington Post, and The Los Angeles Times all had something to say.
* MSNBC's Joe Scarborough apparently thinks I was "raised in a barn" for giving kids the choice to not wear a mask.
* Fellow MSNBC host Chris Hayes, who clearly struggles with comprehension skills, thinks giving kids the option to wear or remove their mask is the same as strongly demanding they do so.
* Late night hosts like Seth Meyers, whose "jokes" are met with silence, also weighed in with astute political analysis, claiming I "berated" students.
* Swamp publications wrote about it with their usual contempt for Republicans.
* Failed sports commentator turned angry, and profanity-laced BLM activist Jemele Hill said she would have cussed me out.
* And a host on "The View" suggested she might do something illegal or "go nuts" if she had been in the room.

[HELP ME FIGHT BACK AGAINST THE DISHONEST MEDIA >>> ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x_UiO9c-unk1OyjIxMatqnpkrFAWy6acup9NKF2j1crfjoFNVsyNmErfgv7YPpDY8fWJZ8usV1B8JaAUg_PsUjMHgVbXli9ccZyPG-MT5_uphjSrDtGEIYdUYO4YqRfDOEx1TbNbn6I76hWVKoxCaVVsKWVIGltPTGOW1VOEgAIMCplblYQMQ6P0JEVT1u50grIYugH0xD5ZJ7nFdIvYtSvdFO7uSxO-&c=aawon6u88IuxkXpY8aUK9WoHEmysndGIZAiXwpMuWc6vR51sKkUNCg==&ch=zN127tvhUEaV_EDdVaUxnbyJPkyl0CZ_j3kfy_JNHQ0pvtKB8x124Q==) [RUSH IN $15 NOW >>>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x_UiO9c-unk1OyjIxMatqnpkrFAWy6acup9NKF2j1crfjoFNVsyNmErfgv7YPpDY8fWJZ8usV1B8JaAUg_PsUjMHgVbXli9ccZyPG-MT5_uphjSrDtGEIYdUYO4YqRfDOEx1TbNbn6I76hWVKoxCaVVsKWVIGltPTGOW1VOEgAIMCplblYQMQ6P0JEVT1u50grIYugH0xD5ZJ7nFdIvYtSvdFO7uSxO-&c=aawon6u88IuxkXpY8aUK9WoHEmysndGIZAiXwpMuWc6vR51sKkUNCg==&ch=zN127tvhUEaV_EDdVaUxnbyJPkyl0CZ_j3kfy_JNHQ0pvtKB8x124Q==) Rational people understand that depriving students of the right to attend school, participate in athletic events, or sit in a classroom because they don't want to cover their face with ineffective and useless cloth masks is the very definition of bullying. Make no mistake, this is a coordinated effort by our corrupt corporate press to take me down. When I speak the truth, the media wants to silence me. But it isn't just me, they also want to silence you and everyone else who dares to question their far-left narratives masquerading as news. This is what we're up against. We can't let this go on without fighting back. [I am counting on you to help me continue the fight. Could you donate $100, $50, or $25 to help me take on the corrupt legacy media and to stand for our freedom in Florida?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x_UiO9c-unk1OyjIxMatqnpkrFAWy6acup9NKF2j1crfjoFNVsyNmErfgv7YPpDY8fWJZ8usV1B8JaAUg_PsUjMHgVbXli9ccZyPG-MT5_uphjSrDtGEIYdUYO4YqRfDOEx1TbNbn6I76hWVKoxCaVVsKWVIGltPTGOW1VOEgAIMCplblYQMQ6P0JEVT1u50grIYugH0xD5ZJ7nFdIvYtSvdFO7uSxO-&c=aawon6u88IuxkXpY8aUK9WoHEmysndGIZAiXwpMuWc6vR51sKkUNCg==&ch=zN127tvhUEaV_EDdVaUxnbyJPkyl0CZ_j3kfy_JNHQ0pvtKB8x124Q==) Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Ron DeSantis
---
| | [FIGHT BACK](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x_UiO9c-unk1OyjIxMatqnpkrFAWy6acup9NKF2j1crfjoFNVsyNmErfgv7YPpDY8fWJZ8usV1B8JaAUg_PsUjMHgVbXli9ccZyPG-MT5_uphjSrDtGEIYdUYO4YqRfDOEx1TbNbn6I76hWVKoxCaVVsKWVIGltPTGOW1VOEgAIMCplblYQMQ6P0JEVT1u50grIYugH0xD5ZJ7nFdIvYtSvdFO7uSxO-&c=aawon6u88IuxkXpY8aUK9WoHEmysndGIZAiXwpMuWc6vR51sKkUNCg==&ch=zN127tvhUEaV_EDdVaUxnbyJPkyl0CZ_j3kfy_JNHQ0pvtKB8x124Q==)

name: Nikki Fried
subject: Our freedoms are under attack
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —

Florida’s legislative session is entering into its final week, and from the “Don’t Say Gay” bill to the Stop WOKE Act to the 15-week abortion ban, DeSantis is going all-in on his authoritarian agenda — trying to turn our state into a full-blow dictatorship before the gavel comes down.

But I know Florida, Peter, and I know that Floridians don’t want our freedoms attacked. We don’t want our government interfering with our medical decisions or controlling what we can and can’t say. And, no matter what happens this week, we won’t give up this fight.

As long as DeSantis occupies the Governor’s office, we’re going to stand together, fight for our freedoms, and work to end his authoritarian regime. Help us do it with a $20 donation today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=303freedom]

Let’s be real here, Peter. There’s a reason DeSantis is doing all this: to distract from the fact that he has nothing to offer Florida families.

Last year, while Floridians struggled with a broken unemployment system, DeSantis used his power to control private businesses and politicize public health. This year, while Floridians are being priced out of their homes, DeSantis is attacking LGBTQ children.

This is his only move — trying to hide his complete lack of leadership by making problems where there are none, attacking our freedoms, and hurting millions of Florida families along the way.

We deserve better. We deserve a real leader who has the courage and the conviction to lead our state forward — and Ron DeSantis ain’t it. So, if you’re ready to put an end to DeSantis’ pitiful excuse for “leadership”, click here to chip in $20 and help bring something new to Florida. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-mar-2022?refcode=303freedom]

Thank you for your support.

— Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Imani Oakley
subject: Black Lives Matter PAC supports our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter,

As a Black woman, an attorney, and a dedicated organizer, I’ve always been an outspoken advocate in the fight against injustice — particularly when it comes to the racial injustice plaguing our community.

The first march I ever attended as a child was to protest a police brutality incident on my block. And ever since, I’ve worked to make Black voices heard, speak out against police brutality in marginalized communities, and fight back against the white supremacy corrupting our systems.

That’s why I couldn’t be more excited to announce that Black Lives Matter PAC has officially endorsed my campaign! Click here to chip in $27 and join them in supporting our progressive movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=blm]

I’m ready to lead the fight to protect Black lives, end police brutality, and deliver justice for over-policed, under-served communities like ours.

As your next Congresswoman, I won’t just pay lip service to the cause of racial justice (unlike my opponent). I’ll work every single day to push for bold, historic action to combat white supremacy and dismantle the corrupt system that leaves Black and Brown communities behind.

I’m so proud to have the support of Black Lives Matter PAC, and I know that, with their support (and with yours!) we’re well on our way to winning this race and winning a victory for marginalized communities everywhere. Can you chip in $27 to join Black Lives Matter PAC and help us build on this momentum? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-march2022?refcode=blm]

Thank you for your support.

— Imani

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Things Have Shifted In The Oklahoma US Senate Race Between Lankford & Lahmeyer
body:
This Is Not Just A Campaign, But A Movement Across Oklahoma. Things have shifted in the Oklahoma US Senate Race! This last weekend, America's Genera
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4807705.4204.1.807cd1f19b7e350c7ad75f1f349332ca)
---
## This Is Not Just A Campaign, But A Movement Across Oklahoma.
---
Things have _shifted_ in the **Oklahoma US Senate Race**! This last weekend, America's General, **Michael Flynn** , and the legendary **Roger Stone** joined me in Oklahoma. We had _two rallies_ in _two cities_ : Oklahoma City and Tulsa. Both rallies were **100% SOLD OUT** with standing room only. Some great Oklahoma Patriots held different Meet & Greets in-between the rallies that helped us reach even more Oklahomans. **We raised $75,290** this last weekend. It is **VERY** clear that the momentum is on our side in this challenge against RINO [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4807705.4205.1.5592adc87b4b3dc50b08e59fb3b454e0). [The Oklahoman](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4807705.4206.1.61078d27af361e5d207c20ab9681b40d) covered the OKC rally at Sundance Airport. The [article](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4807705.4207.1.cf0f024625f0dddeaead7d40a97276f0) is worth reading and sharing. It's very fair and shows the groundswell of support #LahmeyerForSenate has. Read it here: [https://www.oklahoman.com/story/news/2022/03/05/james-lankford-challenger-jackson-lahmeyer-claims-grassroots-support-uphill-battle-senate-campaign/6975565001/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4807705.4208.1.84ad89e556379e19e79e699f5ad4a7b4)
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=4807705.4209.1.39f9af75edda945a36c8bf941bf60693)
---
We have a **TREMENDOUS** amount of work to do between now and June 28. I promise you that I will give it everything I have in this race.
Please continue to pray for Kendra and me as we enter into the next phase of the campaign and officially file in April.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

name: Val Demings
subject: This is an uphill battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42683672/333889233/184846621?refcode=EM_FR_220307Demings_SPLIT_VD_ALL_7_NG_TESTB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWVkYmJlYi0zNTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r0KmOVefi1_oz-7O3kBOCXvUZ0huHyft-FK4ADF0Sys=) I won't lie to you, Peter. We're fighting an uphill battle right now. Let me explain:

_**FIRST,**_ Republicans realized that if I win this race, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to expand our Senate majority.

_**THEN,**_ polling showed me neck and neck with Marco Rubio, so national Republicans poured millions into Florida to stack the cards against me.

_**NOW,**_ Mitch McConnell's committee is launching the first of many attack ads to defeat me – and I'm falling dangerously short of my $50,000 grassroots fundraising goal. I need to make up the difference before midnight, Peter.

Republicans are trying to buy this seat – no matter how much money it takes – and I desperately need more resources right now to compete with Rubio.

The last Florida Senate race was determined by _just_ over 10,000 votes, and my race is shaping up to be JUST as close. That means it could be YOUR single donation that allows us to knock on just enough doors, call just enough Floridians and reach out to just enough voters to win.

[**_Please, Peter, will you split a donation of $5 between me and my friend Shontel Brown to help me meet my midnight goal and expand our Democratic majority in Congress? subject: Share your thoughts on Big Tech
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsFeb7ZHTN

Over the past few months, the extremism of the political Left's
agenda has become clear through the actions of the mainstream
media and Big Tech companies like Twitter and Amazon. Together,
these forces are working to suppress conservative speech and
political activity, denying First Amendment rights to their
political opponents-and denying access to conservative opinion
and important news stories to the American people.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osFeb7ZHTN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

Over the past few months, the extremism of
the political Left's agenda has become clear through the actions
of the mainstream media and Big Tech companies like Twitter and
Amazon.

Together, these forces are working to
suppress conservative speech and political activity, denying
First Amendment rights to their political opponents-and denying
access to conservative opinion and important news stories to the
American people.

Conservatives (including the former President
of the United States) are increasingly being "de-platformed" by
companies like Twitter.

Amazon is refusing to sell books questioning
the transgender revolution-and recently, it took down an
award-winning documentary video on the life of Supreme Court
Justice Clarence Thomas!

A major publishing company, Simon and
Schuster, recently bowed to pressure and canceled plans to
publish a book on the danger of Big Tech by U.S. Senator Josh
Hawley.

We have never seen anything like what we are
seeing today in America.

That's why I am asking you to take a
Hillsdale College NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH.

By completing this survey, you will help us
more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans on this
critical issue-information that will strengthen Hillsdale's
nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of
liberty…efforts we will continue to expand despite the
opposition of Big Tech.

Fellow American, you can complete the
NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH by using the link
below:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey

In the late 1960s, radicals who scorned
America and its founding principles began moving into our
colleges and universities. It took them several decades to cement
their dominance, but we see the fruits of their labors today: we
see it in the media, and we see it in Silicon Valley.

We also see it in professional sports, in
corporate America-much of which is now capitulating to far-Left
demands-and increasingly, we see it in K-12 education.

You and I know that liberty in America is
under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I
always tell people there is a way to fight this threat, despite
how uphill the fight may seem.

A vital part of the fight-and one in which
Hillsdale College is uniquely able to lead-is to reach and teach
additional millions of citizens with the TRUTH about America's
great heritage of liberty.

As you might know, Hillsdale College is
almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to
accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly
in the form of federal or state student grants and loans.

This independence frees the College from
burdensome and corrupting government regulation. But it also
means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support
of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of
education to liberty.

If you agree that we are now seeing an
unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you
will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous
tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing
the attached NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH, which you
can access at this secure link:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed survey, and I deeply
appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach
efforts on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. America is at a point where the
far-Left, with the help of its media and Big Tech allies, is
openly suppressing conservative speech and political activity,
denying First Amendment rights to their political opponents-and
denying access to conservative opinion and important news stories
to the American people.

Please help Hillsdale College more clearly
understand the views of mainstream Americans on this issue by
completing the NATIONAL SURVEY ON THE THREAT OF BIG TECH using
the secure link I've provided for you below:

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-tech-survey

Your answers will help strengthen our
educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions of
Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty-and about
the duty of each generation to defend liberty and pass it on to
their children and grandchildren.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isFeb7ZHTN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osFeb7ZHTN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-68168072042-echo3-672BF0040B88E337BCE9BE215362DCF2@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

----Powered by Paramount/Conservative Connect----

h7hf Friend — Today, I officially qualified to appear on the
ballot as a Republican candidate for U.S. Senate in the May Republican
primary.

Serving as Georgia’s Agriculture Commissioner has been the
honor of a lifetime.

We’ve rolled back regulations, cut spending,
delivered historic disaster relief, helped make Georgia the best state
in the country for business, and taken on Joe Biden’s vaccine mandates
and won.

Now, I’m asking the voters of this state to trust me with
another job — because I have the experience to do the job, and too much
is at stake for our country to depend on celebrity status.

more yard signs to distribute, campaign materials to print, digital ads
to run, and rallies and events across the state to attend.

Our
opponents — be it Raphael Warnock and his $23 million or Herschel
Walker and his $5 million — are outspending us, yes.

But they don’t

have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our

Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23

hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who
controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in
order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part

With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican
leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready —

Our opponents — be it Raphael Warnock and his $23 million or Herschel Walker and his $5 million — are outspending us, yes. But they don’t have what we have: unmatched grassroots enthusiasm and support from Georgia leaders across every corner of the state. I know that will make the difference, and so will support from folks like you. Every single dollar raised from emails like this is being put to work to reach Republican voters. I’m proud to stand in this gap... for our nation’s values and security. mail-fundraising?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2022march 7hf I hope you’ll stand with me — because this race will decide who controls the U.S. Senate and we must put forward a Republican who has what it takes to win statewide in Georgia. mail-fundraising?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2022march 7hf Gary Black mail-fundraising?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2022march 7hf DONATE NOW » -donate-here?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign=2022march7hf Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary: I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $23 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below. -donate-here?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utm_campaign=2022march7hf DONATE NOW » We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, click here.

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Harris County's Election Administrator Must be Fired!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Isabel Longoria, Harris County Elections Administrator, MUST resign immediately. All 254 counties in Texas were able to accurately and promptly count Tuesday's Election Nigh votes, except for Harris County. Even worse, Isabel Longoria's office announced late Saturday night that they mysteriously found 10,000 absentee ballots that had been apparently lost! This is absolutely unacceptable. Republicans and Democrats in Harris County alike have lost faith Isabel's ability to run her office effectively! Last week I went on several prominent local radio shows to discuss this egregious issue. Make sure to listen below!

[Listen to Wesley's Interview with ChrisX here!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=33b3edd67aa6433fa290f2fa43b7ddd7&_e=5xIuoV7pNFihXylkTGoTqCRhrzcOCejoT_1glugno8_koB4viACJ2Ff3a4itfyEHy5P1ZE0T56Y5TH4oTLsvyExGT9QoltEpIe2rok5NCkeaUs9Yd_2LIi5jqlUOtrdDifAk6mgq_odaxW9kcACwoqbEP9dRyvObS26KFOSKO1i3SRFZkajGBhCivpqckyp6FiKtR-F1-gIS5LFeYQujZPndwUkuSmepc8OO88uvJBakRxTLazBJidbSnhY1H6UUV1yBE6XxcAzipVZqfCdO3p_fF7nNl_HWZR3GSmff6mRLFELhs_0-dorvPgLmacWw)

Fantastic news, friend: A new poll from The Listener Group shows me outright _beating_ Ron DeSantis in the governor’s race!

**_[Can you make a quick donation to make sure we can fight back against his allies’ dark money attacks and keep our campaign in the lead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42686296/333900405/1828375930?refcode=20220307_f_1_ND&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzA3NmQ0Zi0zZTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B64pUplVWMWG_fojHoJBhj-jyR_kGs0a2oOXPXZp6I4=)_**

Floridians are absolutely fed up with Governor DeSantis’ record of being asleep at the wheel. Instead of taking decisive action to protect our state from COVID-19 or climate change, DeSantis’ top priorities have been banning books in schools and schmoozing with ideological billionaire donors who have very little, if anything, to do with Florida.

But here’s the thing: Those wealthy donors are going to spend huge sums of money to try and buy DeSantis’ re-election. In fact, dark money has _already_ been flooding into Florida in enormous quantities.

Why, you might ask? Because those special interest donors funding his campaign for governor ultimately want to see him run for president in 2024. They can’t wait to have DeSantis in the White House so he can take their disastrous policies nationwide.

We clearly cannot allow that to happen — which means we need to defeat DeSantis right here in Florida this November. But with just over 8 months until Election Day, we’re running out of time to counter the dark money forces that are powering his campaign!

**And that’s why I’m writing to you right now. If we’re going to win this race, we need everyone to do their part. Can you pitch in any amount right now to help us keep building the campaign we need to DEFEAT Governor DeSantis in November?**

name: Patty Murray
subject: Add your name: protect access to birth control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#
Peter,
Did you know that some insurers still aren’t covering all FDA-approved forms of birth control, even though it’s the law?
I know. I’m mad about it too. When we passed the Affordable Care Act, we made sure insurers had to cover birth control with no out-of-pocket costs because it’s an important health care option for about 47 million Americans.
And now, I’m hearing stories about women having to jump through unnecessary hoops just to get the birth control that works for them. That has real health implications and I’m not going to stand for it.
**[At a time when so many Republicans are attacking reproductive rights from every angle, we’ve got to fight back every way we can, too. Will you show your support by signing this petition in support of making sure birth control is affordable and available like it should be?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42686303/333900414/1781168710?ms=pm_em_220307_1&refcode=pm_em_220307_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTA3NmQ0Zi0zZTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6lgX6SLq3B8U-kSOboZ69VIFALq48rMPcAyjOgoQ16Y=&emci=51132649-3e9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ca076d4f-3e9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=13116610)**
Meanwhile I’ll keep fighting to hold these insurers accountable.
Thanks for all you do,
Patty

clean_body: Peter, Did you know that some insurers still aren’t covering all FDA-approved forms of birth control, even though it’s the law? I know. I’m mad about it too. When we passed the Affordable Care Act, we made sure insurers had to cover birth control with no out-of-pocket costs because it’s an important health care option for about 47 million Americans. And now, I’m hearing stories about women having to jump through unnecessary hoops just to get the birth control that works for them. That has real health implications and I’m not going to stand for it. Meanwhile I’ll keep fighting to hold these insurers accountable. Thanks for all you do, Patty As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
BREAKING: Judge dismisses Rep. Swalwell’s charges against me! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9676%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=De4deYPDuVbY2HXM%2foF9EA&sysid=1)
BREAKING: Judge dismisses Rep. Swalwell’s charges against me!
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25816%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WiqLsyMlhTy6PrBXoLf5aA&sysid=1)
---
Friend,
---
Thanks to your support, we just had a victory in court!
---
**_A judge just DISMISSED charges filed against me by Eric Swalwell - the House Democrat who has been accused of sleeping with a Chinese spy named Fang Fang. _**
---
_I know I ask for your support quite a bit, so I wanted to be sure to share this great news with you, Friend._
---
Truth be told, there simply haven’t been many victories to celebrate...
---
...It’s been a rough year since the FBI first raided my apartment and I’m still facing a mountain of legal battles, which is why I’m hoping you’ll donate on the heels of this victory.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice - and with your support, I know I will win. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25817%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2wuoOs3pB07uVMxY9Dhy%2bA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25816%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WiqLsyMlhTy6PrBXoLf5aA&sysid=1)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25818%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TO%2bn%2fNO0pSQQ2xYcd9l6Sw&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25819%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6f9kXGhu%2b6dAmw%2bw9OJ8HA&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25810%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Bjtr%2fN12%2fOWdmXR1JLpk2w&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25811%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DJD6um5PZkMBZiwkgHg5Fg&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $500](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25812%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bbTGUKmLuqgVSxA%2bNf9M1Q&sysid=1)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25813%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NCGP9GaOXcadKXBAhMlphA&sysid=1)**
---
---
You may be a bit shocked to hear this part...
---
...The judge who dismissed the charges against me was appointed by __Barack Obama.__
---
**_That’s how you can be certain that this lawsuit was downright frivolous!_**
---
But it also shows you how desperate the swamp is to take me down.
---
From the moment they launched their dawn raid on my apartment last year, I knew the Deep State had put a gigantic bull’s eye on my back and would try everything they could to take me down.
---
Yet here I am - still standing - thanking patriots like you for my freedom.
---
But the battle isn’t over. The Deep State still has a list of ways to try and take me down, which is why I have to ask for your sustained support.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice - and with your support, I know I will win. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25814%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S7NLMIut94%2bmqsSUp22Nsw&sysid=1)

body:
96https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/ban-russian-oil-email?u
tm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2022march7hf Friend
— Joe Biden could have announced at the State of the Union that he’s
banning imports of Russian oil.

He didn’t. America is still importing
Russia’s oil — and as a result we’re funding Russia’s war.

America
shouldn’t be using Russia as a gas station. Unleashing our own energy
independence would keep our costs low, make our nation more secure, and
hurt Vladimir Putin.

Biden doesn’t have the courage to lead. I do —
and that’s why I introduced a bill to BAN imports of Russian oil.

If
you agree that energy independence is critical, that we should unleash
American oil, and that we shouldn’t fund Russia’s war, will you help me
send a message?

name: Patriots for America
subject: Did we lose you to socialism?
body:
Peter,
Every day, more and more Americans fall for the lies of socialism.

Between Hollywood and the far Left mainstream media, our ears are being _flooded_ with radical propaganda to pull our country even _further _to the Left.

We’ve lost too many hardworking Americans to socialist lies, and we need to know if you’re one of them.

_If you’ve joined Bernie Sanders and AOC on the radical Left, we’ll take you off our list._

**But if you’re still ready to FIGHT for Republicans in 2022, we need to know that you’re ALL IN to finish our mission.**

body:

**The latest data out of Iowa:****Midnight fundraising deadline****is critical to protecting Senate majority**
Peter – radical Republican Sen. Chuck Grassley (IA) is running for reelection, and his challenger, Democrat Abby Finkenauer, is going to need all of the grassroots support possible to defeat him. **Here are the latest numbers from our data team:**
* **64% of Iowa voters DON'T want to reelect Sen. Grassley** , and Abby is running to defeat him in what The Hill is calling a "tough race" for Sen. Grassley – making this our best chance in decades to flip this seat blue.

* **The Senate is split 50-50** , meaning Democrats MUST defeat vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley to maintain and expand our majority.

* The GOP Senate campaign arm already has $39 MILLION dedicated to defeating Democratic challengers like Abby and taking back the Senate – and an ally of Mitch McConnell has vowed to make Joe Biden a "half-term president" by dismantling Democratic majorities in Congress.

* Our midnight deadline is quickly approaching, and **Abby is forecast to fall short of the $10,000 she needs to raise to defeat Sen. Grassley in Iowa.**

Peter, Sen. Chuck Grassley is vulnerable, and if Abby defeats him it will virtually guarantee Democrats control of the Senate. But we simply cannot win without the resources to compete. **[We need a major surge in donations before our midnight fundraising deadline. body:
Astorino polls best against Hochul | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1c6778ceffd1/astorino-leads-in-latest-poll?e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| |
---
| |
# **Rob Astorino is the only Republican candidate for governor holding Kathy Hochul under the important 50% mark in the latest Zogby Poll. And unlike two other GOP candidates in the race, Rob hasn't even started running TV ads yet.**
---
|
---
| **This poll is bad news for Hochul. A Marist poll eight years ago to the day had Rob down 40 points to Cuomo. Rob ended up closing that gap by nearly 27 points. He only needs to close a 14-point gap this time and the political winds are certainly with us.

Help Rob close that gap by chipping in [$20, $50, $100, $250 or $500](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=113d0700f5&e=3ca66fc65a) today.

For further perspective, George Pataki was trailing Mario Cuomo by 12 points in a Zogby poll from Spring of 1994 and we all know how that election turned out.

We can defeat Hochul and her far-left, radical allies in Albany this year, save New York and rebuild our state better than ever.

Please [DONATE](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=c22882810b&e=3ca66fc65a) to Rob Astorino, the candidate legendary political consultant, Dick Morris calls - "Our best shot for governor."

Thank you.

Phil Oliva
Campaign Manager**
