| | Peter, From the very beginning, our campaign has been different. Josh Lafazan is a _different_ kind of politician. And we're running a _different_ kind of campaign. This country needs to cultivate the next generation of leaders. If elected, Josh would be the youngest Democrat in Congress. And that's why Team Lafazan is committed to a big, bold program that finds and mobilizes new leaders in our community. [**We are inviting young people throughout the region to join our movement today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666394/333831336/-718531144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) When Josh ran for the Nassau County legislature, hundreds of young people were inspired to join "Lafazan's Army." Over 200 interns became engaged campaigners for Josh, learned how to organize, and helped him win. **[This innovative and inspiring program even received coverage from The New York Times.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666395/333831337/-2129866425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801)** Now, we're relaunching the intern program for Josh's congressional campaign. [**Watch this video to learn more:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666396/333831338/-803653937?v=JBAoVNKxOQ0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666397/333831339/-803653937?v=JBAoVNKxOQ0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) **Spring Interns** These high school and college students will come away from this program having accomplished something purposeful, learned how to organize in politics, connected with citizens in their community, and made great friends while having fun as a part of our intern community. Working side by side with Josh, campaign manager Chase Serota, and our senior campaign team, these young people will learn about and be involved in every aspect of our political campaign. Interns may even go on to help run one of our future campaigns as all of our campaign staff started out as **[Lafazan Interns!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666398/333831340/-2140886601?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801)** To learn a little bit more about our intern programs, check out **[Fox 5's coverage](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666399/333831341/-1557633548?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801)** , or [**coverage from Pix 11**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666400/333831342/-803653937?app=desktop&v=B2PD9es41RI&feature=youtu.be&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801). **What makes a student a good fit for our campaign?**
* Students who are interested in politics and government
* Students who want to be involved within their community
* Students who have not yet found an internship this school year and want to do something meaningful outside of the classroom

We have three age-based programs:
1. **[College students can sign up here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666401/333831343/-700558065?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801)**
2. **[High school students can sign up here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666402/333831344/1223435807?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801)**
3. **[Supporters of all ages can sign up to be a volunteer here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666403/333831345/1549510618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801)**

Josh's campaign for Congress is a once-in-a-generation opportunity for New Yorkers to elect someone focused on _your future_ instead of the candidate's future. And we want you to be part of our movement for positive change. This election is critical. We're already in a tight primary, and we expect the general election to be even tougher. We won't win on hope alone. [**Sign up to join our team.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42666404/333831346/-718531144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjI1MmViMC0xYTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UVUAZGuVKfzWWnioEjPaXrtM51rootbVDqKvTQWfCZM=&emci=85955915-b79d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=52252eb0-1a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=17773801) **Please share this email with parents, students, or anyone who may know of a young person who might benefit from this experience.** Community members like you have helped our team grow our internship program in the past, and we remain forever grateful for your continued help and support. **Our interns gain important skills and experience, but more importantly, they become engaged in our nation's democracy.** We're proud of our internship program. And we are going to be even more proud when our volunteer army elects Josh Lafazan to Congress. We can't wait for you to be a part of this historic movement! _Team Lafazan_ **[P.S. body:
With so much on the line, I'm counting on you
| | |

This is urgent, friend.

body:

| |

Hi Peter – Rick Scott, Senator from Florida, recently released an 11-point plan for the issues he wants Republicans to focus on in the 2022 elections. [__**His plan includes building a U.S.-Mexico border wall and naming it after Donald Trump. Chip in here to fight against Rick Scott and his GOP agenda.**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/42689223/333913404/311099802?refcode2=18d9bfed-489e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&refcode=220307_team_rickscottagenda_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE4ZDliZmVkLTQ4OWUtZWMxMS1hMjJhLTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=80HRTCWRvj20w1X3nC72WofOLTswgkcGAsRJ9y8Ohi0=) Rick Scott is chair of the Senate Republicans' campaign committee, and this plan outlines his blueprint for defeating Democrats in the upcoming elections. His plan is cause for serious concern – it tells us the policies Republicans are running on, and each is more radical than the last. Here are just a few of the plans he is pushing for:
* Increasing taxes on low-income Americans
* Expiring all federal laws within five years of their passing, including Medicare and Social Security

We turned back the mob and achieved peace through superior firepower when they reached our house the second night!

---
Friend,
---
Thanks to your support, we just had a victory in court!
---
**_A judge just DISMISSED charges filed against me by Eric Swalwell – the House Democrat who has been accused of sleeping with a Chinese spy named Fang Fang._**
---
_I know I ask for your support quite a bit, so I wanted to be sure to share this great news with you, Friend._
---
Truth be told, there simply haven’t been many victories to celebrate...
---
...It’s been a rough year since the FBI first raided my apartment and I’m still facing a mountain of legal battles, which is why I’m hoping you’ll donate on the heels of this victory.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice – and with your support, I know I will win.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7d4rebsf25lbs1qi5c3j0sv47j7r4k42vqq6m80_)

---

---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9609v1g7q5nqo8pa40j70i9of2eonisitoirra8_)**
---
---
You may be a bit shocked to hear this part...
---
...The judge who dismissed the charges against me was appointed by __Barack Obama.__
---
**_That’s how you can be certain that this lawsuit was downright frivolous!_**
---
But it also shows you how desperate the swamp is to take me down.
---
From the moment they launched their dawn raid on my apartment last year, I knew the Deep State had put a gigantic bull’s eye on my back and would try everything they could to take me down.
---
Yet here I am – still standing – thanking patriots like you for my freedom.
---
But the battle isn’t over. The Deep State still has a list of ways to try and take me down, which is why I have to ask for your sustained support.

Thank you,

body:
50 Patriots --- 50 Petitions Each --- Are YOU up for the Challenge?

** Dear Patriots,
------------------------------------------------------------
The Martz Campaign has initiated a CHALLENGE. We are asking 50 people to commit to getting 50 Candidate Petition Forms signed by March 26th. This will help us reach the goal of 2600 signatures.

The forms must be turned in to the Campaign by March 26th. On March 27th we will have a celebration gathering where gifts will be given to participants.

The form can be printed from the Campaign website under the heading "Form". The forms can be mailed to the Campaign or they can be picked up my a member of the Campaign.

Please reply to this email if you are accepting the *Challenge!*

Thank you in advance for you help.

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz Campaign

body:
In light of Joe Biden's State of the Union address, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of W

America deserves total energy independence
Friend -- In light of Joe Biden's State of the Union address, the time has come to send a message that will echo throughout the halls of Washington: **Americans are TIRED of skyrocketing gas prices and our new dependence on Russian oil.**
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5gr6bfj2acfom0r1k9i8hf8i8o82aq1eooer16g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdjm9or2chh2bs)**
**Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT!**
_Under Joe Biden, he greenlit a massive Russian pipeline and canceled the Keystone XL project ..._
Here's the cold hard fact: Thanks to Biden, we're buying over $20 BILLION of Russian -- not American -- oil this year.
You have two choices. [**1) You can sign onto our petition to restore American energy independence and lower gas prices for ALL of us...**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd0fa20ptbp6fqndu2n1mkf2rte1l4jfp043la20_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdjm9or2chh2bs) _Or 2) You can watch Joe Biden buy more Russian oil and see prices go EVEN HIGHER._
**[SIGN ON: TELL BIDEN TO REINSTATE THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrmlsd7mmibv974oeno4k54chauprpe4nvdjqo3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdjm9or2chh2bs)**
[**If you believe in American Energy Independence, Democracy, and the Keystone Pipeline, sign your name onto our petition right now.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7k3agnl8o3v1ja7318m6legn1tflk42i2fasng0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdjm9or2chh2bs)
Your signature today is important, Friend.
Thanks,
House Republicans

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e2a81a2f36654e069db74df185b63f0f&_e=xbAY2GXhW6vY4sLmMDN-6R8gyVsy6sHPL46a7B1XPlv1LVGT9HDZv-JwhaLVO5UnMOTGcEAcQHQeQJnErwGxr6SZhrbQQRSGOyuPqDJW9cmrTis4TjBYJ1_JaOQI8htc47etWlD5QxaKlwF9h5y4fm9jhvgmslsU_vs5j0m1V3wn_yT5eCWwva5yCo7hRQntMq81E3Fid2uusz0tKKbyiM41402gA8L9OXPyToDrzUdEhPjIXogFXxe_pgIiS875pZVOp72rvl7JQKaAjHLwj2I78LMlK3iQ6b49qM2T1ya8O4P7KkWdxWlNJMZ9mqGb1K41u1KfVwppIGWh7lBak09-NpT-7VmSirTuk8reO1SHhqdYPYNJO-lCnGiHh7txZWRqHonYTWargFbk_NTdIUBA1NK6BWfKiycUVjxL2jqlKwefieWJSFK5RceXTSpEfngX1SZ9PkEGamVo5-JRZA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the _**"MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION."**_

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e2a81a2f36654e069db74df185b63f0f&_e=xbAY2GXhW6vY4sLmMDN-6R8gyVsy6sHPL46a7B1XPlv1LVGT9HDZv-JwhaLVO5UnMOTGcEAcQHQeQJnErwGxr6SZhrbQQRSGOyuPqDJW9cmrTis4TjBYJ1_JaOQI8htc47etWlD5QxaKlwF9h5y4fm9jhvgmslsU_vs5j0m1V3wn_yT5eCWwva5yCo7hRQntMq81E3Fid2uusz0tKKbyiM41402gA8L9OXPyToDrzUdEhPjIXogFXxe_pgIiS875GUq4HRzngfVbYBQsE6UHuxolCdh3LTQK46m_FMekMmOS5ffvNPONlehJmIEds9ZRHHZQPR7SeVMw3X5DHEPYXlJapQIgcFR5ZzwUisEymyvor-elxp5DNWhZ8ALdYTm74QHY_mkLGbGSoMSpfBvT3PPeKv5lDuYLi5Azs_cbgAfXrOf_AriHCwlG7qT_wk9xFy8E-Xry6Y1MPJGqtcQ9BA%3D%3D)
There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it.

According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. **[A Quinnipiac survey from last month had our campaign leading our Democrat opponent by ONE POINT- a statistical tie.](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e2a81a2f36654e069db74df185b63f0f&_e=xbAY2GXhW6vY4sLmMDN-6R8gyVsy6sHPL46a7B1XPlv1LVGT9HDZv-JwhaLVO5UnMOTGcEAcQHQeQJnErwGxr6SZhrbQQRSGOyuPqDJW9cmrTis4TjBYJ1_JaOQI8htc47etWlD5QxaKlwF9h5y4fm9jhvgmslsU_vs5j0m1V3wn_yT5eCWwva5yCo7hRQntMq81E3Fid2uusz0tKKbyiM41402gA8L9OXPyToDrzUdEhPjIXogFXxe_pgIiS875Z5RJ3_88IjkHzarlR5ERTtPcTZS7kDFCn56HREgDDtf9tlUq93s52G-mngyPHsRMGQTv6Ncn9nI4gkIssaGl8sS-Z0hGWgR-WNYwTnuDyML1W-ckr8qkKRFJHWl-B1RlsdUpvP4S7ZJ1h_wLJompFnDun7o21gOaQy3u_mp4Owi-PDsr9N8Eh_AgATJZpvVN3wmIODu74ZKIXZmQyGldcw%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us:
1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State
2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November
3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets

In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break.

**[Please let us know we can count on you for your support today!](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e2a81a2f36654e069db74df185b63f0f&_e=xbAY2GXhW6vY4sLmMDN-6R8gyVsy6sHPL46a7B1XPlv1LVGT9HDZv-JwhaLVO5UnMOTGcEAcQHQeQJnErwGxr6SZhrbQQRSGOyuPqDJW9cmrTis4TjBYJ1_JaOQI8htc47etWlD5QxaKlwF9h5y4fm9jhvgmslsU_vs5j0m1V3wn_yT5eCWwva5yCo7hRQntMq81E3Fid2uusz0tKKbyiM41402gA8L9OXPyToDrzUdEhPjIXogFXxe_pgIiS875nbbtV5gR18eZnTuQ4teXot1yHtno2-T8CwnYDRR1WS9CMacIRV9v0TWXPVm4bLcFPWAepVvMI3titeJbsaXBdJpbTuAl7aDDfAITpnhDmXP7Z855GmAKWVG-76K75RktJHE2Oa8FqwIVP79pUWgR89JKt-fh6wE9TswJA-ANjP47ViHRFZfNO4Ym1IyGJpnJEXFfSqmsZqR6kKJWoDzLGA%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

name: Capt. Hung Cao
subject: I can’t believe Biden did this to our soldiers
body:
In my lifetime, I’ve seen Presidents with all sorts of beliefs and agendas, but I never thought I’d see a Commander in Chief
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zserfg1ivo1dhn1l5tca4ovglmqurvp0povot9a8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrr6d5gsepjdcb1cep76o3hc2qm1dlhc4qbdcr6m9oe1pbkcurm0thl6mprbdj7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6pj32cllmjjr4sr66hgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5hm6pr4sdj60oh5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znlci2qj2h24b8t6mn738e3lpo7hgij420bcommo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdjm9or6c1h2bs) Fellow Patriot, In my lifetime, I’ve seen Presidents with all sorts of beliefs and agendas, but I _never_ thought I’d see a Commander in Chief who disrespects our military as much as Joe Biden.

subject: These Events NEED volunteers to help collect signatures
body:
Are you Free and willing?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/08d2bfbd268d/these-events-need-volunteers-to-help-collect-signatures?e=77bc5297c6)

** Hello Patriots! Please reply if you are free and willing to collect signatures for any of the opportunities listed below.
------------------------------------------------------------

1.TOMORROW -- March 8th --- ANY voting site. You are allowed to stand with a clipboard in hand to collect signatures at any voting site as long as you stay 150 FEET from the building. IF you need a T-shirt, clipboard, form etc. ----Please reach out!

2. Gun Show MARCH 26th & 27th
KOA Convention Center (https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=589b72cb95&e=77bc5297c6)
4276 Hwy 441
Okeechobee, FL 34974
Saturday: 8:45am - 5:00pm
Sunday: 9:50am - 4:00pm

(3.) Gun Show APRIL 9th & 10th
Polish American Social Club (https://melissamartz.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4170e64cfef2b4eb82baf8e12&id=9a59e2caf7&e=77bc5297c6)
343 Prima Vista Blvd
Port St Lucie, FL 34983
Saturday: 8:45am - 5:00pm
Sunday: 9:50am - 4:00pm

THANK YOU to all who have helped. We are short approximately 1400 signatures and are aiming to reach that goal by the END of MARCH.

Stay Free,

Melissa Martz Campaign

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russell=20Fry?=
subject: The Russell Roundup
body:
Stay up to date on the latest from Russell Fry's campaign for Congress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/russellfrysc/russellroundup-8853954?e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=3652f7c403&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | It’s Monday, and that means another installment of **_Russell’s Roundup_** , your weekly source for the latest information on Russell Fry’s campaign to send a true conservative to Congress.
---
|
---
---
| | | [ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=8d4de00804&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
**Welcome Pres. Trump to Florence This Saturday**

That’s right, President Donald Trump is coming to the Seventh Congressional District this Saturday. And Russell Fry, and hundreds of your fellow Fry supporters, will be there to welcome him. As you know, President Trump has endorsed Russell Fry in the GOP congressional primary, and he considers this race so important he’s personally coming here to talk to us about it.

We want you to be there for this important event! Please invite your friends, family, and neighbors to attend, too.

---
|
---
| **Reserve Your VIP Trump Experience Today** Interested in making a special event even more special? Take advantage of the following to enhance your experience: **_VIP Platinum Sponsor *_SOLD OUT*__** Reserved stage seating for 1; Pre-rally VIP Tent Reception with a Special Guest; Your photo with Russell Fry and special guest; Expedited event entry; Recognition as a special Fry for Congress sponsor. **_VIP Gold Sponsor_** Special Access bleacher seating for 6; Pre-rally VIP Tent Reception with a Special Guest; Your photo with Russell Fry and special guest; Expedited event entry; Reserved parking; Recognition as a special Fry for Congress sponsor. **_VIP Silver Sponsor_** Special Access bleacher seating for 2; Your photo with Russell Fry and special guest; Expedited event entry; Reserved parking; Recognition as a special Fry for Congress sponsor. [Click here to learn more, and don’t miss these exciting opportunities.](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=2ae0832eb6&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
|
---
| **Russell Fry Needs YOU: Volunteers Wanted for Saturday**

It takes a lot of hard work from a whole lot of people to make an event of this scale successful. Volunteers are pouring in from every corner of the Pee Dee and Grand Strand, and Russell appreciates each and every one of them. But we need even more help; in fact, we need YOU!

[_Click here_](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=e136b5fafe&e=7aa6ac5965) to find a spot that’s right for you and volunteer to help send a loud clear message that South Carolina is Donald Trump and Russell Fry Country!
---
| | | | | | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=94b6acb7da&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=53b1ae10f8&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| | [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=879205b24e&e=7aa6ac5965)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Fry For Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Fry For CongressPO Box 14641Surfside Beach, SC 29587-4641
[Add us to your address book](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=436db54895) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=721c56c6d9&e=7aa6ac5965&c=436db54895).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&afl=1)

good.

I’m incredibly excited for you to see our new ads—I really believe they’re

ready to go, we don’t actually have the funds to buy the airtime we need.

If we can’t afford to keep our ads on the air, well that’s like benching
your star player in a close game: what’s the point?

Hi there.
My campaign just announced a $13 million ad investment to fight back against GOP attacks, reach voters across New Hampshire, and protect this critical Senate seat – and Democrats' Senate majority.
With Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat, this investment will enable my campaign to cut through their hot air and make sure our message reaches each and every Granite State voter.
But here's the deal: New Hampshire's ad market is one of the most expensive in the country, and my campaign manager is telling me we don't have all of the money yet. That's why my team set a goal to raise $20,000 to show our momentum and stay on track to make this important ad buy. If we don't hit every benchmark this year, we could cede ad inventory to far-right Republicans who are out to smear my reputation.
**In a race that was last won by 1,017 votes, it’s not hyperbole to say that this first ad funding benchmark could be the difference between protecting this seat or losing it to an extreme Republican.**
**[_So please, if you can, chip in $5 or more today to help keep this seat and the Senate blue. Your support is so important to me, and I'm counting on you._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42690316/333918296/-947982778?amounts=5,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk732-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTNlNDU0My00YzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v3n5mv7tcZbHgKcJ4QjdiXxp-ajSz9u7RQLdHZpouf0=)**

My campaign just announced a $13 million ad investment to fight back against GOP attacks, reach voters across New Hampshire, and protect this critical Senate seat – and Democrats' Senate majority. With Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies spending more against me than any other Senate Democrat, this investment will enable my campaign to cut through their hot air and make sure our message reaches each and every Granite State voter. But here's the deal: New Hampshire's ad market is one of the most expensive in the country, and my campaign manager is telling me we don't have all of the money yet. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: A pledge to protect the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zid65io3stef54n8jbh7in9mnerunmt9uvapeh3g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge8ob4cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpbcdb36qp38dple3j62tjgeponctr0mphm5djmc1hjecb2c1h69dbieapjed376v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66lgbbcr7mtgmcdb4mdhmfc5lclp2bs)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zetebluriv142eu4179276adsp4ma2tdk8k3sr38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge8ob4cdh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlo41o4u4fmdcpestmqguhme4qa373nmftcpi78g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge8ob4cdh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zclkk45pjvn2q8bkdllqdcnlppun7o0765j73a4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge8ob4cdh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---

clean_body: I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h | | | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive. Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. body:
Add your name to STAND FOR LIFE >>>
| | | Hey Peter,

Did you see Coach’s email?

The U.S. Senate has blocked the Democrats’ extreme pro-abortion bill – Republicans stood strong and united to put a stop to this insanity.

Unfortunately, this fight is far from over...

We must protect the laws our right-to-life movement has worked so hard to get on the books, here in Alabama and across America, to protect the unborn!

If you’re with Coach in this fight, take a moment now to let him know.
**[SIGN OUR PETITION TO STAND FOR LIFE >>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/44e7934827441f51/73a4c6885a2849fcc3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
Thank you for taking a moment to add your name.

\- Team Tuberville
---
|
---
To: All SupportersFrom: Coach TubervilleSent: Saturday, March 5, 2022Subject: Democrat’s Extreme Pro-Abortion Bill BLOCKED
---
Peter,

On Monday, the Democrats tried and failed to ram through one of the most radical pro-abortion bills in U.S. history.

They want to codify Roe v. Wade to create a FEDERAL RIGHT to abortion.

**Under the so-called “Women’s Health Protection Act” existing restrictions would be thrown out the window, to allow abortions for any reason right up until birth.**

We succeeded in blocking this radical legislation. But it was close.

Show where you stand – sign our petition.
---
[**STAND FOR LIFE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/44e7934827441f51/6e1c52c05d73b719c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
You know this fight is far from over – you can bet there will be a next time.

We’ll need your support to protect the unborn!

\- Coach

body:
When you watch Mark’s vote total tick up on election night, please know the donation you made TODAY was why it happened.
#

Friends -
There are 2,651,539 registered voters in Maricopa County, Arizona’s largest county.
Last election, 51.90% of them turned out for Mark Kelly.
If Mark is going to win re-election, we need each and every one of them to turn out again.
If they do, we win. If they don’t, we might not.
So today, we want to ask you to adopt ONE voter in Maricopa County. Just one. And we’ll turn them out, because of what you did today.
And when everyone chips in, it all adds up. That’s how we turn out our voters. That’s how we win:

clean_body: | | | | It’s just WRONG | Peter, Did you see what Liz Cheney called us? She called us, the America First conservatives in Wyoming “Crazies”, and was even hailed for it by the leftist media! This isn’t just a small ignorant act. This is exactly the same approach Hillary Clinton used when calling us DEPLORABLES! It didn’t work in 2016 and it won’t work now in 2022! What Liz Cheney is really saying is that if you disagree with her you are “crazy.” What drivel. I will always stand with the GREAT people of Wyoming. My conservative values will not be shaken no matter what the “uniparty” says. Join me and Team Hageman if you are ready to UNSEAT Cheney. >> Thank you, Harriet Hageman | | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: Our Two New Union Endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=a1fee7a200&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| I’m honored to receive the endorsement of both Teamsters Local 107 and the International Union of Operating Engineers Local 542.

It feels especially poignant that during Women’s History Month, these unions have chosen to endorse the only woman candidate in this race and help us in our fight for historic representation in Pennsylvania.

It is these union workers who are rebuilding our infrastructure with their own hands, creating a stronger, more resilient Philadelphia.

Thank you to these unions for recognizing my support of their collective bargaining agreements and thriving vocational training programs. Let’s move Pennsylvania forward together.

[Can you chip in today for historic representation in Harrisburg?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=e1cc92d777&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | |
**Help Get My Name on the Ballot**
We need to collect hundreds of petition signatures in the 182nd District in order to get my name on the ballot – and we need your help!

[Contact us](mailto:info@dejaforpa.com?subject=Petition%20Help) for a quick tutorial on signature collection - even a couple of hours of your time would go such a long way in helping us in our movement for historic representation!
---
|
**Wear a Piece of History!** Check out our [Swag Shop](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=e1fdfa611b&e=3f8e2ea1e3) for stickers, buttons, T-shirts, and masks to show your support of our historic campaign!
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=f7eaff38d4&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
### [Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=3fb8154238&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=1e65bb1fb1&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: ABSOLUTE PROOF of election fraud in TX primaries?
body:
| | | | [](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZydW1ibGUuY29tJTJGdndtNHV4LXNldGgta2VzaGVsLXNob3dzLWFic29sdXRlLXByb29mLW9mLWZyYXVkLWluLXR4LXByaW1hcmllcy5odG1s&sig=3P7D9ZakcDjzqKoVmjvr3FnamZPCrqGhgegtKyQcfgZh&iat=1646686351&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=62A76A1A387)
---
| | |
---
| | Good afternoon patriots,

First and foremost, a deep and heartfelt THANK YOU to each and every one of you for your support at every level, and for your votes.

Earning 10,135 (17%) of your votes is no small feat and is something I do not take for granted nor lightly.

Despite the numbers not matching what we physically heard and saw on the ground... despite Crenshaw being abandoned by President Trump, Kenny Webster, and Michael Berry... he got the majority of the votes according to the reports.

Or did he...

Have you seen this video? [Seth Keshel Shows ABSOLUTE PROOF Of Fraud In TX Primaries](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZydW1ibGUuY29tJTJGdndtNHV4LXNldGgta2VzaGVsLXNob3dzLWFic29sdXRlLXByb29mLW9mLWZyYXVkLWluLXR4LXByaW1hcmllcy5odG1s&sig=3P7D9ZakcDjzqKoVmjvr3FnamZPCrqGhgegtKyQcfgZh&iat=1646686351&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=8RRDsQMegL%2Bk1g7KlTCN33wFoqDlMHNmyq65fGLdufk%3D&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=62A76A1A387)

Either way... the most popular incumbent in the United States lost 26% of his constituents to a trio of unknown candidates... and spent over $200 per vote to do it.

Meanwhile, I spend just over $5 per vote.

Let me be very clear...

Our fight won’t be over until we see voter confidence and liberty restored... and Dan Crenshaw fired from DC.

We’re not finished because we’ve still got plenty of fight left in us...

The best is yet to come.

---
| | |
---
| | For Liberty,
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---

subject: Poll: Thoughts on Putin?

body:
What do you think of Putin? As a veteran who’s fought terrorism both on the battlefield and in my private life, I am an unequivocal advocate for freed I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=235872f42d4c415d8b5e2a88b73626ca&_e=X94e2Tf6-KFQ_XLl85GIEOwHze2mHTdbZZdCXKFuEg7xwMus_drK08WizeUevFWdL7KA1zyZUVGsWxN_gny3R3K-gAvXgTqamaxG3cGsyFjtwFvM5ftwZzERPWgHfoAm2EnKYO9IpGlBeRQ1jhFCdbfbRf0cuhsc5Kvs6Zai-BXZEya-Cs1L-Be0UK9veviiN3dzJ5Sf3or7plUIO6ysAbIbnTh4yAbfLaPeKDR7oyuNt03eW9AbqU9hcnpY4zarkRUQmP3AY6CvKpmmDTfwIbUSmGy1k0NuzgY3Y6OF-Ni2urxMdGXTuI-87oKypR89HAMJeB88frOk5d9ebo1yOh_NeANg2vOzEi5BJRo7gDLn19s9hDS5dwZXIkThQh4lIHxVCg4kZOIWIjyff_JZMKZSxTz0CG11TaBilblfEhAYRn9WTpjwSyXC553HMtaReh7ff3yJLqqrxRB5089C0OMPlnP0GNYe6jLSuEuSfUhqjrwWEch6LehqWqD1IboLpEEN9TlhLtzlAf5rkpPw6zfUvewBSpS-zvwotQX7BKmVsExBrD3gX8Us4_d53X3GIvbN4U3Wdo5RKVf4rQH32lKh7av7SHb_ZfQx-3wFPXmqMyTsd8iUQrFf6ERYY_Ay)
---

Peter,

Just when we thought we were headed for some sense of normalcy after two years of living during a global pandemic, **Vladimir Putin decides he’d like to invade Ukraine.**

As a veteran who’s fought terrorism both on the battlefield and in my private life, I am an unequivocal advocate for freedom-loving people’s everywhere. The Ukrainian people have given every indication since the fall of the Soviet Union that they value their democracy and are willing to fight to the death to maintain their freedoms.

**h**

I’m aware that not every American holds the same views regarding the events unfolding in Eastern Europe at the moment. As such, **[I’m asking for 1 minute of your time today to take a brief survey](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=235872f42d4c415d8b5e2a88b73626ca&_e=X94e2Tf6-KFQ_XLl85GIEOwHze2mHTdbZZdCXKFuEg7xwMus_drK08WizeUevFWdL7KA1zyZUVGsWxN_gny3R3K-gAvXgTqamaxG3cGsyFjtwFvM5ftwZzERPWgHfoAm2EnKYO9IpGlBeRQ1jhFCdbfbRf0cuhsc5Kvs6Zai-BXZEya-Cs1L-Be0UK9veviiN3dzJ5Sf3or7plUIO6ysAbIbnTh4yAbfLaPeKDR7oyuNt03eW9AbqU9hcnpY4zarkRUQmP3AY6CvKpmmDTfwIbUSmGy1k0NuzgY3Y6OF-Ni2urxMdGXTuI-87oKypR89HAMJeB88frOk5d9ebo1yOh_NeANg2vOzEi5BJRo7gDLn19s9hDS5dwZXIkThQh4lIHxVCg4kZOIWIjyff_JZMKZSxTz0CG11TaBilblfEhDaxejpFcTtAkaqrJNqLoFEELzxF43gsG05OFNDutT0ve_GTCxyk1wr2qsMUObTkix9MwvKAIYURSZEFv73Z55oVIZ9h1QT2RSM4YFeyH2DwXF2SmKik4EHc-pYd1s9ulP23pY_UxwbLaQXg4fgoflb4I9zQ_wnmxAI9A9Eul2K8CGvfzeMJRFTPNsSovi87NmWjpuU0pB3RMdYH7c2p0BS)** in order for my campaign to better understand how much support, if any, you’d like to see the United States send in support of the Ukrainian government.

| **NATIONAL SECURITY SURVEY**

[**WHERE DO YOU STAND ON PUTIN? >> **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=235872f42d4c415d8b5e2a88b73626ca&_e=X94e2Tf6-KFQ_XLl85GIEOwHze2mHTdbZZdCXKFuEg7xwMus_drK08WizeUevFWdL7KA1zyZUVGsWxN_gny3R3K-gAvXgTqamaxG3cGsyFjtwFvM5ftwZzERPWgHfoAm2EnKYO9IpGlBeRQ1jhFCdbfbRf0cuhsc5Kvs6Zai-BXZEya-Cs1L-Be0UK9veviiN3dzJ5Sf3or7plUIO6ysAbIbnTh4yAbfLaPeKDR7oyuNt03eW9AbqU9hcnpY4zarkRUQmP3AY6CvKpmmDTfwIbUSmGy1k0NuzgY3Y6OF-Ni2urxMdGXTuI-87oKypR89HAMJeB88frOk5d9ebo1yOh_NeANg2vOzEi5BJRo7gDLn19s9hDS5dwZXIkThQh4lIHxVCg4kZOIWIjyff_JZMKZSxTz0CG11TaBilblfEhDuBCNNmRwsR5HZvXPG-iIqKNHMXGShcGxfl6pq9HF8gBrjGoOPXWmNCYKo4HgCVLY58RpQkssn4RHW6nvvod8zqUZnd3gPrJgzKjyYrPmXBmsYu2VW_MH0_SPFD-5UFZ5HgDP8x4Sa9JLmBDSuO_vz3chCzJphVlVAJ-L9VUu9_fDoHxL5T_9HmVJ1zLPb9D-b8cxbeEnyIiPTwow6xE1I)

---

I wish President Biden the best in his “**negotiations** ” with President Putin, but I’m not convinced he’s up to the task. This is a textbook scenario of why “**elections matter.** ” When we cannot rely on the President of the United States to make the best decisions on behalf of the nation, the job falls to the members of Congress, which I hope to be by this time next year – god willing.

We’ve seen one too many foreign policy fumbles in Biden’s short presidency, making it all the more important that a Republican majority in the House is realized this November.

You’d be doing me a great favor by [**participating in our brief survey today**](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=235872f42d4c415d8b5e2a88b73626ca&_e=X94e2Tf6-KFQ_XLl85GIEOwHze2mHTdbZZdCXKFuEg7xwMus_drK08WizeUevFWdL7KA1zyZUVGsWxN_gny3R3K-gAvXgTqamaxG3cGsyFjtwFvM5ftwZzERPWgHfoAm2EnKYO9IpGlBeRQ1jhFCdbfbRf0cuhsc5Kvs6Zai-BXZEya-Cs1L-Be0UK9veviiN3dzJ5Sf3or7plUIO6ysAbIbnTh4yAbfLaPeKDR7oyuNt03eW9AbqU9hcnpY4zarkRUQmP3AY6CvKpmmDTfwIbUSmGy1k0NuzgY3Y6OF-Ni2urxMdGXTuI-87oKypR89HAMJeB88frOk5d9ebo1yOh_NeANg2vOzEi5BJRo7gDLn19s9hDS5dwZXIkThQh4lIHxVCg4kZOIWIjyff_JZMKZSxTz0CG11TaBilblfEhD0y5LZrzfsRaHNnzGVlHD4rLR0jFXjN8DqkITiVr0zlwqylzyT64szY_6sBIucbUS1FOWX_xU_Yn5CdWuSMdIb4_l2Y2GLZpWKOxNMnBaujYITxoHmVTqfWGF-uKg8BR45hVKQE3TZd2x2dAWPSPSfJ_lD9pvwDSj7KDzWF1CDjM8QCJa4z6IlIcnl8sBYmMKWg1aIo2iwPjusqJG1MmrQ).

Thank you for your time,

Alek Skarlatos

Energy security is national security. Biden's policies have shut down our domestic energy production and emboldened our enemies. We can lead, by example, as the world's #1 domestic energy producer, but we need a change in leadership starting with the House.
The American energy workforce is ready. However, we can't bring energy independence back to America until we reclaim the majority.

name: Great America Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6723%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9WyZfKOBI4IFv8W1r9oOGw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69220%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xvGsmqYl9X%2bfGQYLE3qjdA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69221%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a4qDvqrBllChRhAfWmOeFg&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c69222%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nhL%2bcQERXE7fjcw2NM3p9g&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Marjorie K. Eastman
subject: I’m sick of hearing this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie K
body:
Career politicians want us to believe they’re the ones responsible for keeping America safe and protecting our freedoms. L
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9c9pt5cooqt0ar63pjn9rl4ojm9imrcd8bm9cs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4ongchq32opkmgo71dbie6pj8pdj6ko7csthc6oe9pb5e5pbcdj4map66o9ie1q31puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4dj664rjadhnmap6cd30m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1lvlrd7bk2g6bfq7al3ul55mbuj06qqplmghc7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) Friend, Career politicians want us to believe they’re the ones responsible for keeping America safe and protecting our freedoms. _Let’s set the record straight._ **That credit belongs to our men and women in uniform who make unimaginable sacrifices to serve and defend our country every. single. day.** _Here’s what career politicians ARE responsible for, though:_
* The inflation wrecking our economy
* The disastrous and deadly withdrawal from Afghanistan
* The chaos at our southern border

**My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military spouse, mother, and business leader – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate.** Career politicians got our country into this mess and they have no idea how to get us out. **[That was my message on the debate stage the other night which you can see for yourself here.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkc3rvevtnsamq1r6p9os244di5aija653tlsjeo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs)** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkj1vofj73lbsdj428juv7fjm0qg4t0knpjrrhj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) [**HEAR MY OPENING MESSAGE**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsikejkp5mue7etvc9q67madarjvojqluocpjcuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) While I was on the frontlines in Afghanistan, the career politicians I’m running against were attending fundraisers, shipping jobs overseas, and getting rich off your taxpayer dollars. They spent their careers going after _you_ , _your_ livelihood, and _your_ freedom. **Now, these same career politicians are attacking me because they’re terrified of losing**** _their_****jobs.** Friend, I’m the ONLY combat veteran and political outsider in this race. I haven’t spent decades raising money and taking donations from super PACs, which puts me at a fundraising disadvantage. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo9nc8qgl10kc7k0rl030ncn97uuj10s05ot0b38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) When I joined the Army, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. **I bring something unique to this race, Friend.** I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I _know_ what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country.
**I’ve seen first-hand what freedom**** _truly_****costs – and that’s something that can’t be bought.** [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsrd66tem7e7n0b5jo4a1t3njtbtbcqtks09sq9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis. [**SEND MARJORIE ON HER NEXT MISSION**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl4niujv3ijvbb9nejmi8mcspd4a7r7iph99a18g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) I’ve stood by my husband and supported his military career while also working in the private and non-profit sector, all with their own unique challenges. All of these battles led me to this mission today. [**Now, I’m asking for your help in allowing me to serve once again, this time as North Carolina’s next senator.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zik2j6hnmnr8b0cn7uamulge04g8belu4j48vp6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) [**JOIN THE MISSION: CHIP IN $100**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z09cadbs7fcnlq7egldudaidnji3eim1j5l2bup0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) [**JOIN THE MISSION: CHIP IN $75**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj9gd3mi9fpjcesbguehk0an7tiivjei52u6f67o_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) [**JOIN THE MISSION: CHIP IN $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb6432nmnr59kqpegn026l6t3koauhn50je6tjs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) [**JOIN THE MISSION: CHIP IN $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9jmceic7sbramk33gjuu4u8c3cq75imibd37llg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) [**JOIN THE MISSION: CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zimihcvhcdppodtv6sanc9fjc74k951l49kp0iuo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) Our nation’s best days are ahead of us as long as our leaders are battle-tested and answer to the American people. clean_body: Career politicians want us to believe they’re the ones responsible for keeping America safe and protecting our freedoms. L Friend, Career politicians want us to believe they’re the ones responsible for keeping America safe and protecting our freedoms. Let’s set the record straight. That credit belongs to our men and women in uniform who make unimaginable sacrifices to serve and defend our country every. single. day. Here’s what career politicians ARE responsible for, though: The inflation wrecking our economy The disastrous and deadly withdrawal from Afghanistan The chaos at our southern border My name is Marjorie K. Eastman. I’m a veteran, military spouse, mother, and business leader – and I’m running to represent North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. Career politicians got our country into this mess and they have no idea how to get us out. While I was on the frontlines in Afghanistan, the career politicians I’m running against were attending fundraisers, shipping jobs overseas, and getting rich off your taxpayer dollars. They spent their careers going after you , your livelihood, and your freedom. Now, these same career politicians are attacking me because they’re terrified of losing** theirjobs. Friend, I’m the ONLY combat veteran and political outsider in this race. I haven’t spent decades raising money and taking donations from super PACs, which puts me at a fundraising disadvantage. When I joined the Army, I took an oath to protect and defend those freedoms. That’s what I’ve always done – and will continue to do in the U.S. Senate. I bring something unique to this race, Friend. I’m the only combat veteran and conservative outsider. I know what it means to go to war, to put your life on the line for your country. I’ve seen first-hand what freedom trulycosts – and that’s something that can’t be bought. In the days and weeks after 9/11, I was like so many other Americans. I felt compelled to serve my country, and I have – through 10 years of intelligence service and two deployments. When I returned home, I faced a personal battle: my son was diagnosed with cancer. I quickly transitioned back into mom mode. My husband and I prayed every day, and eventually, my son beat his diagnosis. I’ve stood by my husband and supported his military career while also working in the private and non-profit sector, all with their own unique challenges. All of these battles led me to this mission today. Our nation’s best days are ahead of us as long as our leaders are battle-tested and answer to the American people. Thank you, Marjorie K. name: Capt. Hung Cao
subject: I can’t believe Biden did this to our soldiers
body:
In my lifetime, I’ve seen Presidents with all sorts of beliefs and agendas, but I never thought I’d see a Commander in Chief
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1j907rjb04dnjl5a2hafrg69558mcb5s6r7eggg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf8dpgs4pb4p1kehrrbd1jelgrcoln6tj3cd9mm4p76cj46jjjcotkmqpbap33eurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6cc9n6kr3fclicoq61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc3kim6e16sbqmim242u7c2oneuu8b8u48jeaq00_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) Fellow Patriot, In my lifetime, I’ve seen Presidents with all sorts of beliefs and agendas, but I _never_ thought I’d see a Commander in Chief who disrespects our military as much as Joe Biden.

**[He’s kicking out brave Servicemembers just because they refuse to take the COVID vaccine. Some will not even receive their benefits after YEARS of service to our country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4b60e4eapbnqacr6dmuq9mbd63f2lgsmiqv544g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs)**
_As a U.S. Navy combat veteran, I’m absolutely horrified._

**This is NOT how America treats our heroes. I won’t stand for it,[and that’s why I’m going to Congress to stop this madness.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf17o7ksu86iih6bfrv59q9s4e0kjn0joasa1elo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs)** [**< < JOIN IN THE FIGHT >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z70fm1rbd3m9c5rr5r9bu19e23amcgib4k6eentg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdgecoj2c1h2bs) _And as if it couldn’t get any worse, our enemies are getting stronger every day while our troops are being slapped in the face._

Between Russia’s invasion of Ukraine and China’s threats to Taiwan, our enemies know they have a golden opportunity to act because of Joe Biden’s extreme weakness.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Standing up for life
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9679%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=afdhp7JeEEriSC6NEOKGdA&sysid=1)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten--or ignored--some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25953%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nJLgzwQ7PHJD8aMA7GLp0Q&sysid=1)[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25954%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2ffeU5UlTueRaAdDhsSa4Mw&sysid=1)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25965%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=by6i2hfM6cL5gt18gJvmNQ&sysid=1) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c25966%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SURuH%2bud3r6BPoEKLeqx1Q&sysid=1) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9679%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=afdhp7JeEEriSC6NEOKGdA&sysid=1)

name: Owen (Team Matt & Cynthia)
subject: Getting started
body:
My name is Owen Elrifi and I’m Matt and Cynthia’s new Field Director! We've sent you a lot of emails talking about why we need money, but this one's a little different | | | Hi Friend, My name is Owen Elrifi and I’m Matt and Cynthia’s new Field Director! We've sent you a lot of emails talking about why we need money, but this one's a little different. When it comes down to it, there are two big things that win elections: _money_ and _people_. A Field Director’s job is to make sure our campaign is reaching out directly to as many _people_ as we possibly can to spread the word about about this incredible movement for a $19-an-hour Living Wage, a Green New Deal, Housing Justice, and universal healthcare in Rhode Island. This is especially important this election; there’s a crowded field for Governor, and we know that big corporations and their wealthy executives are lined up to fund our opponents and protect the status quo. **That's why we are****building a grassroots movement of Rhode Islanders to take on the establishment and fight for bold, progressive change.** As I mentioned, we've already sent plenty of emails about why donations are important to the campaign, and if you're able to give, [we definitely appreciate any donation you can make](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yVYYsIDNX1DfXh1F5jUPC7xtxeUJG1-8poUAL7bLgtZ6yno2Wq06BzeCbGkc2z5wdpmHctUUO7kRgzJzTPI_uunfvG3HMLV_fJTZl7817A7Nazw9sbQt3wyVq43yLbSiwdvYsUiRrCGdDuSoLZjKissuGMXRHtqjECY_MBhcsdNQZ3Fbh_32iQZ8ilD11HOLioEpSneaPeMHl9V6odDYt8dlPxJFt9utVykLyHYYzkodBbL-GyX6t-UE__d41vHs_BKegxx5clmff5cKuYMU9W3V5jvNPF0bMDeSfVW5tbpQ/3k5/affFtXb6ROK9yRJ6g1F81w/h0/XXB0IwuZKQsbi-yR9TC-0Q7TIEC7gI5PKk0iJbwTHz8). But today I am asking you to join us in talking to voters about the importance of supporting Matt and Cynthia and building a government that works fro everybody. Over the course of this campaign we're going recruit hundreds of volunteers, knock tens of thousands of doors, and call as many people as we possibly can to have conversations about why Matt and Cynthia should be our next Governor and Lt. Governor. That's all starting in the next few weeks! [**_So Friend, I'm asking you – Can I count on you to sign up to join our volunteer team today?_****__**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn2H0La_yXIpyATgV_97-8cqQpqE7g234OvFlh5VPI-jfZ-_lcYsBmj-0jsmwuxrSr0GeYkVDc2BRQXIsNK2vZVh4r8BjEABwsyWIfyd9jJPGO0gCHNHzO4NBE518BBN45BIMkQp5pGUA9S6JvWw1YAJaZRdHV9RF4FalQI0mEC94eNHbBYz6zZZWH1KTlbho6BabquKWcds4KQ_A4WQ3uOG7wVsF6jnyDwH1b8GRORiQ/3k5/affFtXb6ROK9yRJ6g1F81w/h1/gfRAe5N7h2HzySfjjfK8Qb_5L6KLZdQN0q6OEdtEGUM)[****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn2H0La_yXIpyATgV_97-8cqQpqE7g234OvFlh5VPI-jfZ-_lcYsBmj-0jsmwuxrSr0GeYkVDc2BRQXIsNK2vZVE2MjuvH-KudWoiyV9LuKueZ9y6sg5m2Kiz46kjwuiZ9O5aaBY6V6ttdn60-0uhTOHYBPKfLTguvY2FdjK3OCWGv-vDaE4MPRRwmWQHKbRDZffl0P0zg4agMj9zam4QeiM-tFVXR4iezyhsS0N5VH9A/3k5/affFtXb6ROK9yRJ6g1F81w/h2/MVgeAkpVNA33mm72QF1VHeglvM36BvlnWn8HLhTTp4Y) | | [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn2H0La_yXIpyATgV_97-8cqQpqE7g234OvFlh5VPI-jfZ-_lcYsBmj-0jsmwuxrSoHGhDo2s0-tFoTQihgWAsgZxtZnajPBLgI729bnlUIFm3LZoJLoozDwIeof8IICiti3rof6cYzRUCxCWuX8XsKcUgUOQHH0wFcmrSkLOk03kDugO1QX5OH4W8RrwETln_gk29MMCCOone1mqRRkAV7Cjcyqwi9Twup-yy_hehjKA/3k5/affFtXb6ROK9yRJ6g1F81w/h3/qUUlI3Eg2fXftWGXfkNdwc-3AOrCWGtsAv1Lf0Dv11M)
---
[****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn2H0La_yXIpyATgV_97-8cqQpqE7g234OvFlh5VPI-jfZ-_lcYsBmj-0jsmwuxrSr0GeYkVDc2BRQXIsNK2vZVbTp3Xox73fNUHFZ91Oae284fEcyFcMcnabx8s3mmAQOi9ct0sPnyQGT5o32Wn_WlXyzQ0Jkwhkoyhk96OCEQV6ZXYLz7C8kff1uTFnN-OyY-dDGd6iP05yFmfodrS3ps-2vJZyvfXeMJxc9ZMSi1wQ/3k5/affFtXb6ROK9yRJ6g1F81w/h4/zcu1ZVjyigBuqDhoVrI8y8lbxcS3JMTjuJmiZ-DZ-PA)
The people who sign up now will play a crucial role in helping us lay the groundwork for when we are trying to knock as many doors as possible over the summer. It all starts right now and [**_it takes less than 1 minute to fill out our volunteer intake form – will you join the movement?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn2H0La_yXIpyATgV_97-8cqQpqE7g234OvFlh5VPI-jfZ-_lcYsBmj-0jsmwuxrSr0GeYkVDc2BRQXIsNK2vZVNdlTFGZ4ggY9jf8NfQxtJKIsNTJ83OtABZ4VBtFyIaL-6-ipnRwpPrm9SbDJ1tX338_agBP3NqumYbz2UxmiPA4kc8jR6T6cy5XX0-XbraKL-U6gMwFe6GD_239TqNBmFmMidC5yNvh4vKiIHmazTg/3k5/affFtXb6ROK9yRJ6g1F81w/h5/8E8zcG5KpdT05ULvYrF_xyzr-W959sp3MTLJUgtShLw)
I’ll reach back out soon – we’d love to have you join us, and we can’t do this without you. It’s nice to meet you, and I hope I’ll get a chance to see you soon at an event or a canvass!
Solidarity Forever,
Owen

clean_body: My name is Owen Elrifi and I’m Matt and Cynthia’s new Field Director! We've sent you a lot of emails talking about why we need money, but this one's a little different | | | Hi Friend, My name is Owen Elrifi and I’m Matt and Cynthia’s new Field Director! We've sent you a lot of emails talking about why we need money, but this one's a little different. When it comes down to it, there are two big things that win elections: money and people. A Field Director’s job is to make sure our campaign is reaching out directly to as many people as we possibly can to spread the word about about this incredible movement for a $19-an-hour Living Wage, a Green New Deal, Housing Justice, and universal healthcare in Rhode Island. This is especially important this election; there’s a crowded field for Governor, and we know that big corporations and their wealthy executives are lined up to fund our opponents and protect the status quo. That's why we arebuilding a grassroots movement of Rhode Islanders to take on the establishment and fight for bold, progressive change. As I mentioned, we've already sent plenty of emails about why donations are important to the campaign, and if you're able to give, . But today I am asking you to join us in talking to voters about the importance of supporting Matt and Cynthia and building a government that works fro everybody. Over the course of this campaign we're going recruit hundreds of volunteers, knock tens of thousands of doors, and call as many people as we possibly can to have conversations about why Matt and Cynthia should be our next Governor and Lt. Governor. That's all starting in the next few weeks! | | The people who sign up now will play a crucial role in helping us lay the groundwork for when we are trying to knock as many doors as possible over the summer. It all starts right now and I’ll reach back out soon – we’d love to have you join us, and we can’t do this without you. It’s nice to meet you, and I hope I’ll get a chance to see you soon at an event or a canvass! Solidarity Forever, Owen | | Sent via . Along with taking one step closer to the ballot box, March is Women’s History Month. In February of 1980, former president Jimmy Carte

# Women's History Month
---
| | [](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/53Nzax4BO/c?w=1kjnCouGx2Zh8jLKVa74CUdkf8zXuG169KhXR4XL1qM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9icmVudGhlbm5yaWNoLmNvbSIsInIiOiJmMjM0ZmI1MC0zZjI1LTQzODgtMGRjOC1iMDFjYWRiMDI2NzIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)

| | Along with taking one step closer to the ballot box, March is Women’s History Month. In February of 1980, former president Jimmy Carter, in his Presidential Proclamation declaring the week of March 8th to be Women’s History week, stated, “Too often the women were unsung and sometimes their contributions went unnoticed. But the achievements, leadership, courage, strength and love of the women who built America was as vital as that of the men whose names we know so well,"“Understanding the true history of our country will help us to comprehend the need for full equality under the law for all our people. This goal can be achieved by ratifying the 27th amendment to United States Constitution: "Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of sex." [Source](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/53Nzax4BO/c?w=0ddOwcLESvhikqoh5qk41Dg4rLvvo0j9Jl8ra36XZmE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJlc2lkZW5jeS51Y3NiLmVkdS9kb2N1bWVudHMvc3RhdGVtZW50LXRoZS1wcmVzaWRlbnQtbmF0aW9uYWwtd29tZW5zLWhpc3Rvcnktd2VlayIsInIiOiI4NDk4NDhmYi03MDkyLTQ1YTUtMWVkZi1kNmY2Y2VmZWY2MmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| |
---
| | That “27th Amendment” which the former president referred to would have been the Equal Rights Amendment; passed in 1972 but still not ratified to this day. From the battlefield to the home, in factories and in government, in technology and medicine; women have been not just participants but leaders and innovators. They have contributed so much to our country and the world and too often without recognition or even acknowledgement of their names. The history of women is not just the history of the United States but is also a basic human right; to be known and understood completely but denied to so many women of our past and even present. If you’d like to learn more about the unspoken contributions and heroism of women,[ click here.](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/53Nzax4BO/c?w=YRsW9RXIlnY4pJxAT3JuizW2cgvi1GEN64CdS_BPtIU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93b21lbnNoaXN0b3J5bW9udGguZ292L2V4aGliaXRzLWFuZC1jb2xsZWN0aW9ucyIsInIiOiJiYTJiMWMwZC03MmEzLTRiZGQtMWEwYi01NWViZTM5Y2JjMzAiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ)
---
| |
---
| I want to represent WA-03 to:
* Defend your rights as [working people](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/53Nzax4BO/c?w=2jRbvKaAwQrjzL-z5yKSE82-9NLbLY5FjpCV4k6w7Ag.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zaG91dG91dC53aXguY29tL3NvLzk4Tmt1NWM4Zj9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiZzdGF0dXM9RHJhZnQmY2lkPTAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDAtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMCMvbWFpbiIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ) and families.
* Aim for the [healthcare we all deserve](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/53Nzax4BO/c?w=q1fuv7cPhUY9ZKR6fZerDy1Ex7buX_d29X1QZcXPj9g.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vaGVhbHRoY2FyZSIsInIiOiIzZmY0NjQ3MC0xYWVmLTRmZWQtMjZhOS0zNTQ0NGJlN2Q5MDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiJlNDY5NDE2YS0xYWYxLTQ0MzYtODlmMC1kOTMyMjMxM2RkMWEifQ), written into law.
* Protect a [woman's bodily autonomy](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/53Nzax4BO/c?w=VNlQ6fOcJ7XAAgABmFwmJIAQxNFhNPo17-2ptcb3lUY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3dhMDMiLCJyIjoiM2ZmNDY0NzAtMWFlZi00ZmVkLTI2YTktMzU0NDRiZTdkOTAyIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiZTQ2OTQxNmEtMWFmMS00NDM2LTg5ZjAtZDkzMjIzMTNkZDFhIn0) with protected reproductive care, written into law.
* Securing our [education system with the teaching](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/53Nzax4BO/c?w=vdUUNtFF3zkJWXRJIQ43IUihn5LhvXrluVPUHuruHoM.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlbnRoZW5ucmljaC5jb20vZWR1Y2F0aW9uIiwiciI6IjNmZjQ2NDcwLTFhZWYtNGZlZC0yNmE5LTM1NDQ0YmU3ZDkwMiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImU0Njk0MTZhLTFhZjEtNDQzNi04OWYwLWQ5MzIyMzEzZGQxYSJ9) of facts, good or bad.

body:
The U.S. Senate doesn’t just need more fighters, it needs new leadership...
| [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5a433dbcfc2543dc8d17fbfec19dae9f&_m=f296c54061b44e9ca8614a7f7d4267c7&_e=xsrmiCUSxvXd1cRl75P0Sj6mdWYT4bap0_c4cIiBdnodtYbzbCE4YJgHuJLm17UVv92ZJnQGxbRXbpjEcsh1AnCiVyfNyBeax0tdAoF_bb5ibypycQjR14rlrvbBq7Nxefkt_aIJdgDcLHeXhkPNSiIXFePwYBiBcarmy54L-fOJnCt5yuCm4C9U7J4XjuwWcX-tw_B66Ea0kRi6XB5rnq-inj0HydfeW2f-KAVTCGu47bEBJNt7RWu9z4-ZnA56V-RcTPpsGg03dvm_etRvpph3XBPqzDaL5QO7Tx-pdosgpIjTbcpbRueCAxEsvDQnpGXgnzwTzxpyLBW4IGiHCUZK8ChIIiqpRKNcMvNp2c4IeCzAjkI8nxg9Np-zRi1TZbZVAq11B7-uhwLxOhQaJR4gb6sJsQcSezdH8iP9DA1Dk2yFVs-i47N7EzKJxHgEFqDbd6iAIVwYl88aEFrMYnJTD0LOZGp8B7CaPQz9vorZbSIYMu3H5F0XsSN32RPaVP-AWvKHnMnvQadn5CscLKE0vE7fKZD5cwRIBg1zb_8%3D)
---
Peter,
---

clean_body: The U.S. Senate doesn’t just need more fighters, it needs new leadership... | Peter, President Trump has not forgotten that I was the FIRST candidate in the entire country to say that when I'm elected to the Senate, I will NOT vote for Mitch McConnell as leader. When we flip the 50-50 Senate from Kamala's control, we can't become complacent like the spineless RINOs of the establishment. We MUST rebuild our new Republican majority into a TRUE pro-Trump Senate. When it mattered most, Mitch McConnell abandoned President Trump and the America First agenda. But 2022 is the year we hold these RINOs accountable for their failures. That’s why I’m not just speaking out, I’m taking action. I even produced a brand-new ad to pressure other Republican Senators to join us in changing the guard and leaving the old RINOs behind. But I know that just as they’ve always done, the establishment will scratch and claw to hold onto their power and keep President Trump at bay. That’s why it’s so important that every grassroots conservative joins our ranks, so that no amount of swamp money can stop us from building the America First Senate majority President Trump deserves. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I wanted you to hear it from me first
body:
Derek - I have an urgent update, and I wanted you to hear it from me first:
1. NBC News reports that Georgia is the most important swing state in the November elections, which means Senate control could be decided by our race.
2. Donald Trump just held a megadonor fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago with my potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R), so they can flood this race with MILLIONS to defeat me.
3. Our people-powered movement is falling short of the resources we need to fight back. If we don't see an immediate surge of grassroots support , we could be outraised and outspent right before our first official FEC deadline of the election year.
Everything we've been fighting for – from voting rights to climate justice – is on the line in Georgia. With the latest polls showing me 1 POINT BEHIND Walker, we can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal – so I'm counting on you to help us close our budget gap now:
Please, Derek, will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and CommonGood– as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – so we can pull ahead, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220307_CGVA_Warnock]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220307_CGVA_Warnock&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220307_CGVA_Warnock&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220307_CGVA_Warnock&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220307_CGVA_Warnock&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220307_CGVA_Warnock&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_rw?refcode=20220307_CGVA_Warnock]
I appreciate you, Derek – thank you.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/75387d74-329e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110/23fde433-539e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2ZkZTQzMy01MzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fyCXt4E2L16vJLxr3zd-hpBieheH09WulvzYwv3RpYM=&id=108609855 .

Everything we've been fighting for – from voting rights to climate justice – is on the line in Georgia. With the latest polls showing me 1 POINT BEHIND Walker, we can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal – so I'm counting on you to help us close our budget gap now: Please, Derek, will you split a donation of $25 or more right now between my campaign and CommonGood– as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – so we can pull ahead, win in Georgia, and keep the Senate blue? [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Donate ANY [] I appreciate you, Derek – thank you. – Rev. Raphael Warnock (This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)
