name: Team Jazz
subject: Will you stand up for voting rights?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
body:
Together, we’re building a movement to meet the moment we’re in as a nation. Jazz believes that if Democrats pull together, we can move towards a more just and equitable society and transform our country.
We've come a long way since this day in 1965 when then 25-year-old activist John Lewis led over 600 civil rights marchers across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in the struggle to win voting rights for Black Americans. Alabama State Troopers attacked these peaceful protesters, cracking Lewis' skull. The television footage from this horrific event galvanized the American people, and soon the 1965 Voting Rights Act became law.
But right now, extremist Republican politicians are doing all they can to roll back voting rights in states across the country and block progress at the federal level. Congress must ensure that ALL Americans can participate in the electoral process.
It's past time for the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the For the People Act to become law. On this anniversary, let's honor those who shed blood for civil rights by recommitting to the fight for voting rights. Please, will you join Jazz in taking action? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qNqsOAias0-0N10Q7kTrWA2?contactdata=j3tedojXWKIwk92o%2BQ2X73mezSeMCb6yv3xRf1Cg6vqbhi7fwgVWlMG0tgNtU9snKzRizF0Jste9B80cftspEXLFvRZsyU9x%2BPo30bRzoVOdsx6I63V1HpUOLCu6CighJhyWyeF70Piicr4KCneUWbPWVQN9mw45xUOraMvZ3%2F4%3D&refcode2=body_link1]
Yes, I'll fight for voting rights » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Jazz and his fellow Democrats have accomplished much in the Maryland House of Delegates to protect our hard-won voting rights. But he knows that we must come together to protect the right to vote nationwide by taking federal action, including re-enfranchising formerly incarcerated Americans.
If you’re with us, please join us in recommitting to the fight to protect and expand voting rights nationwide by adding your name here. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/qNqsOAias0-0N10Q7kTrWA2?contactdata=j3tedojXWKIwk92o%2BQ2X73mezSeMCb6yv3xRf1Cg6vqbhi7fwgVWlMG0tgNtU9snKzRizF0Jste9B80cftspEXLFvRZsyU9x%2BPo30bRzoVOdsx6I63V1HpUOLCu6CighJhyWyeF70Piicr4KCneUWbPWVQN9mw45xUOraMvZ3%2F4%3D&refcode2=body_link2]
Together, we can move mountains,
Team Jazz
Jazz Lewis [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88468/images/Jazz-Lewis-Portrait.png]
Jazz Lewis is an effective progressive leader running for the Democratic nomination in Maryland’s 4th Congressional District. A champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to health care access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Chair of the Maryland House Democratic Caucus. Jazz would be the youngest African-American ever elected to represent Maryland in Congress. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2022_lewis_march?amount=&refcode2=biobox_btn]
Paid for by Friends of Jazz Lewis
Friends of Jazz Lewis
P.O. Box 7449
Largo, MD 20792
United States

name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: BREAKING: My Plan for Nebraska's Businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S
body:
| | | | A New Generation of Leadership for Nebraska's Businesses
---
[](www.votelindstrom.com)
---
Friends,
Today, I am pleased to announce my plan for Economic Development and Job Creation in Nebraska.
The path to economic growth is through a limited and nimble government that controls spending, promotes growth, and does not overburden its citizens with taxes and regulations. The best way to create jobs and to grow the economy is to let our citizens and small business owners do what they do best – innovate, invest, and thrive.
It’s time to strengthen our communities and our main streets, to develop a diverse and talented workforce, and to reform government interaction with Nebraska’s citizens and businesses. It’s time to ensure that **OUR** state is the best place for generations to come, for **ALL** Nebraska. [You can read my full plan here.](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsB99iwOm85Mf39RwLA6k09GMebH-2FszYYpTRcONBm1-2BCATKHj4z4JWOByua1AQf7JT1i5n0uwBTf7CkGOGboEUjq-2BMdyGInEJh9HHAtOlgQm7E98YfSrAbrw0hjgQ6hElL-2FaOXe7yz6-2FWkhfDuoQRsot0lh2C8RywwsMJmCMWqYm-2BN_bD_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6gk2VunLOsvQrpJHdOw6Y8L3mCSZtjnmsdCqH4yTEbQQfHgmG8q8F8Pq3KoxjctkPGzqmJRXtGpgKjyedJTg0DH3IthUTmQQfcW9Bc8kK3qDqqODNSZyjYLDBmyj-2B6CcSmQa1DZipbIZhKytu4KltoNm4Eu3FKo3lRJ2Y19Jz6evUOWdzRsvxGbSh-2FvQIpNexb5WonfBrMNpkxYFqkb1-2BIdbtG0rbfEGx-2FryDmH0wPM3Y1UEq06lcLChxG-2F9YIzUoQaGjWFkhOJz80r3H-2FdESeBjYUzVU0qk3l6sKTScgQHBLl2HC5sz7G-2F-2FfRKoe7aEvvdTrws3SuBKyV1eSCsCgBJviVI69dLPVBsqWtlqer85u1mxWZLhaM-2F7urVySWrY-2F3MZz690B2PYURsP9QHGZPLbGgmuc5mPlY0E7sm-2B71un9ps00-2BNqS8NWqzZWu8p4hFwrDbeXIuiXvVKhA1YxIiNWEQ48r4e6ohiIOjrdtnUdUiMd1nLOqiaNim0mMOXqeTpK1Ii19C4F2llI0hgvStKuccMfB3PXBlpl4Ee4XNYdQSpKySjv1rb9HJI0fXA3bR2RTNx3CbpsWnTLR0coDf6GJyH4-2FDj2NGWjpouccpubhXNvQfPe6AMxHZeGGWClFglUzxHI0anUT-2Fy1spVHoFCSebUN692gbaL8ejpwrWBkycGp4nKetsHV-2BOEYYTh2PYDEou0aZuQy8QQSvDBsFMr7JyFcZ7HEfSamQjelgjUIFDvxCPkOsFd3Wnup4UKMRtb4kyyDtJnbLNMMDOwhksg-2FNTOwhScyyHSkbHnJrsGdQxFh84X12oNgGjgab9Sc-2B)

My choice for Lieutenant Governor, Dave Rippe, and I are uniquely qualified to implement our plan and bring a New Generation of Leadership. Together we bring a dynamic team with the experience needed in the legislature, in private business, and in leading the Nebraska Department of Economic Development. We are ready. Day one.
The time is NOW to invest to grow our businesses, our communities, and our state. **It’s time to lead based on what we can and will do, not what we can’t or won’t do.** It is time for a New Generation of Leadership - one that’s focused on growth and investing in the future of our state and our people.
Always fighting for you,
Brett

clean_body: | | | | A New Generation of Leadership for Nebraska's Businesses www.votelindstrom.com Friends, Today, I am pleased to announce my plan for Economic Development and Job Creation in Nebraska. The path to economic growth is through a limited and nimble government that controls spending, promotes growth, and does not overburden its citizens with taxes and regulations. The best way to create jobs and to grow the economy is to let our citizens and small business owners do what they do best – innovate, invest, and thrive. It’s time to strengthen our communities and our main streets, to develop a diverse and talented workforce, and to reform government interaction with Nebraska’s citizens and businesses. It’s time to ensure that OUR state is the best place for generations to come, for ALL Nebraska. My choice for Lieutenant Governor, Dave Rippe, and I are uniquely qualified to implement our plan and bring a New Generation of Leadership. Together we bring a dynamic team with the experience needed in the legislature, in private business, and in leading the Nebraska Department of Economic Development. We are ready. Day one. The time is NOW to invest to grow our businesses, our communities, and our state. It’s time to lead based on what we can and will do, not what we can’t or won’t do. It is time for a New Generation of Leadership - one that’s focused on growth and investing in the future of our state and our people. Always fighting for you, Brett | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S. 130th Cir, Omaha, NE 68144

name: BREAKING NEWS from Team Tom
subject: IBEW Local 26: Tom stands out as a "'Champion of Labor.'"
body:
This morning, the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 26 became the latest union to endorse Tom and Shannon!
#

Team,

This morning, the International Brotherhood of Electrical Workers (IBEW) Local 26 became the latest union to endorse Tom and Shannon – together, **these union endorsements represent over 100,000 Maryland households!**

Unions like IBEW continue to support Tom and Shannon because they know a Perez-Sneed administration will keep the lights on for Maryland families (pun intended) and keep fighting for good-paying union jobs, equal justice, and equal opportunity.

**Now, we need to make sure everyone else in Maryland knows it, too – and that's where you come in. Tom and Shannon are counting on your grassroots support to make critical investments in voter outreach, communications, and advertising leading up to the primary.

_[Our ability to get the word out about Tom's plans to support union workers and pave a pathway to the middle class depends on how much we can raise right now. Team, Tom's fought for working families his entire career and will continue to do so as Governor of Maryland, but don't just take our word for it.
**IBEW said it best: "_Tom Perez fought for Union electricians on the Montgomery County Council, as Maryland Secretary of Labor, and as U.S. Secretary of Labor.[He] is a staunch supporter of creating middle class careers and stands out as a 'Champion of Labor.'_"**
Champion is exactly right. Throughout Tom's career in public service, he's fought on behalf of working families to:
* **Implement** the nation's first living wage law,
* **Fight** corporate wage theft,
* **Protect** homeowners from foreclosure and fraud,
* **Advocate** for paid sick and family leave,
* **Create** 125,000+ apprenticeship opportunities as US Labor Secretary, and
* **Help** Verizon retail workers secure protections and benefits following a 37,000 person strike.

**No one in this race is more dedicated or more prepared to bring good-paying jobs to Maryland and fight for working families than Tom.

_[Marylanders need Tom and Shannon in Annapolis to finally prioritize jobs, justice, and opportunity for ALL. Chip in now to make sure they have the resources needed to WIN>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42692658/333932025/352681309?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220307-IBEW26-ND&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWZlYTFiZS01NjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-_rZe2CrLubOa0OZbJAixwMfYaiUAL8sdlGxMm_ZOQE=)_**

Thank you,

Team Tom

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Time is running out to act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42692741/333932566/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzI5ZDQ3MS01NzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hr340Neg-GgbXZy8C3n48_cFUjqrshCf5ojVa51j4UE=&emci=10ecf152-3a9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8329d471-579e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=12898431)
---
Friend,
The stakes for bold climate solutions have never been higher.
**Right now, fossil fuel companies and Republican-led states are challenging the EPA’s authority, and have taken their fight all the way to the Supreme Court.** If they win, it will be a serious blow to our country's fight against climate change.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42692742/333932567/416963966?refcode=X_030722_Issues_Climatechange&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzI5ZDQ3MS01NzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hr340Neg-GgbXZy8C3n48_cFUjqrshCf5ojVa51j4UE=)
---
**Despite what Republicans and Big Oil want you to believe,_we cannot afford to ignore the science behind climate change._**
It is critical that Congress does everything in its power to meet this moment and pursue bold clean transportation and infrastructure investments, reduce the carbon pollution driving the climate crisis, ensure environmental justice, and provide good-paying jobs for our communities.
Friend, throughout my career, I've made it a point to stand up and fight for policies that address climate change and key issues affecting our environment and I will continue to do so in Congress.
I hope you will support me in my fight.
Thank you,
Kirsten
---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42692743/333932568/416963966?refcode=X_030722_Issues_Climatechange&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzI5ZDQ3MS01NzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hr340Neg-GgbXZy8C3n48_cFUjqrshCf5ojVa51j4UE=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42692744/333932569/416963966?refcode=X_030722_Issues_Climatechange&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzI5ZDQ3MS01NzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hr340Neg-GgbXZy8C3n48_cFUjqrshCf5ojVa51j4UE=)

name: Mississippi Freedom Caucus
subject: Do not give governmental power to an unelected board?
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAwODEwMDk3NjUxNjIwMTAxJmM9cTNnMiZlPTAmYj05MzU0ODUxNjAmZD1kOGM1aDRk.GQW8x1-GQxeV-RYuRNHyowAxoFgK-52WfSStxeNXnaQ)
| | |

| [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xOTAwODEwMDk3NjUxNjIwMTAxJmM9cTNnMiZlPTAmYj05MzU0ODUxNjkmZD1mOHo0cjF4.CAmr3ay9QdrL6_MDxlVFX4z4WrL0skns7Vuiidg8Lm0)
---
---
| |
---
| RegionSmart Compact is dangerous and bad for Mississippi!
---
Mississippi Freedom Caucus
---
| |
---
| |
---
| March 7, 2022
---
Do not give governmental power to an unelected board?
Everyone believes in the basic principle of holding those we elect accountable for their actions. In a representative democracy elected men and women are empowered to make decisions, if they make bad decisions we end their political career by voting for someone else. Being re-elected is the holy grail of most elected officials and often the only thing that keeps them in line. But what would happen if the politicians could figure out a way to be insulated from their decisions, what if they could give their power to someone else who could be blamed for all bad decisions but would allow the politician to take credit for all popular decisions? That scheme would undermine the entire fabric of our political system. Mississippi Senate Bill 2716 – is attempting to do just that, by creating a “quasi-governmental” entity that assumes the powers usually reserved for government. This form of quasi-government is call “Regionalism”. _Regionalism is the practice of separate political subdivisions banding together to accomplish a cooperative goal._ It sounds benign and harmless until we dive deeper into how this concept is put into practice. On www.renewamerica.com writer Tom Deweese says, “Regionalism is the means to complete the final stage of taking our private property rights from us and firmly embed us in Communitarianism.” Currently politicians in Mississippi, Tennessee and Arkansas have proposed a compact between certain counties and cities in their states. This compact would be managed by a private organization called the RegionSmart Development District and Agency of the Greater Memphis Region (RegionSmart). This quasi-governmental agency will operate virtually autonomously. Because this organization is a privately held company local citizens will lose oversight and control of the tax dollars sent and collected by RegionSmart. Since RegionSmart is located in Tennessee the people of Mississippi lose access to decisions that are made. RegionSmart would not be bound by Mississippi open records laws or open meetings laws and could not be held accountable by the State Auditor. This means Mississippi tax dollars will flow into a Memphis, TN based company that does not answer to the people of Mississippi.

Friend, **Three months: that’s how long we have until the New Mexico primary election on June 7.** That means we only have three months left to travel the state, spread the word about our vision for New Mexico’s 2nd District, and build support for our campaign. At this stage in the race, costs for things like gas, events, advertisements, and organizers are adding up more and more. But if we’re going to replace far-right Republican Yvette Herrell in November, we have to keep the momentum going — we can’t stop now! name: Britt Digital HQ
subject: Ukraine: Biden’s fault?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
MISSING: response from dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, It’s no secret that Putin has a stranglehold on Europe’s and America’s oil needs, and that’s because Joe Biden has destroyed the United States’ energy independence. Since taking office, Biden:
* _Shut down the Keystone XL Pipeline, eliminating thousands of good American oil and gas jobs

_
* _Lifted sanctions on Russia’s Nord Stream 2 Pipeline, allowing the Kremlin control over Germany’s energy

_
* _Botched an evacuation from Afghanistan, cementing America’s image on the world stage as being WEAK_

**_The BEST way to defeat Russia and STOP their war efforts would be to open up American oil and gas resources and stop relying on foreign oil._** _Add your name if you agree!_ [**Support Energy Independence body:
Team – it seems that as we start to leave this pandemic behind us, we re-enter America’s epidemic of gun violence.
Just last year there were over 693 mass shootings in the United States. Enough is enough.
It’s time for Congress to take action, and pass legislation curbing the proliferation of guns across the country.
We want to hear from you though, friend. Do you agree that Congress should pass gun control legislation at once? Take our poll and let us know >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-poll-yes?amount=10&refcode=EM_POLL_030722_B2_AC_30D]

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Fighting for the lives of the unborn
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zig1a88u58kejjhvjdn2ded9b5aek4s811jgupm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge6o76c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4ttnm9h7ed5nm1ij6cri6cpb5dliehjr6c346spm4tbh6oon9cpjmtij5cblmurt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8r6cc9n6kpmfdr3coqe1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4bul8r4t7q7votm5ig88blgfbdi1snmud9ndfbg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge6o76c9h2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zhr1r11vgphjvdek5np0vl2sbbqnpm8corrhn960_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge6o76c9h2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zplv6uspc3lhquebdbg7agp46b7o23llqfqfo4bg_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge6o76c9h2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---

subject: FWD: Did you see the survey?

body:
Hi Peter, just following up here to make sure you saw the survey that Letitia sent out the other day.

Attorney General James is fighting hard to hold manipulative investors and predatory landlords accountable to ensure that every New Yorker has a safe, clean, and _affordable_ place to rest their head at night – but she can’t do this without your support.

**I’m meeting with Attorney General James in just a few hours, but we still need 39 more responses to our critical housing survey. Your input is invaluable to Letitia’s work, so please, will you take 60 seconds now to answer this quick survey?**

Here's the link: [**https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-housing**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42682676/333884061/-281991863?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=15&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk372-su-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTZmMjgwNy0zMTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bmd2QGRZnXWqXh-3LcC_U0HlIiA5lz5QfqTNQI3t1bY=&emci=dcd64c2e-169b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=896f2807-319e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=25369504) Thank you, Peter. David

**Peter, New York’s housing crisis is only getting worse – and communities of color are being hit the hardest.**

In a 2021 survey, a plurality of low-income Black New Yorkers ranked “affordable housing” to be their top priority. And the Bronx, a predominantly Black and Hispanic borough, now has the **_highest concentration of eviction cases in the state of New York._**
This is unacceptable. Every single person should have a right to housing that is both safe and affordable – but decades of discriminatory housing practices, the manipulative actions of private investors, and a multi-year battle with COVID-19 have taken this right away from millions of New Yorkers.

That’s why, as the People’s Lawyer, I’m fighting to secure fair access to affordable housing for all. I will not rest until every New Yorker has a safe, clean place to put their head at night – but I cannot win this fight alone. **I need to collect at least 2,500 responses before this survey closes at midnight tonight, and I still don’t know where you stand, Peter. Please, let me know:**
| | **Should everyone have access to affordable housing?**

clean_body: Hi Peter, just following up here to make sure you saw the survey that Letitia sent out the other day. Attorney General James is fighting hard to hold manipulative investors and predatory landlords accountable to ensure that every New Yorker has a safe, clean, and affordable place to rest their head at night – but she can’t do this without your support. I’m meeting with Attorney General James in just a few hours, but we still need 39 more responses to our critical housing survey. Your input is invaluable to Letitia’s work, so please, will you take 60 seconds now to answer this quick survey? Here's the link: Thank you, Peter. David \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Letitia James Date: Tue, Feb 22, 2022 Subject: Your take on New York’s housing crisis | | | = | | Should everyone have access to affordable housing? | | | | Peter, New York’s housing crisis is only getting worse – and communities of color are being hit the hardest. In a 2021 survey, a plurality of low-income Black New Yorkers ranked “affordable housing” to be their top priority. And the Bronx, a predominantly Black and Hispanic borough, now has the highest concentration of eviction cases in the state of New York. This is unacceptable. Every single person should have a right to housing that is both safe and affordable – but decades of discriminatory housing practices, the manipulative actions of private investors, and a multi-year battle with COVID-19 have taken this right away from millions of New Yorkers. That’s why, as the People’s Lawyer, I’m fighting to secure fair access to affordable housing for all. I will not rest until every New Yorker has a safe, clean place to put their head at night – but I cannot win this fight alone. I need to collect at least 2,500 responses before this survey closes at midnight tonight, and I still don’t know where you stand, Peter. Please, let me know: | | Should everyone have access to affordable housing? | | | | Thanks for making your voice heard, Letitia | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

| | I'm running for Congress in the new Sixth District because Oregonians deserve a leader who will work hard, day in and day out, to make their lives better. That is my mission, and it's resonating with people across the district and the state. People from all walks of life are showing up and supporting my campaign — and I hope I've earned your public support, too. **[Add your name to our public supporters list here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42693668/333936543/1477678953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzMyOTIyMy01YjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWTfRKQJRVuN-3VIS-Xr0dvaIFwMxFQ78urvkF1LE7c=&emci=a30fdfa9-209c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57329223-5b9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5643047)** [Endorse Andrea!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42693669/333936544/1477678953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzMyOTIyMy01YjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWTfRKQJRVuN-3VIS-Xr0dvaIFwMxFQ78urvkF1LE7c=&emci=a30fdfa9-209c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57329223-5b9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5643047) **I've received the endorsements of prominent organizations including the****Congressional Hispanic Caucus BOLD PAC, the League of Conservation Voters, and the Oregon Education Association PAC**. Several members of Congress have endorsed me, including Congresswoman **Suzanne Bonamici,** and dozens of state and local leaders. Their support means the world to me, and I hope I've earned yours too. I don't come from a lot of money, and I know firsthand that a better life for all of us is possible through hard work. **Throughout my career in public service, I have been dedicated to improving the lives of Oregonians** :
* Helped pass the most comprehensive reproductive freedom law in the country.
* Fought to raise the minimum wage and pass the nation's most progressive family leave bill.
* Championed a bill to address harassment in the workplace.
* Introduced and passed a bill that holds Big Pharma accountable.
* I have been a leader in the fight to decarbonize Oregon.
* I was the lead sponsor on the Farmworkers Overtime bill that's about to become law.

**[So will you endorse me?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42693670/333936545/1477678953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzMyOTIyMy01YjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWTfRKQJRVuN-3VIS-Xr0dvaIFwMxFQ78urvkF1LE7c=&emci=a30fdfa9-209c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57329223-5b9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5643047)** [Endorse Andrea!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42693671/333936546/1477678953?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzMyOTIyMy01YjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rWTfRKQJRVuN-3VIS-Xr0dvaIFwMxFQ78urvkF1LE7c=&emci=a30fdfa9-209c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=57329223-5b9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=5643047) Thank you! subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS]( "PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS")
body:
This victory is because of you

| | | | | [](https://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/JAKVfdNeXry1LbbOygbjLA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRkCLUCP0UgYzU2NWUyYmI3OWUzMGM2ZDNkY2RkNzVhOTAzYTU5MDBEQWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9mYWtlbmV3c3RydXRoLWNhdGNoVwVzcGNldUIKYh8CMCZijs3mT1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAGBc~)

| | TO THE GREAT AMERICANS OF THE 4th CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF TEXAS...

---
[](https://tracking.fallon4texas.com/f/a/JAKVfdNeXry1LbbOygbjLA~~/AAAHUQA~/RgRkCLUCP0UgYzU2NWUyYmI3OWUzMGM2ZDNkY2RkNzVhOTAzYTU5MDBEQWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vZmFsbG9uLWZvci1jb25ncmVzcy9mYWtlbmV3c3RydXRoLWNhdGNoVwVzcGNldUIKYh8CMCZijs3mT1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAGBc~)
---
THANK and YOU. Two words in the English language that when placed together form a wonderful phrase. One of the best we have. Showing gratitude to and for OTHERS. The noblest of acknowledgments. Susan, Thomas, Mac and myself are so deeply grateful to the wonderful patriots, nearly 70,000 strong who took the time to car their ballots and vote for the kind of representation they would like to see in the People’s House. It has been the greatest honor of my professional life to serve you in Congress.

The campaign was hard fought, as they are nowadays, and I’d have to say...I’m glad it’s over! Being candid, the best parts are meeting so many incredible Texans who are literally the best of us. People that care deeply about things greater than themselves. God, Country, Texas, Community, Family and Friends-all greater than we are as individuals-and there are tens of thousands of people in our blessed district. Worst parts? The spin, falsehoods and lies directed your way. But our system, while imperfect, is brilliant. The majority see through the dog and find the truth.

I am so incredibly humbled at our landslide victory. We won by nearly 30% and 20,000 votes in a 3-way field. We won all 12 counties with a clear majority and in the one county I have represented the longest, Denton, we received an astounding 79%!

After some much needed high quality family time it’s back into the fray and the fight on Monday. Let’s Secure the Border, End Vaccine Mandates, Ensure Election Integrity, Fiscal Sanity, Protect Innocent Life and the 2nd Amd and throw CRT into the trash where it belongs. When you limit government, you grow freedom! We must work together to FIRE Pelosi, STOP Biden and SAVE our country. I’m gonna need your help to accomplish all three!

Again (and we can never say this enough) THANK YOU!!

God bless you and God bless Texas,

**Pat Fallon**

clean_body: This victory is because of you | | | | | ~ | | TO THE GREAT AMERICANS OF THE 4th CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICT OF TEXAS... ~ THANK and YOU. Two words in the English language that when placed together form a wonderful phrase. One of the best we have. Showing gratitude to and for OTHERS. The noblest of acknowledgments. Susan, Thomas, Mac and myself are so deeply grateful to the wonderful patriots, nearly 70,000 strong who took the time to car their ballots and vote for the kind of representation they would like to see in the People’s House. It has been the greatest honor of my professional life to serve you in Congress. The campaign was hard fought, as they are nowadays, and I’d have to say...I’m glad it’s over! Being candid, the best parts are meeting so many incredible Texans who are literally the best of us. People that care deeply about things greater than themselves. God, Country, Texas, Community, Family and Friends-all greater than we are as individuals-and there are tens of thousands of people in our blessed district. Worst parts? The spin, falsehoods and lies directed your way. But our system, while imperfect, is brilliant. The majority see through the dog and find the truth. I am so incredibly humbled at our landslide victory. We won by nearly 30% and 20,000 votes in a 3-way field. We won all 12 counties with a clear majority and in the one county I have represented the longest, Denton, we received an astounding 79%! After some much needed high quality family time it’s back into the fray and the fight on Monday. Let’s Secure the Border, End Vaccine Mandates, Ensure Election Integrity, Fiscal Sanity, Protect Innocent Life and the 2nd Amd and throw CRT into the trash where it belongs. When you limit government, you grow freedom! We must work together to FIRE Pelosi, STOP Biden and SAVE our country. I’m gonna need your help to accomplish all three! Again (and we can never say this enough) THANK YOU!! God bless you and God bless Texas, Pat Fallon U.S. House of Representatives, TX-04 | | | | ---|--- | "PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS" | You received this email because you subscribed to our list. You can ~ at any time. PO BOX 614 CELINA TX 75009 United States of America ~

Peter,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for six months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

[](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=0f4d7e699e174e78b20fe252c440a08e&_e=6mZV4RREFLPVCQicsdUmz0-0HDrFOnEIoq9cVxEynVS4yieJ2fQDCPWu2kLd7lOnNCAuQlUxQ0kVQJ8gpWKufBFJ7fzZpynQwGB-CiNSS5vwOTAdtMeO3fkt7Rbyudb4sZ0mNF6vR4TlQCudScswIr2OezVPXz6TL0TROCznv2kWLt86KBiaSEmORYkh1a7cYn0P1yTDDu43U9O0ScsQU_prTFLKMaXZeu39nJlG_FWmWB7dvW4r-p91n-itHBkZgfz0kSagi50rtkro3Evz3gSkyPsJ6Q7SwpbcmUiYdMdYJeI7FWaMnBoqJtLrEaCVK8YTBdrPJjAK-iPh8rAdlAvYm3DGb_g9h0rz26qGaCPkwoiDMWhz3QUBQacXQ5FoQY1VZqNfVEiwFCoRzuk4Cn7MOthoZeKoi0CEk-6ZzymcXDv6TgdPA1sZgsgro0AfKtUIfL5vSAAzSunAx7q2v6WRRiUGNQFfi4zCXunyf4pbe-Jfr_kFX78Kn-VXp3HETx2ZAx6TCuMDu5soesfvdvDyze9aOcNMvMT148DjbQcSIJLUtjvZ0BB0Zl91nx31)
We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side.

I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. **_[So, I'm asking you to join our team today by offering your personal endorsement of our Senate campaign.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=0f4d7e699e174e78b20fe252c440a08e&_e=6mZV4RREFLPVCQicsdUmz0-0HDrFOnEIoq9cVxEynVS4yieJ2fQDCPWu2kLd7lOnNCAuQlUxQ0kVQJ8gpWKufBFJ7fzZpynQwGB-CiNSS5vwOTAdtMeO3fkt7Rbyudb4sZ0mNF6vR4TlQCudScswIr2OezVPXz6TL0TROCznv2kWLt86KBiaSEmORYkh1a7cYn0P1yTDDu43U9O0ScsQU_prTFLKMaXZeu39nJlG_FWmWB7dvW4r-p91n-itHBkZgfz0kSagi50rtkro3Evz3gSkyPsJ6Q7SwpbcmUiYdMdYJeI7FWaMnBoqJtLrEaCVK8YTBdrPJjAK-iPh8rAdlAvYm3DGb_g9h0rz26qGaCNuaneZyAtMKAqdrTXD00WzK3RmI1x7omUnpTQpfBP3WOCN3O7U_fKiV1AWr5SSp4nX5QO1Zk5M9eqAVklK0lEVPA0Sx_BEX6Mtm4ip5DL7A_PLIdzerf-OYEiK1b5dQC-FBIR85ulyxdBwTD2BF8r34la5oC08bdcuclD49dzTx9eiozsBZ7UjzYc3OzJjwOFsCdQYVpIVNZ7eXGYxUEjQ)_**

name: Val Demings
subject: 27 years of police service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida
| | |
---
Friend: This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.
I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because _ _ I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
**While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. **I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: [**Will you donate $5 or more to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42694185/333939174/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2584-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjdjZTQ2Yy01ZTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pc02jCb1SStfZn7mT30KUmaTqw5LkqGRJt2v6g8teL4=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42694186/333939175/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2584-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjdjZTQ2Yy01ZTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pc02jCb1SStfZn7mT30KUmaTqw5LkqGRJt2v6g8teL4=)
Back in 1983, **I was one of only three women in my police academy class**. But after years of hard work and dedication, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
My story doesn't stop there. When I was appointed chief of police, Orlando was in crisis. The murder rate was at an all-time high, but I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Standing with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department, we reduced violent crime by 40%.
To protect the city of Orlando, it took long, sleepless nights. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend long nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to health care and so much more.
I'll never stop fighting to protect and serve. If you're with me, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to flip Florida blue.

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42694187/333939176/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2584-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjdjZTQ2Yy01ZTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pc02jCb1SStfZn7mT30KUmaTqw5LkqGRJt2v6g8teL4=)**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Chief Val Demings

body:
| | | I'm in disbelief:

**Fox News has reported Republicans are FLEEING the Senate.**

\-- Ohio's Senator called it quits.
\-- Pennsylvania's Senator is out.
\-- North Carolina's Senator is retiring.
\-- Alabama's Senator is stepping down.
\-- And Missouri's Senator is leaving, too!

I cannot emphasize this enough:

We have a once-in-a-lifetime chance to HOLD the House, HOLD the Senate, and keep Democrats in power for another two years.
**
[ So I'm calling on 2,500 Democratic Members to step up before my midnight deadline to build on this momentum and prove that Democrats have what it takes to WIN. Can you chip in $3 or whatever you can to confirm your 2022 Democratic Membership before my 13-hour deadline expires and defend our House Majority??](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/XX_)**
| | _**2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER**_
---
**Name: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
** 2022 DEMOCRATIC MEMBER: PENDING
DEADLINE: 3/7/22, 11:59PM**
[Become a 2022 Democratic Member >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

I can't express how important donations from our Democratic Members are.

Republicans might have more cash in the bank than us, **but I know we 're on the right side of history.**

Every year, I count on our Democratic Members to power our fight to hold the House...

...and to ensure we can continue making progress on all of the issues that are most important to millions of Americans across the country --_**like health care, child care, the Build Back Better Act, Social Security, and our democracy.**_

I hope I can count on you.

name: Tim Ryan
subject: New poll shows Ohio Senate race in a dead heat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Republicans are working overtime to stop our momentum.
#
I have huge news, Peter. This race is a dead heat:
**Tim Ryan 37%**
**JD Vance 36%**
**[Contribute $10 now to Senator Durbin and myself to help us keep the lead, flip Ohio blue, and expand the Democratic Senate majority>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42683526/333888430/-1470358699?refcode=dd_em_220307_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjAyNWM3ZS0zNTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MsGsC2eFTCewxAwEae66zmucGFrEnrP09BOOtPxA0-M=)**
New polling shows that no matter the matchup, if the race for Ohio’s Senate seat were held today, the outcome would be within single digits. In fact, I'm leading Republican JD Vance by just one point.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Standing up for life
body:
I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of h
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze1ie6vumf3qlrpdmt94k0aerd2511m22dps5ai0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge1or2cjh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tb2cmqn2pth6prr5cjgc9hj4s5ge3gjaslimgrb5clh6sr67d1megq38t9h61oefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphh6sqj8ptie9j35c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqb0iupfv6jpu9qi76dooc13munqcd61kehdf4f0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge1or2cjh2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhniciss1gd907nipav1gc7ksgm1n6mf0i330d38_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge1or2cjh2bs) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfimvah45g97ova0l5gi2vmfi7f5nbtaasc8352g_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdge1or2cjh2bs) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Christian Collins
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTIAN COLLINS FOR CONGRESS
body:
I want to thank every volunteer, donor, endorser, and the thousands of voters that supported me.
| [ ](https://info.christiancollins.org/e3t/Btc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VW1Lcz2TGfyVW1NT3k74w-dxfW8fXtNV4Gm_5QN2z6H2k3q3npV1-WJV7CgBX5W4nxZ4K77LplBW9cy5Z23lXfGpW8jWdF_4rsRgZW7BWT026_7VtHW9j4KJQ3cJ1GhF6HP_RjXjyWW8Js5GQ8s8zrZW5XLg7K1nCHg9W7hBdr82yKFSdW6V03XM2n3974N6S1BW5Tj8xZW84GH8P2Cd2mZN9kJ786Rq0Q-W16GR6S47CgbRW4FFVZ-4YfXn9N7WVpbk8NVgJW1B3_Qb1FHZ2NN7gQF-MRrkYsW6S1ZZ38B5PL5W8b35CR7XQ27jW216fwq26KXWzW9lwBcf1Ltg1K33jK1)
---
Dear Friend, I want to thank every volunteer, donor, endorser, and the thousands of voters that supported me. I also want to congratulate all of those who won elected office. Regardless of the outcome this time, we aren’t finished fighting for Conservative values and Judeo-Christian principles. I’m excited for and optimistic about the future. I hope you will stay encouraged because there are many that ran for office and didn’t win their first round, but later went back and won Congress, Vice President, and even President of the United States. I count it a great privilege to serve the people of our district, and I stay accessible in working together with you. Keep us in your prayers as we consider our next steps; I look forward to working with you in the future.
---
Sincerely, Christian Collins
---

Jimmy Patronis, Chief Financial Officer for the Great State of Florida, has done a great job as CFO, where he also serves as the State’s Fire Marshall and as an important member of the Florida Cabinet. A fourth generation Floridian from the wonderful Panhandle, and owner of an iconic seafood restaurant, Jimmy has been a great friend to me and to MAGA.

Jimmy is a defender of the 2nd Amendment, strongly supports our First Responders and our Greats Vets and works to keep Florida’s Economy strong. [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3807cb4a61954af8b4ef624c563b3854&_e=Qytt7xsd9UnBcf-_eT14Ca6drHP_2Rt13y4CQZcDEbfUgJ1wRxL1fPhbFSDBXHyA_gcCMWu1KdPWfWfCMIaMX7Q7wrL0QXcWooRr6wEVI9yUMl2gpjtGRQRfz2xTSMZ4g4lev3gDZPTrl4f2OqKRr_gleaF4FaP5bn1XDwko08UfLiwPpCbltYBeJD9Kp6YQASu0Ku0xf8zIp9nHXhnshJBF2e0xxdpqSLj8O0QbPq6C3QUhNG9pgVPv8CqkCgcNDIjHb7N2dvPkbbA3GZbm9tu6eJvkIWSBgTCSt0yGSeibdjQ9wfXsqkkNEFati8EqsxGT4Wdf0TnTCXMLTZa_3gwc_b23H_ffNdbl8FFdd2vNP709Nv8hkcBwWkw_fP1uRAfZSyLGXCRjReR9wLfRfXgnEqjz_MAWPbLOgH8XjEc7zrdZP0qWArrgZ6Jl1a0UuRYmVd0BI6f6uZik5Sw-wQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate.

But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the _**"MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION."**_

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3807cb4a61954af8b4ef624c563b3854&_e=Qytt7xsd9UnBcf-_eT14Ca6drHP_2Rt13y4CQZcDEbfUgJ1wRxL1fPhbFSDBXHyA_gcCMWu1KdPWfWfCMIaMX7Q7wrL0QXcWooRr6wEVI9yUMl2gpjtGRQRfz2xTSMZ4g4lev3gDZPTrl4f2OqKRr_gleaF4FaP5bn1XDwko08UfLiwPpCbltYBeJD9Kp6YQASu0Ku0xf8zIp9nHXhnshJBF2e0xxdpqSLj8O0QbPq6C3QUhNG9pgVPv8CqkCgcNyxQILzLc7Ph0yaheqp11z-a5ZoioFaQlCQZ41uuyL67jUg1jGgRQi6w45Zy9Fpe0BWcfeLphz7_yoo_Ko7fuHVhfDssz1K_Glh-YAspoTYzvKBZd-pPDqCKRj-u-JSGBx1Nlmc0THnpCQJkko9w7riTFn9DyrLoLvOX4JnfY4bMNds9n2Tc8NRabP3eFDCzwFsOJZeWLJWTw1Mphh9OnCQ%3D%3D)
There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it.

According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. **[A Quinnipiac survey from last month had our campaign leading our Democrat opponent by ONE POINT- a statistical tie.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3807cb4a61954af8b4ef624c563b3854&_e=Qytt7xsd9UnBcf-_eT14Ca6drHP_2Rt13y4CQZcDEbfUgJ1wRxL1fPhbFSDBXHyA_gcCMWu1KdPWfWfCMIaMX7Q7wrL0QXcWooRr6wEVI9yUMl2gpjtGRQRfz2xTSMZ4g4lev3gDZPTrl4f2OqKRr_gleaF4FaP5bn1XDwko08UfLiwPpCbltYBeJD9Kp6YQASu0Ku0xf8zIp9nHXhnshJBF2e0xxdpqSLj8O0QbPq6C3QUhNG9pgVPv8CqkCgcNOasZ75D4jqWJWJjcg2heGgsXunLTd3Uvi4I_I0MwFSRexHuaJf2_eWteUAb90W6FuFlGVrbmUeCFPHi_k7ZtJetJ3IFvJRWpnGLNz_Hw-5cNI3PveMe4PBiG_gvpBcgVXKQs6pHywsI8g8rYK9j4VL3vigAG5XrBjwxxNjUnQ49NW03KZYial2jPZgYxbD67Q9rb93vwY2xpI8tcdfY-TQ%3D%3D)**

Fellow American, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us:
1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State
2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November
3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets

In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break.

**[Please let us know we can count on you for your support today!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3807cb4a61954af8b4ef624c563b3854&_e=Qytt7xsd9UnBcf-_eT14Ca6drHP_2Rt13y4CQZcDEbfUgJ1wRxL1fPhbFSDBXHyA_gcCMWu1KdPWfWfCMIaMX7Q7wrL0QXcWooRr6wEVI9yUMl2gpjtGRQRfz2xTSMZ4g4lev3gDZPTrl4f2OqKRr_gleaF4FaP5bn1XDwko08UfLiwPpCbltYBeJD9Kp6YQASu0Ku0xf8zIp9nHXhnshJBF2e0xxdpqSLj8O0QbPq6C3QUhNG9pgVPv8CqkCgcN5U2srnlwX1841MPnzSuBlZGyozQpesEBPiMuJTEJiYSiLO49GyfK9frtUHaAGO2aNYGsx3LzWGuxehc7sc3pvjB8ostzmBHPYVKQlaFSMGXc1BBjegLT0a4z1OrGRNQUVLtKNRRS9GcGVIUpuoLndsejnnKQWOYdYp-GPGNhfrI1PZuIDbW4d9uWYMmYrsfmAXzYDpoQHRA3IKApVtX8Kw%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

clean_body: “MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION.” "MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." | Fellow American, It's becoming clearer by the day that this Senate race in Georgia is going to be THE race that will decide control of the Senate. But don't take our word for it. Recently our opponent sent out an email to let his supporters know CNN had named him the "MOST VULNERABLE DEMOCRATIC SENATOR UP FOR REELECTION." There you have it ... straight from our opponent's campaign. When we tell you how critical this race is, we really mean it. According to recent polling, the race is too close to call. Fellow American, $7 or more today really would go a long way in helping us: 1. Register thousands of new voters across the Peach State 2. Reach persuadable voters who will be crucial to victory in November 3. Pay for airtime in expensive Georgia TV markets In a race as close as the one we're facing, every dollar is make or break. Thank you, Herschel Walker Republican Candidate for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Calling All Friends - Caucus Night and Signature Gathering!
body:
Signature gathering and attending your caucus to run for state delegate are some of the most important ways to support Ally.
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| Calling all friends and volunteers!!
We TRULY TRULY need your help right now with TWO things. Caucus night and signature gathering. Signature gathering and attending your caucus to run for state delegate are some of the most important ways to support Ally.
CAUCUS NIGHT Tuesday, March 8th is Caucus night. While attending your caucus, we need you to:
* Run for state delegate
* Vote for state delegate candidates who would support Ally
* Tell others about Ally and what she stands for

Feeling unsure about what to do to run for state delegate? Watch this training: [Become A Delegate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NkdQmbwAqQ7Jul8qTRIh_J7O2XZDy1JEi0zFTNllEBV0dnRAeCP4vXGcoeO5eSY5r92zcw78YySRtwCnoEbLuhGEU0oBVxhv_LQYVnNNVXeWDt-ISJ7tCjgNfmQN7LhqTgTeSxCD-WOa53tvBw5a9g==&c=5wvYJ6tJID7pf7U5yb19mBB15s2-8aJwuKBVPpfhAtu7j0tbuMXTQw==&ch=YZNiZ_vVqGz-_D2R_8TOvT9I1fAXKP4lGlUTk8U7mNIux8SNB5L2ig==) Find your caucus meeting location and other information here: [https://precinctportal.org/ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NkdQmbwAqQ7Jul8qTRIh_J7O2XZDy1JEi0zFTNllEBV0dnRAeCP4vXGcoeO5eSY5JIhiur3p9Ni5DZdx5MS0t7UK0DNgnwiGYlC9KSRRAtieEjfpeHPISwl4TdzR0oXFXk0FlcB04i-bTKg-IG0H5w==&c=5wvYJ6tJID7pf7U5yb19mBB15s2-8aJwuKBVPpfhAtu7j0tbuMXTQw==&ch=YZNiZ_vVqGz-_D2R_8TOvT9I1fAXKP4lGlUTk8U7mNIux8SNB5L2ig==) *For Caucus night on Tuesday, Ally will be attending her own precinct*
THE RACE TO TURN IN SIGNATURES IS ON! We have some incredibly stalwart and amazing volunteers who have shown up weekend after weekend to help--because 28,000 is A LOT of signatures. And they REALLY need some backup right now.
If your packet isn't complete yet, please set a goal to complete it this week.
We'll submit our first 28,000 ASAP and then keep that momentum going to gather additional signatures as we know we'll have invalid signatures that we'll need to replace. CAN YOU PLEASE HELP US?
Do you need a packet? Is yours almost full? Please contact Jolet Olsen at [jolet.olsen@gmail.com](mailto:jolet.olsen@gmail.com).
One more thing - we are approaching our quarterly fundraising deadline. Can you chip in $20, $50 or $100 today to help spread our message for a new dawn in the GOP?
---
| | | [DONATE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NkdQmbwAqQ7Jul8qTRIh_J7O2XZDy1JEi0zFTNllEBV0dnRAeCP4vR78EDB3faTBe_GQPGhiS0F1exku2e5CTXSaVxsEsfmZomU_bp3E97Er3MwYexZXOwhT7bDQ-rFgZ7ICl52-7L05yIqDqU5GqoOuTVLp70ujcluk9RmaL3UdDRBw_6wUaQ==&c=5wvYJ6tJID7pf7U5yb19mBB15s2-8aJwuKBVPpfhAtu7j0tbuMXTQw==&ch=YZNiZ_vVqGz-_D2R_8TOvT9I1fAXKP4lGlUTk8U7mNIux8SNB5L2ig==)
---
| Thanks for all you're doing, especially during this final sprint to get signatures turned in.
-Team Ally
---
| |
---
| |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NkdQmbwAqQ7Jul8qTRIh_J7O2XZDy1JEi0zFTNllEBV0dnRAeCP4vR78EDB3faTBm0SJKF63VfxM3O8vQw31gXfMbCKts61Dd8Xy_BLLoLFpcbhHR8Z9mdk717GoDZdfbJez5ZcRII-kJhlhhbjrifFSWfMNUgCH&c=5wvYJ6tJID7pf7U5yb19mBB15s2-8aJwuKBVPpfhAtu7j0tbuMXTQw==&ch=YZNiZ_vVqGz-_D2R_8TOvT9I1fAXKP4lGlUTk8U7mNIux8SNB5L2ig==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NkdQmbwAqQ7Jul8qTRIh_J7O2XZDy1JEi0zFTNllEBV0dnRAeCP4vR78EDB3faTBMiw8NyOFmRzedVRe6mSNzmjzWmGFJC95WWlQpIxA0Fh5tkA5C3uEMOUh9gMIBqsE2VMLA7Rh5zVPxFa94d4mxZg-I-PA-cP2&c=5wvYJ6tJID7pf7U5yb19mBB15s2-8aJwuKBVPpfhAtu7j0tbuMXTQw==&ch=YZNiZ_vVqGz-_D2R_8TOvT9I1fAXKP4lGlUTk8U7mNIux8SNB5L2ig==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NkdQmbwAqQ7Jul8qTRIh_J7O2XZDy1JEi0zFTNllEBV0dnRAeCP4vR78EDB3faTBWzIlPdd9NTPnvDdESuHMe1RpPA1k463RNn8tuxVU4SOn1LBlHoxBCZd8VSIPKBHZjLpWWFr_FAbZNslucnRedXjicGRLY7Z06ed_fseEZio=&c=5wvYJ6tJID7pf7U5yb19mBB15s2-8aJwuKBVPpfhAtu7j0tbuMXTQw==&ch=YZNiZ_vVqGz-_D2R_8TOvT9I1fAXKP4lGlUTk8U7mNIux8SNB5L2ig==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NkdQmbwAqQ7Jul8qTRIh_J7O2XZDy1JEi0zFTNllEBV0dnRAeCP4vR78EDB3faTBfuB89st4N_LCuAkdVLdxIRjDRUnSFCxUWCahHjRcVgQW2IczaeFKAgYZrxY0lG1HkMsYSDZ8Q6lVNWeq9ZMaB8rHttoJYFtSUIYRg5StkcBc6rLTDSsAeDOU3ZB0ysNU&c=5wvYJ6tJID7pf7U5yb19mBB15s2-8aJwuKBVPpfhAtu7j0tbuMXTQw==&ch=YZNiZ_vVqGz-_D2R_8TOvT9I1fAXKP4lGlUTk8U7mNIux8SNB5L2ig==)

****_March 7, 2022_**

| | _**CNBC: Former Education Secretary under Obama calls on Biden to cancel student debt
**_ “John B. King, Jr., who served as education secretary under former President Barack Obama, has joined a number of other leading government officials calling on President Joe Biden to cancel student debt through executive action. King, who’s running for governor of Maryland, wrote in an editorial in Business Insider on Wednesday that the country’s outstanding student loan balance is ‘indisputably a crisis.’”

clean_body: On this edition of the King's Chronicle, see John & Michelle launch our statewide Promise to Progress tour, read about upcoming events, and more! | | | = | | | | | | = | mailto:info@johnkingforgovernor.com "info@johnkingforgovernor.com" | | | The King's Chronicle: March 7, 2022 | | Hi Team, February flew by, but we managed squeeze in everything from our Promise to Progress Tour events to interviews with John to meeting new supporters. And over the next few weeks, we have even more planned! We hope you'll keep scrolling to catch up on some recent campaign highlights, news clippings, event recaps, ways to get involved with the campaign, and upcoming opportunities to meet John and Michelle. Onward, Team King | | | Team King Updates | | GIRL POWER : In honor of International Women’s Day, Michelle Siri and Melissa King will be hosting a fireside chat to discuss their experiences, what they’ve learned from the strong women in their lives, and what Michelle and John’s plans are to create a more equitable Maryland for all of us. BACK FOR MORE : Team King Siri is starting their next leg of the Promise to Progress Tour of Maryland! John and Michelle will continue traveling around the state, meeting with Marylanders and discussing their plans for our state. If you’re interested, text TEAM to 48178 or sign up to learn more and get the invite when we’re heading to your area: . THE CLIMATE CANDIDATE : John will be participating in the Gubernatorial Candidate Climate Forums on Tuesday, March 8th and Wednesday, March 9th. He will be laying out his plans for our state to combat the climate crisis, and showing once again that he is THE climate candidate. | | | John in the News | | CNBC: Former Education Secretary under Obama calls on Biden to cancel student debt “John B. King, Jr., who served as education secretary under former President Barack Obama, has joined a number of other leading government officials calling on President Joe Biden to cancel student debt through executive action. King, who’s running for governor of Maryland, wrote in an editorial in Business Insider on Wednesday that the country’s outstanding student loan balance is ‘indisputably a crisis.’” MARYLAND MATTERS: John King: Our Schools Are Critical to the Fight Against Climate Change “As we in Maryland grapple with the implications of climate change in our own communities — from air pollution in Baltimore to sea level rise near the Bay to losing farmland to saltwater intrusion — we need to re-envision our future so that we are not just fighting the climate crisis but are transforming Maryland into a national leader in clean energy and building a thriving green economy.” FOX BALTIMORE: 'We need more urgency' Former U.S. secretary of education on fixing Baltimore City schools “‘My message is, as governor, as an educator governor, I'll make sure that we get the return on investment. That we are doing the things in our schools that we know work,’ said King.” MARYLAND MATTERS: Advocates Rally Md. Lawmakers to Pass Paid Family Medical Leave This Year “‘I think there’s a growing realization that paid family leave is a moral obligation of the state, but it’s also good for businesses,’ King said in an interview. ‘Paid family leave and universal quality childcare together are essential to producing an economy that is more just, particularly for working women.’” | | | John on the Road On Thursday, February 17 in Annapolis, John officially filed to be on the ballot with his running mate Michelle Siri and, together, they launched their statewide Promise to Progress tour! | | = | = | | On Friday, February 18 John toured small businesses across Takoma Park. = On Sunday, February 27 John joined IMPACT Ministries in Hagerstown as their keynote speaker at their annual Black History Month celebration. = | | | Upcoming Events | | League of Conservation Voters Gubernatorial Forums Tuesday, March 8th @ 7pm Riggs Alumni Center Wednesday, March 9th @ 7pm Ungar Athenaeum Educators for John King Relational Phonebank Tuesdays @ 5:30pm, Saturdays @ 2:00pm Do neither of these times work? Reach out and we’ll get you set up at a time that works for you! Central Baltimore County Democratic Club Tuesday, March 8th @ 6:30pm Virtual on Zoom | Meet & Greet with John King in Baltimore Saturday, March 12th @ 4:30pm Wonderground Park 409 E. Lanvale St, Baltimore, MD 21202 Meet & Greet with John King in Towson Thursday, March 24th @ 6:30pm Location provided upon signup MD Dems Gubernatorial Forum Tuesday, March 15th Catch the livestream on the MD Dems Facebook page! Interested in future events? Text MEET to 48178 or sign up below! | | | Ways to Get Involved | | | | | | = | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Holly McCormack
subject: We're going to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
| | |
---

| | |
---
Peter, this weekend the team and I attended Dalton Brewing Company’s 4th birthday. We had an amazing time talking with folks about the issues that matter most to them, while enjoying frosty pints of Georgia beer.
---
---
Going to events and meeting with the people of GA-14 is one of the most important aspects to my campaign. This race isn’t just about me and my voice, it’s about you and your voices. I love hearing from my neighbors across the District about the issues that are impacting their families. Listening is exactly what a representative is supposed to do. This weekend was especially meaningful because we had an overwhelming amount of people tell us they were voting for us and they were excited to see a candidate who is dealing with the kitchen table issues instead of just name dropping Marjorie Taylor Greene. **[As we prepare for a month of events, outreach, and voter engagement we come to you and ask for your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42695437/333944977/-804235033?refcode=em0307&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWI1MmFkZS02NDllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a4rxYrud60QJoCrsxbyj3SZfbn3NwOhavMdAEDhiRZE=)** It may not seem like a lot, but just one conversation can flip a voter. When November rolls around, we’re going to need to have tens of thousands of conversations in order to win. **[Chip in today so we can keep having conversations tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42695438/333944978/-804235033?refcode=em0307&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MWI1MmFkZS02NDllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a4rxYrud60QJoCrsxbyj3SZfbn3NwOhavMdAEDhiRZE=) **Together we can turn out voters, attend events, build relationships, and unseat Marjorie Taylor Greene in November. Thanks for your support,Holly McCormack.

name: Peter Welch
subject: A Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Climate change is already here, and we need to act.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=125%2E61531%2EKYJSy9)
Hello,
One of the best parts of living in Vermont is enjoying the scenery and breathing the fresh air.
But climate change threatens our natural resources—and people’s lives and livelihoods. This past December was our warmest December ever on record. This January was the coldest January on record. Floods and droughts are Vermont’s most common natural disasters, and expected to increase in frequency due to climate change.
If we continue on this path, marginalized communities will suffer the most damage. We can’t wait any longer to address climate change—and a Green New Deal will ensure a more just and sustainable future, with good-paying green jobs.
I’ve brought members of Congress together to deliver results before—even against powerful interests like fossil fuel corporations. If I have the honor of serving as Vermont’s senator, I’ll be ready to continue working on a Green New Deal from Day One. And if we work together, we can overcome any obstacle the fossil fuel industry throws our way.
[**If you’re ready to pass a Green New Deal and do everything we can to protect our earth for generations to come, add your name right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-green-new-deal?source=em_20220307_p_p_gnd&t=3&akid=125%2E61531%2EKYJSy9)
From leading climate and green energy legislation in the House, to joining climate marches with environmental leaders like Bill McKibben as a state senator, I’ve been championing climate action for decades.
A Green New Deal will reduce greenhouse gas emissions and avoid the worst consequences of climate change while also tackling economic inequality and racial injustice. That’s why I was proud to be an original cosponsor of the Green New Deal alongside Senator Bernie Sanders and Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez.
We can combat the climate crisis—but we’ll all have to raise our voices.
[**Add your name to say it’s time to fight for a Green New Deal, and let’s work together to make it happen.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/signup/em-green-new-deal?source=em_20220307_p_p_gnd&t=4&akid=125%2E61531%2EKYJSy9)
Thanks for taking action,
Peter

---|---|---

PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=125%2E61531%2EKYJSy9).
clean_body: Climate change is already here, and we need to act. Hello, One of the best parts of living in Vermont is enjoying the scenery and breathing the fresh air. But climate change threatens our natural resources—and people’s lives and livelihoods. This past December was our warmest December ever on record. This January was the coldest January on record. Floods and droughts are Vermont’s most common natural disasters, and expected to increase in frequency due to climate change. If we continue on this path, marginalized communities will suffer the most damage. We can’t wait any longer to address climate change—and a Green New Deal will ensure a more just and sustainable future, with good-paying green jobs. I’ve brought members of Congress together to deliver results before—even against powerful interests like fossil fuel corporations. If I have the honor of serving as Vermont’s senator, I’ll be ready to continue working on a Green New Deal from Day One. And if we work together, we can overcome any obstacle the fossil fuel industry throws our way. From leading climate and green energy legislation in the House, to joining climate marches with environmental leaders like Bill McKibben as a state senator, I’ve been championing climate action for decades. A Green New Deal will reduce greenhouse gas emissions and avoid the worst consequences of climate change while also tackling economic inequality and racial injustice. That’s why I was proud to be an original cosponsor of the Green New Deal alongside Senator Bernie Sanders and Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez. We can combat the climate crisis—but we’ll all have to raise our voices. Thanks for taking action, Peter | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT Welch for Vermont P.O Box 909 Richmond, VT 05477

So we’re counting on our all-star team to help us ramp up our organizing efforts. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Chris is a father, U.S. Navy veteran, voting rights lawyer, and union organizer who doesn't take a cent from corporate PACs. Instead, we’re fueled by grassroots supporters like you. Thank you for chipping in. Team Deluzio (P.S. If you would like to volunteer with our team to gather signatures, sign up for our upcoming events.) | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. Use of rank, title, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense, Department of the Navy, or Department of the Army. name: American Action News
subject: Your course is ready
body:
I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservativ
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf42p9sbeqahrep80ctqpiqr1ns53jhu8k8vuno8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uepn0pj369rj2s74cep72dtkedom0pbgecojcsb3m1j3edtjciqncp32e5hr5c77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchmcooj9d9hcupb4phgm2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cdhm9oj2c9i649fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zag6nhdrro50ue5o3hhastouoo992f4a6hpurim8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdie4oj2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zskd66apu3bckvb0tk1p41pgon9dfv5fil4jako8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdie4oj2chh2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z45ma7jnuo9aec61u5piqvqs7huha8n6rsipm2do_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdie4oj2chh2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeu0eonb013b8uni2ov9blccua1jusrg48gcahjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdie4oj2chh2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zljg3r8ti7f5dn90jancbm9a05gfkiboqq67g0ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdie4oj2chh2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp532r8t1fso6grjr33pu9icvknfbsrrf3hva1lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdie4oj2chh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Peter,
---
In 2021, Democrats raised nearly **$1.3 BILLION** online from small-dollar donors. That number doesn’t even include the millions they’ve raked in from megadonors like Soros and Bloomberg.
---

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: The right to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Republicans across this country are attacking the right to vote and blocking access to the ballot box. Their attacks are calculated. They are dangerous. And they must be stopped. Friends —

57 years ago, Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and John Lewis led 600 peaceful demonstrators across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama in a march for justice. They were met with a wall of law enforcement officers who violently attacked them.

That day became known as Bloody Sunday, and it was a pivotal moment in the fight for voting rights in America. The sacrifice, determination, and courage of the Selma marchers led to the passage of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. Now, the fight to restore and protect the right to vote is more urgent than ever.

Vice President Kamala Harris traveled to Selma yesterday to commemorate the anniversary of Bloody Sunday, and I wanted to share this quote with you:
_“In a moment of great uncertainty, those marches pressed forward and they crossed. We must do the same. We must lock our arms and march forward. We will not let setbacks stop us. We know that honoring the legacy of those who marched then demands that we continue to push Congress to pass federal voting rights legislation.”_
As you know, Republicans across this country are attacking the right to vote and blocking access to the ballot box. Their attacks are calculated. They are dangerous. And they must be stopped.

Together, we must carry on the work of the brave Americans who marched in Selma that day by demanding Congress pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and the Freedom to Vote Act — and yes, ending the filibuster if that’s what it takes.

**[We need to fight GOP voter suppression at every turn, especially here in Wisconsin — that's why I’m asking you to join me in this fight today. Please, sign my petition to help us send a powerful message back to Washington and demand the urgent passage of federal voting rights legislation:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42686836/333902692/-1122530618?ms=em22_220307_vra_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220307_vra_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220307_vra_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220307_vra_engg_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=r2TcsKoDkL9raNMUxK9uTip2HT0G9sHbI+ovSxtehI21ZLbK8QiiK8E7DtG21d4DltUsIZgmWv992bAFu803HVCuWwNfw/BdZD8GInWlRSOHQv4qpPpOMJIYWcf5YkUo1Bj4aWKDeZtnBd9LGNA9vSH0zfER6i+aIuKlcttiMkI=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjY2QxMGM3Yy00MDllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FhltLWVdsTUEtsi1ReA2RT2Y0fayaPtSnqf-q0ulP48=&emci=c6d10c7c-409e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=ccd10c7c-409e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=18659593)**

name: Doyle Canning
subject: Climate can't wait. Oregon can't wait. We're getting in the race for Congress, and we're in it to win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Canning for Congress
body:
Hi Friend,
It's official.
Climate can't wait. Working families can't wait. Oregon can't wait. We're in the race for Congress, and we're in it to win.

I'm Doyle Canning, community organizer, attorney, mother and proven progressive leader. For 20 years, I've been building movements for strong climate solutions, working families, racial justice, and more. I've worked for national climate organizations and devoted my life to fighting for the air we breathe and water we drink. Now, I'm running for Congress in Oregon's 4th district, an open seat and bright spot for Democrats, to be the leader we need for the solutions that can't wait.

This district is progressive and more Democratic than ever after redistricting. When it comes to the fight for advancing progressive values in Congress, I am committed to legislating for bold climate action, a Medicare for All system that guarantees healthcare to all Americans, ending poverty, and advancing the rights of workers. I would be the first woman to represent Oregon’s 4th District in Congress. You can learn more about my campaign at canningforcongress.com .
This campaign is people powered. We will accept no funding from the fossil fuel industry, big Pharma, or other corporate PACs. That's why I am counting on you to make a contribution right now.

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/canningonboarding1]

When it comes to climate action, Medicare for All, standing up for working people and ending the corruption of corporate money in politics -- we know that the people are ready for real change. But to win it, we have to organize. Our movement is strong, and just getting started.

Join our campaign with your contribution.

DONATE HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/canningonboarding1]
Thank you for your support.
Onward,
Doyle
https://www.facebook.com/canningforcongress2020 [https://www.facebook.com/canningforcongress2020] https://twitter.com/Canning4Oregon [https://twitter.com/Canning4Oregon] https://www.instagram.com/doyle_canning/ [https://www.instagram.com/doyle_canning/]
Paid for by Canning for Congress
Canning for Congress
PO Box 5903
Eugene, OR 97405
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/935d5575-c694-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/826be20d-6b9e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTgxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MjZiZTIwZC02YjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1iyS8vrmvMrZ9kdPUV8vLifGYCyGN8WZA_VPibQMe-o=&id=102001893 .
