name: Mark Kelly
subject: the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42696679/333950556/-1087597766?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1667-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGMwMDYwMC02YjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F3QlOFuYmypJxvRNpvQXh9erY5Bhi7naspRg3BkBD7Y=) Friend – I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift. **I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen's ****campaign.** Your support is so important to our success.
The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down.
We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well.
You know the rest... We won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.
**But now we have a new mission: re-election. ****And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you.**

clean_body: | | | = Friend – I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine I can assure you it’s a gift. I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and ask you to split a donation between my re-election campaign and Jacky Rosen's campaign. Your support is so important to our success. The truth is, when Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between parties — not burning them down. We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. You know the rest... We won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen. But now we have a new mission: re-election. And right now, the polls are really tight. If we’re going to win again and keep control of the Senate, it’s going to take a similar level of grassroots support from people like you. = Thank you again. For everything. Mark Kelly | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Peter, A special interest group just announced it’ll be pouring millions of dollars into the campaigns of over three dozen Republicans who support Trump’s Big Lie of a stolen election — and of our opponent. Meanwhile, leaders from this same group have been fundraising against Andy with rhetoric so toxic that it’s made national headlines. Andy’s just fine not being included on lists with members of Congress who actively support Trump’s attempted insurrection and still refuse to protect voting rights. But these moments underscore what we’re up against and why building the largest grassroots movement possible is so important. [_**Will you donate $15 to Andy’s reelection campaign and help this grassroots team fight back against the special interest groups carelessly undermining our democracy?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42687968/333907392/882283677?refcode=em_20220307_f_t_interest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTQ1YTA4ZS00MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UKHjFkFmfHqFjhBUmVnq3UzlhK5oRGxyPqm5Jc2kYy8=) Andy is focused on protecting voting rights and democracy at home and abroad — and he’ll keep working with his colleagues who share that mission. We know his progressive message resonates with voters, because the voters have put their faith in Andy time after time after time, and he’s always delivered. Andy’s been outraised and outspent before, so we know what it means to work that much harder to strengthen our grassroots support. That’s why it’s important we build out this movement now, into a powerhouse strong enough to root big money out of politics and continue fighting for our progressive values on Capitol Hill. [_**Peter, please consider pitching in $15 right away to help Andy represent the new 11th District and show these special interest groups the singular power of a mighty grassroots movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42687970/333907394/882283677?refcode=em_20220307_f_t_interest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTQ1YTA4ZS00MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UKHjFkFmfHqFjhBUmVnq3UzlhK5oRGxyPqm5Jc2kYy8=) Thanks so much, Team Levin

subject: 🚗 16 conventions & hundreds of new friends🚙

body:
This past weekend my team reached every conventionand I had a presence at every convention held all across the State of Minnesota. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=20b23d4ff3&e=9d6926af69)
---
| [VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=5fa05199fe&e=9d6926af69 "VOLUNTEER FOR MICHELLE")
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,

As a Republican candidate for governor,
I have the privilege of meeting many people across
the state who share our conservative values and are ready for a more prosperous Minnesota.

This past weekend my team reached conventions in - Big Stone, Chippewa, Hubbard, Pope, Carlton, Crow Wing, Goodhue, Grant, Yellow Medicine, Lac qui Parle, Nicollet, Waseca and Itasca Counties. In addition we visited Senate District 67 and Senate District 48 - _earning delegates across the State of Minnesota_.

For those with conventions this weekend we will look forward to seeing you on Saturday!

I hope you will join my campaign and volunteer today.

[**Join with me and fellow Minnesotans by volunteering with our team!**](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=a7abb76ee7&e=9d6926af69)

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c9a4cdb113&e=9d6926af69)
**Michelle Benson **
[Candidate for Minnesota Governor](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=e548060122&e=9d6926af69)

I have introduced legislation in the General Assembly two years in a row that would clear voter rolls of deceased residents with greater frequency and keep our lists more accurate. My bills received bipartisan support in the Virginia State Senate and passed out of the Virginia House this session!
#
**This isn’t partisan... Both sides of the aisle must be able to trust that our election process is fair and that the outcome is accurate, no matter who wins. **
#
As your next Congresswoman, I will bring the same focus on election security to the national level.
#
I will ensure that every eligible American has a vote and only one vote, and that there is faith in our election outcomes. I am spearheading this bipartisan issue because I want to return faith to our electoral process.

name: Liz (Team Benson)
subject: Let Jocelyn know if you approve of her leadership!
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friend, [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Jocelyn has spent the past three months working hard to protect our democracy and the sanctity of our elections. We want to know, friend, do you approve of her performance thus far this year?
Take our Team Benson Supporter Feedback Survey and let Jocelyn know what you think. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jbzvfZnfi0-K_7LX3XIkPg2?emci=81177b57-e89b-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=8535fc42-b09d-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=8839526]

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Benson
Date: Sunday, March. 6, 2022 at 7:48 PM
Subject: Do you approve of Jocelyn's leadership?
To: Our friend

Friend,

We're three months into the most important election year in recent memory. Partisan assaults on our elections are growing in frequency, and our democracy remains under constant attack.

Conspiracy theorists are attempting to take over our local election canvassing boards. Partisan Republican lawmakers are trying to disrupt our vote by mail process. And extremists from around the country are continuing to sow discord in our elections.

But Jocelyn continues to demonstrate strong leadership in the face of it all. And our pro-democracy movement remains as powerful as ever.
But Jocelyn wants to know, do you approve of her work so far this year? >> [secure.ngpvan.com/jbzvfZnfi0-K_7LX3XIkPg2

2022 will decide the future of democracy and Michiganders’ right to vote. That is why it is so important Jocelyn has your feedback, and knows exactly what you think about her work so far.

Take our Team Benson Supporter Feedback Survey today and let Jocelyn know exactly what you think about her leadership.

Take the survey>> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/jbzvfZnfi0-K_7LX3XIkPg2

Thanks for taking the time to make your voice heard.

Team Benson Action Center

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Fwd: Join us for a post-primary thank you call
body:
Join us for a virtual post-primary get-together, to celebrate our victories but also get ready for the fight ahead.
#
Peter, did you catch our email from Saturday? This evening we’ll be on Zoom with Greg Casar and Jessica Cisneros. We all want to thank you so much for your support through our first two 2022 primaries. We also want to prepare for Jessica’s runoff race and our 2022 primaries to come.
[Can you join us on Zoom at 7:30 p.m. Eastern TODAY to hear from the candidates? We wouldn’t be here without all of your help.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=2&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)
**[RSVP »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=3&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)**
\- Team JD
\-----Forwarded Message-----
Sent: Saturday March 5, 2022
From: JusticeDemocrats.com
Subject: Join us for a post-primary thank you call
Peter,
Greg Casar won his primary and Jessica Cisneros came within striking distance of defeating corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar.
**The movement showed up for Greg and Jessica. On behalf of all of us at JD, thank you!** That’s why we wanted to be sure you were among the first to know about our post-TX primary get together and thank-you event on March 7th at 7:30 p.m. ET. [Can you join us on Zoom for the virtual event with Greg and Jessica?**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=4&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)
**[RSVP »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=5&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)**
You’ll hear directly from Jessica and Greg, as they say thank you to the supporters that powered their campaigns, as well as JD staffers who will outline the fight ahead to beat Henry Cuellar and elect Jessica Cisneros in the runoff.
[Please click here to register to join us on Monday, March 7th at 7:30 p.m. ET. Zoom link provided after RSVP!](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=6&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)
**[RSVP »](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/97052?t=7&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)**
We hope to see you there!
Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=8&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=9&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220307-22299-footer&t=10&refcode2=22299_1203867_c5yGJ8&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=11&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=22299%2E1203867%2Ec5yGJ8)

Team,

Right now, the fate of Ukraine hangs in the balance.

We’ve watched in real time as Vladimir Putin has invaded a sovereign nation, ruthlessly shelling civilians and threatening to blow up nuclear power plants.

And we’ve also seen the tremendous courage by President Zelensky and all the Ukrainian people putting it all on the line to defend their homeland.

In our own small way, the Crist for Governor campaign wants to show its support for the Ukrainian people during their time of extreme need. **So this Thursday, March 10 at 6:30pm, we are hosting a benefit to support Ukraine and her people.**

[_**You can make a contribution of any amount to RSVP for this event. All proceeds from this event will be donated to the Red Cross of Ukraine.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42697798/333954598/-843099391?refcode=20220307_EV_UKB_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTFlODU3ZS02ZjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOzfzLro76mg2v1kgForij4kOhviASJLHRFR1WtqHPI=)
**[RSVP>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42697799/333954626/-843099391?refcode=20220307_EV_UKB_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTFlODU3ZS02ZjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BOzfzLro76mg2v1kgForij4kOhviASJLHRFR1WtqHPI=)**
---
We have the tools to stand with the Ukrainian people — and we must.

**A threat to democracy anywhere is a threat to democracy everywhere. I hope you’ll join us by standing in solidarity with Ukraine.**

God bless,

Charlie Crist

_P.S. If you can't make it to the event, but still want to show your support, consider purchasing our "Florida Stands With Ukraine" t-shirt. All proceeds from sales of this shirt will be donated to the Red Cross of Ukraine._

So this Thursday, March 10 at 6:30pm, we are hosting a benefit to support Ukraine and her people. = = We have the tools to stand with the Ukrainian people — and we must. A threat to democracy anywhere is a threat to democracy everywhere. I hope you’ll join us by standing in solidarity with Ukraine. God bless, Charlie Crist P.S. If you can't make it to the event, but still want to show your support, consider purchasing our "Florida Stands With Ukraine" t-shirt. All proceeds from sales of this shirt will be donated to the Red Cross of Ukraine. _ | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Friend, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e11728acbd90417bbc68b383f685d91c&_e=xckYdcGbDvVF0JOs9cw5T2z9u2-JL4Uax1fCbTDPybOu5GYcFMOsdUv7AqHebmZNBuPPBKwj_tNMK5DntUIhEf1QkM1K7m3qBokyPs3qdE6AfLwrtFs6HG0YPY2eUGDLWYtnXMV5RUrk5DimkozW1yBD7l4Pi01lqR61uzYWvcJlhRdcnA_GR62ja9ZAq1IqRXXfGMNoerRGiF-lc9wq1d6eL2JEGUF2CHjfe-jn-2qGkii1njeFf9IDA0bc2CDK8wqJJxwGcrAjJ_g1-4ce6xXvX6pFptxCdsxRojWgXZTvpGwy67vWa39nJKehTDKZ5R6-db9wdRe4GUa7gw8LoJKPTngc7r8uVF4Sbw2qPi-74MH9lOv1_mF-D_s51zdnkE3goc8ecK15LLa1_ojOIPDgEosx0AqJUDN-MRoqgPBEsyMTAhCEJ4C_Jt5_RfOZ03bHlUHoxeDXKvvKQVyKps_DThbhCKKlmEj4hwJ_x_Vyb_vg_CRmyQL2aTJSHruT "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")

Ron Johnson

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Become a delegate for Becky!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a84f4a02257d/campaign-update-yellow-couch-tour-flag-day-and-juneteenth-6854013?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=4673035643&e=10c1db3257)
---
| Dear Friends, The GOP neighborhood caucus meetings are tomorrow night and WE NEED YOU to run as a delegate. Becoming a state delegate is one of the most effective ways for you to support Becky.

A delegate is a person who is elected or appointed to represent their neighborhood and vote on their behalf in annual state or county party conventions. ANY REGISTERED REPUBLICAN CAN BECOME A STATE DELEGATE.

State delegates attend the party convention and vote for our state-wide candidates, including U.S. senators. Attending your caucus meeting tomorrow and becoming a state delegate will help get Becky on the Republican primary ballot.

[Check out our delegate guide](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=97e3d53bc8&e=10c1db3257) and follow these 6 steps to become a delegate:
1. Make sure you are registered to vote and affiliated with the Republican party
2. Determine your neighborhood precinct caucus location (check [precinctportal.org](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=b5b6c86593&e=10c1db3257))
3. Identify the boundaries of your political precinct
4. Build your neighborhood precinct team (get your friends and family to come vote for you as a state delegate)
5. Prepare a short persuasive speech (just a few minutes about yourself and your willingness to study candidates)
6. Attend the caucus meeting on March 8!

---
|
---
|
---
|
# Return Your Signature Packets ASAP
---
|
---
| We are preparing to submit our first batch of signatures to the Lt. Governor's office. We need at least 28,000 signatures to do so, so PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR PACKETS ASAP. You can mail your packet to:

Becky Edwards for U.S. Senate
P.O. Box 1467
Bountiful, Utah 84011

Or submit them in person at any of the following locations:

Park City: Andrea Himoff
7984 N Gambel Dr, Park City

Salt Lake: Camie Hodlmair
1777 Somerset Ridge Drive, Draper

Riverton: Jake Hunsaker
13114 South Tower Ridge Drive, Riverton

Provo: Harmony
275 East Center Street, Provo

Logan: Miles Roberts
107 South 200 East, Logan

Lehi: Brendan Wright
398 East Clay Lane, Lehi

In the coming weeks, you will likely hear that we have submitted our signatures. **This does not mean we are guaranteed a spot on the Republican primary ballot.** In recent elections, up to a third of signatures have been rejected by the Lt. Governor's office for a number of administrative reasons. We cannot lose momentum. We're close, but we need everyone to [continue (or start) gathering signatures](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=7128dc781a&e=10c1db3257), so we are ready to submit the next batch once we know how many of our signatures have been rejected. Once you have submitted your packet, [print a new one](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=adf19af4be&e=10c1db3257) and gather as many more signatures as you can.
---
|
---
|
# Official Candidate
---
|
---
|
---
| Last week I filed my official declaration of candidacy for the United States Senate! We're one step closer to bringing productive, proactive, and inclusive solutions to the senate!
---
|
---
|
# Artists For Becky
---
|
---
| I am honored to be joined by a team of local artists in spreading our campaign message. Over thirty of these artists have shared their rendition of our campaign logo and I am so touched by the careful work and hours that went into each of these unique pieces. We have included three pieces below with links to the artists' profiles. To see each rendition, search the #BeckyforUtahArt hashtag on Instagram or check out my [Instagram feed](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=6f728ff754&e=10c1db3257).

|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Sanctuary State Nightmare](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooTra-eIdGTM3S-aj5j6zw14iwp-pqvcf4Q_L-AqfnP5g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_7_final&n=1) Last Monday a deranged man killed his 3 daughters, another man, and then himself in a Sacramento church. We’ve now learned he was in the country illegally. Not only that, a few days before the murders he was arrested for assaulting a peace officer. ICE asked to be notified of his release, but never was. The reason: California’s Sanctuary State law forbids such communication with immigration authorities. This unspeakable tragedy was avoidable. I'm [calling on the Legislature](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharPNqxNzwoJ9Jl-ndC-0FVVYgTYi5tPtnnuZVfSVw3qkeg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_7_final&n=2) to end the Sanctuary State immediately. Fighting against the Sanctuary State was my first major battle in the Legislature. The bill’s author, Kevin de León (now running for LA Mayor), famously lost it when I grilled him in the Judiciary Committee. The Legislature even hired Eric Holder as an “advisor” on the Sanctuary State. But after [I pointed out](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27sUKHKCx5HRxeaG-wLAcxnBVVFoTHb0WvBdE3pwQP4SHLv6n_W_rgLx94JXJF4etCAIKnlkpYsO8a-nz7CSIWz_OCztfkYuKkQR1RxPmE2YA6d-J56R2UJBIorQ6JooHmzzj7Y6P2HbjVNNNv3V3A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_7_final&n=3) Holder’s hiring violated the Constitution, the Assembly cancelled his $25,000/month taxpayer-funded contract. Meanwhile, tomorrow is the vote on my bill to overturn Prop. 47. I’ll be joined at the Capitol by sheriffs, victim advocates, and business owners. (Details [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=T5He9HRd2mnp6QN0SYKMHEGgI-Mi0Nowc5mws1asme-cGpsTB9w5tuCOD6oZ19KFbNplpCU4MBqBWi56Fg1uj6TO1lr1jfn9SxFyjiqfgh_ul44VV-bqBhXZEp-UVMf8iSGcyE0u_T9BpQufEw4cbT-UvjMXigFckNie9FJHQY8&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_7_final&n=4)) This comes as the Democrats held their state convention this weekend. According to reports, they “avoided discussing crime.” Even they can see Californians have had enough. If ever there was a chance to end Prop. 47 and the Sanctuary State, this is it. [Support my fight against sanctuary policies](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_7_final&n=5) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAwB1PEZ-xE_-3qxuOJgOHQbYcAmVZvkEcPreBeaIP6Z_A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mar_7_final&n=6) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator

body:
Another Big Week!
| | | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
## March 7, 2022
---
| |
---
|
---
|
# Another big week on the campaign trail.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WALgpp6CJEq2xrRlI7RKQa12_bufYDGsUxHcgkuEu5ekheoNInFHLcMXW29P17lCA7FYOZstGJmDKQM9KJie6DYtZH71nUJxqqIsvNgRo03MBiMjKFiPyjtUbSTWc6KgW8tvNNFDqUXi7jaH4Grnew==&c=PT6iMntQVCuRYt_rD80G207WqFktyfVnyihQgBOW3VIQV_yEtAgq6A==&ch=YK4agMytZdqVFTbgQL7hwRJAqTXzEu6HziVmmGccHiE4sgGt3foccA==)
---
|
# If you are sick of career politicians, please donate RIGHT NOW to this campaign!
---
| | [Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WALgpp6CJEq2xrRlI7RKQa12_bufYDGsUxHcgkuEu5ekheoNInFHLY7FIFUGvPCGr9jEgdBjTCES5yvTz3k8Tl7jHQ2hM4RXcVGgNIR90QcXmkFONMEU3usysBOV-3677GyOVlHn0b_ADrlg7h0_TQ17mfkGROAkyfGHRq_S4pnaFWw_561W31QG6Zb72wrS&c=PT6iMntQVCuRYt_rD80G207WqFktyfVnyihQgBOW3VIQV_yEtAgq6A==&ch=YK4agMytZdqVFTbgQL7hwRJAqTXzEu6HziVmmGccHiE4sgGt3foccA==)
---
|
##

## Since owning a home is a core idea of the American Dream, we must fix the property tax problem to protect it.
##

Property taxes weigh heavily on Idaho. We collectively pay about $2 billion per year. With home values climbing like a caffeinated kid on a jungle gym, the annual letter from the County Assessor is not a letter many of us look forward to.
Rising property taxes, like other taxes, contribute to growth in the size of government. nothing chokes economic growth and personal freedom like taking money our of pockets and using it to create more bureaucracy. We want governments to operate inside a budget just like the rest of us.
The bottom line: Growth should pay for itself! No one should lose their home from unpredictable and skyrocketing property taxes.
---
| | [Read More](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WALgpp6CJEq2xrRlI7RKQa12_bufYDGsUxHcgkuEu5ekheoNInFHLcMXW29P17lCLa1rd3k-ljOYqK28yP-QUw8wsbW3YqztirfcMEjwvXlDmwmVgZRNZu-aPZJvB2_-39xOaJKz7fQm9njRGe_Aqha9lMJuCMtIeJozpwW1qDaoxcAW76RsBNvH0SY-uAWAiSaqPnbZ0YmWQ-2odNG8y7K6WTZ8ifdrlO_lhp9zaU4=&c=PT6iMntQVCuRYt_rD80G207WqFktyfVnyihQgBOW3VIQV_yEtAgq6A==&ch=YK4agMytZdqVFTbgQL7hwRJAqTXzEu6HziVmmGccHiE4sgGt3foccA==)
---
|
---
| |
---
|
# In the Press
---
| |
---
|
### Humphreys wants a debate.

By DEVIN WEEKS Staff Writer | March 3, 2022 1:00 AM Idaho gubernatorial candidate Ed Humphreys has been on the campaign trail for nearly 10 months. In his time traversing the Gem State, the Republican from Eagle said he's hearing that voters are concerned about being properly represented.
[Continue Reading CDA Press Article](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WALgpp6CJEq2xrRlI7RKQa12_bufYDGsUxHcgkuEu5ekheoNInFHLcMXW29P17lCYeaTE9SDx-SktOte83xbw1GAZQjKlQ_FqMePUIK9YGWwzmmxTpK0_kvZVlCQnFlsOAmhy0X2FHJWGQgPzoUfHebtsfzrzZ8y53jMbI93CoZ9hIhsXtpiI13Ghd8lWDepwZbdv5z68vDRJao08NyKs3bbKKGWZy9fiGBvvBmyeMY4mwKDNO4Yqaq0bp948ApxB-aPMcH5wa56l6GUcBmHlssdvmHJVD7brHffS9w740zlqR6j7n_fHGssj1gEWEgv&c=PT6iMntQVCuRYt_rD80G207WqFktyfVnyihQgBOW3VIQV_yEtAgq6A==&ch=YK4agMytZdqVFTbgQL7hwRJAqTXzEu6HziVmmGccHiE4sgGt3foccA==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
## A Peek at the Past Week
---
| | |
---
|
### March 5 - Avimor, ID

If elected then I would establish a temporary department to investigate and prosecute corruption in government! Great gathering in Avimor!
---
| | |
---
|
### March 3 - Genesee, ID

Do not play politics! Stand up for what you believe in! It's been a long trip to North Idaho and our last event was in Genesee. Lots of Humphreys signs appearing across the state!
---
| | |
---
|
### March 2 - Bonners Ferry, ID

As Governor I would BAN any state agency from hiring lobbyists!
---
| | |
---
|
### March 2 - Post Falls, ID

Freedom Convoy in North Idaho!
---
| | |
---
|
### March 1 - Sandpoint, ID

Our first time campaigning in Sandpoint. Everywhere in this state it has gone the same way. First we start with a small toehold. Then we gain a foothold. Then we have a beachhead!
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
# Principles Above Politics
---
|
---
| |
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.
It's time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It's time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept.

---

clean_body: Another Big Week! | | | | | | | March 7, 2022 | | | | Another big week on the campaign trail. | == | If you are sick of career politicians, please donate RIGHT NOW to this campaign! | | == | Since owning a home is a core idea of the American Dream, we must fix the property tax problem to protect it. Property taxes weigh heavily on Idaho. We collectively pay about $2 billion per year. With home values climbing like a caffeinated kid on a jungle gym, the annual letter from the County Assessor is not a letter many of us look forward to. Rising property taxes, like other taxes, contribute to growth in the size of government. nothing chokes economic growth and personal freedom like taking money our of pockets and using it to create more bureaucracy. We want governments to operate inside a budget just like the rest of us. The bottom line: Growth should pay for itself! No one should lose their home from unpredictable and skyrocketing property taxes. | | == | | | | In the Press | | | Humphreys wants a debate. By DEVIN WEEKS Staff Writer | March 3, 2022 1:00 AM Idaho gubernatorial candidate Ed Humphreys has been on the campaign trail for nearly 10 months. In his time traversing the Gem State, the Republican from Eagle said he's hearing that voters are concerned about being properly represented. == | | | | A Peek at the Past Week | | | | March 5 - Avimor, ID If elected then I would establish a temporary department to investigate and prosecute corruption in government! body:
I'm often told that because I'm black, I shouldn't be a Republican. I'm working daily to change the belief that Black Americans MUST be Democrats |
No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may [unsubscribe here](http://links.americansfordjt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_s=fee87ed7428c4eccbfedcdfca0cf1a50&_t=ySEqHnmdvSyOMP476jIX1ryfrkrE5v7iIfDyvVEZHmYFjqEie8yC7de9H63pOZN6NdObH0F6NQcaKYxueqHx0qtd6Qwhd6R_QTLzGEsOQGhqRU30m3FaJJRMvvNl-zH9kd3eTQ2tcitbExe_uCKSp4zpM_Q9BoPwLtIN8Cqm3eA%3D).

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fee87ed7428c4eccbfedcdfca0cf1a50&_e=KAR7uVj7OiCtdVEEZpt7ltlvuR8OrO2BOMi0b4i064L6P8Mum0k38IazQhVpeR9v-zKMm5v3gq_oboNimJe0mZkjaVFNB6GP0r169oA5pSE7WOAHgm5nKEupnt1Zi5XfcKJQpuduhXqqrGS8YKD458WqyetPPY1qjh2Lrj0huXD4KYkTC4OKX67gk2ob9-X62x201d-FNocXpwKu79b8zfCAwOLa1_dEvNDKLIYjceRbowKfeLXLTRhhMcwRvAPvnGsI0T-1JWj1_NTJhDOvXlKGd7Wjm_B4Env8OXzUo5PNJjcJEdK-3utz2NcnMYascqCgi4IiJsfzIMb105ohB0tTozqbDymy82pR-kSqa4Bvr7uPw7HREyZ3JM29qW3lMiXi6fY2sqFaoltusHUCwLGBUU64cSG3IHRa7b3EDpkPrFcmw_kd6JsMLe5pYTCEwctRPa0eQDK4JtzszraeyjzGoK96bH9q5jS2GfJX4dA%3D)

---
Fellow American,

Never believe the Left’s narrative that America is a racist country; that the American dream doesn’t exist anymore; or that the Constitution is a relic of the past that disproportionately benefits Anglo Americans.

I’m speaking with authority on the matter: **I’m a first generation Haitian-American whose parents came to this country, quite literally penniless, to pick crops in South Florida during the 1980s**. Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. **I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative**.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fee87ed7428c4eccbfedcdfca0cf1a50&_e=KAR7uVj7OiCtdVEEZpt7ltlvuR8OrO2BOMi0b4i064L6P8Mum0k38IazQhVpeR9v-zKMm5v3gq_oboNimJe0mZkjaVFNB6GP0r169oA5pSE7WOAHgm5nKEupnt1Zi5XfcKJQpuduhXqqrGS8YKD458WqyetPPY1qjh2Lrj0huXD4KYkTC4OKX67gk2ob9-X62x201d-FNocXpwKu79b8zfCAwOLa1_dEvNDKLIYjceRbowKfeLXLTRhhMcwRvAPvnGsI0T-1JWj1_NTJhDOvXtrgwVZrFMhtZA5H8de8K6VD4X5_zet6G4Eg_ZWa5zg5tAi0jaJcfrtugCOEKvRXx-K55gtfasR92B6LJ8VXm8EDE9gqI_SQz_2svpVfkmGNDF8F0i3vgHoA2q4R-m0xLKqP9cvFJoJhtFI4Wbdd5jDfP7JJBv_bdleNf-85wdvDgYcrFdL3AmwzA0aQYP_bgdSAc-0_BhahWg_dnW06AIw%3D)
My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today.
* I’m a military veteran (**I joined at 17**),
* I’m a lawyer (**I utilized the GI bill to pay for law school**)
* I’m a former Trump Administration appointee, having held various jobs during the four years President Trump held office.

**The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success.**

In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ _**freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction**_.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fee87ed7428c4eccbfedcdfca0cf1a50&_e=KAR7uVj7OiCtdVEEZpt7ltlvuR8OrO2BOMi0b4i064L6P8Mum0k38IazQhVpeR9v-zKMm5v3gq_oboNimJe0mZkjaVFNB6GP0r169oA5pSE7WOAHgm5nKEupnt1Zi5XfcKJQpuduhXqqrGS8YKD458WqyetPPY1qjh2Lrj0huXD4KYkTC4OKX67gk2ob9-X62x201d-FNocXpwKu79b8zfCAwOLa1_dEvNDKLIYjceRbowKfeLXLTRhhMcwRvAPvnGsI0T-1JWj1_NTJhDOvXloQ3Ls9F2x5eBetwCqlP5bIW6D558a5DXdIRqtjKIzoJvTCvgdAhFelk7UIvjkjNyNXMkQe8_RD9HUDbPZ1ZCBEnjOdRsnvlaPHoSNPLjf6C_-0Y5qmEw1uMiWskjxmjxp-i4MVmBqe8WusBZ3itTdIpuNWCCXb-mAkVqB3sNK-SoOzNGAn5CYdtOxkGw2tY_ysPBkfZkKOSjWxWGt9Ml0%3D)
I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, **[please consider chipping in whatever you can spare to my campaign today](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fee87ed7428c4eccbfedcdfca0cf1a50&_e=KAR7uVj7OiCtdVEEZpt7ltlvuR8OrO2BOMi0b4i064L6P8Mum0k38IazQhVpeR9v-zKMm5v3gq_oboNimJe0mZkjaVFNB6GP0r169oA5pSE7WOAHgm5nKEupnt1Zi5XfcKJQpuduhXqqrGS8YKD458WqyetPPY1qjh2Lrj0huXD4KYkTC4OKX67gk2ob9-X62x201d-FNocXpwKu79b8zfCAwOLa1_dEvNDKLIYjceRbowKfeLXLTRhhMcwRvAPvnGsI0T-1JWj1_NTJhDOvXotCOy5MNhJYhpu42nnSYAjVw8kuUiaHia5JMKd_8PBS9Q2r2w1rp5DALZzH9h51l6O_ImBUuuR_QFyi1mgOZg2ywRXVr-ZET4NZ48VPctRz-oAVztHEYK-uf8u4uEmhlStqpGmYNbDY_ExT3Im1hT-QeJwQxH22QxiSnjxcdo2RTiwNV63ULT6SfWv4l1PjaSE4yWlMMfF2_y1LoZIK8cs%3D)**. I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for.

[** PLEASE TAKE A CHANCE ON ME
MAKE A GIFT TODAY>>**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fee87ed7428c4eccbfedcdfca0cf1a50&_e=KAR7uVj7OiCtdVEEZpt7ltlvuR8OrO2BOMi0b4i064L6P8Mum0k38IazQhVpeR9v-zKMm5v3gq_oboNimJe0mZkjaVFNB6GP0r169oA5pSE7WOAHgm5nKEupnt1Zi5XfcKJQpuduhXqqrGS8YKD458WqyetPPY1qjh2Lrj0huXD4KYkTC4OKX67gk2ob9-X62x201d-FNocXpwKu79b8zfCAwOLa1_dEvNDKLIYjceRbowKfeLXLTRhhMcwRvAPvnGsI0T-1JWj1_NTJhDOvXse9NNQcvMn1a62ZFG6_mKeUGO6llsXMiugQa8zZ17wUz8ylM8j_Y3D0JCk17O-7QOk5fcpbidE0uE2SRViMkRD1YTASVbxzt-xnXN-XAGXYa940oNw94nVQCAEDRJMW0pqFJal6Ya_EbWZGoJdNjm63CSL1vlMsCVkFL4PXLYSnkz-CNpmc7k2NYiQ4xkw5pf8tBdMVt_psv-HaPPK_CCc%3D)
Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts.

I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. **I wasn’t happy with the high school I would have had to attend based off my parents address, so I traveled via public train and bus every day to attend one of my choice**. Having the option to attend a high school of my own choosing enabled me to become the man I am today.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=fee87ed7428c4eccbfedcdfca0cf1a50&_e=KAR7uVj7OiCtdVEEZpt7ltlvuR8OrO2BOMi0b4i064L6P8Mum0k38IazQhVpeR9v-zKMm5v3gq_oboNimJe0mZkjaVFNB6GP0r169oA5pSE7WOAHgm5nKEupnt1Zi5XfcKJQpuduhXqqrGS8YKD458WqyetPPY1qjh2Lrj0huXD4KYkTC4OKX67gk2ob9-X62x201d-FNocXpwKu79b8zfCAwOLa1_dEvNDKLIYjceRbowKfeLXLTRhhMcwRvAPvnGsI0T-1JWj1_NTJhDOvXhP1Gm_G_micJEf_G2rwS4ae5aBAV1VyKudw-fp8V0-MNy2yDBqVRB427etk6qdt4C5kv9Nqrl9tWD4_oy4URnDxZwGTsMaiNuZqSW0VEhpKg5zWyN3v5biPT7JF-ooFAt8TAWZg3O0FA_hIrBdL8CCPpCEIAd_QosumHmY1MKe8F5MBvCzTVLg4xbmXNMuJmY1BvS5xvZyiYxVxzu4QNjg%3D)
**I’d love to know where else in the world, immigrants from one of the Earth’s poorest nations could rise from homelessness and become successful business owners in a matter of two decades. All the while, raising their children with such success that one of them decides to seek federal office. **

Rising from poverty in Haiti to the middle class in South Florida wasn’t quick or easy, but _**what is worth having in life that is easy?**_ I learned from my parents that hard work and grit – along with perseverance – pays dividends. | _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

Now, less than forty years after my parents experienced food insecurity and homelessness, I’m running for Congress – as a Republican. I guess you could say that I don’t fit the Left’s definition of a conservative. My name is Rod Dorilas and I’d like to tell you a few important things about me and why I’m writing to you today. The thing I’m most proud about? My family built our own American Dream without the help of the government, or left-wing socialist politicians. And I’m running for Congress because some folks in DC just don’t understand that the government is not going to help make individuals successful – grit, determination and personal responsibility are keys to success. In his 1967 inaugural address as Governor of California, Ronald Reagan said, “ freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Coming from an immigrant family, I believe it’s my responsibility to fight to make sure that people in this country know how precious freedom - and the United States - truly is. I’m asking you to continue reading the rest of this email, but if you cannot, . I’ve accomplished a lot in my short career, but I’m not independently wealthy and can’t fund my own campaign. I know I would be an effective voice for our party – I just need to make sure people in my district know who I am and what I stand for. Every morning that I read the news, it’s more doom and gloom. No one talks about the American Dream anymore. But, my parents and I are living proof that it still exists – and will continue to exist for future generations of immigrants and native-born Americans alike if we wake up to the dangers posed by socialism NOW. That is going to take hard work on all of our parts. I know a thing or two about hard work, which I believe is one of the key characteristics missing in the folks representing us in Congress today. name: =?utf-8?Q?Emily?=
subject: What a field event we had!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Beach for Congress
body:
Sign up to volunteer today | | | | [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=ac3ca49557&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | | Peter,

WOW! What an amazing turnout we had Saturday at our Washington Park mobilization. It was a beautiful day with a crowd of motivated supporters who knocked on doors, took signs and buttons, and signed up for more canvassing shifts and house parties.
---
| [ ](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=90f844c093&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| I’m more energized than ever to take our message of courage, integrity, and hard work to the voters, but we don’t have any time to waste with ballots dropping in early May.

**I need your help now. **

[Will you sign up for one volunteer shift per week, just 2-3 hours of your time will make the difference for our campaign.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=38f339424b&e=de8b2615ea) Knock doors, phone voters we can’t reach at the door, host a house party or coffee to introduce me to your friends and colleagues, it all makes a huge difference to our success.
---
| [Sign Up To Volunteer!](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=8247a7673b&e=de8b2615ea "Sign Up To Volunteer!")
---
| Our message is resonating with voters. In these uncertain times throughout the world, voters value my military experience in Congress. As reproductive freedom is under attack across the country, voters understand how important it is to have a female voice in Congress fighting for our right to choose, pay equity, affordable childcare, paid parental leave, and education. With women representing only 27% of Congress, electing women is more critical than ever.

[Please consider donating $50, $150, $250 to our campaign today to help us pay for our walk pieces, more signs (we’re almost out of our first run!) and getting our ads up on the air.](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=d7b271784e&e=de8b2615ea) We can't do this without your support.
---
| [Donate](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=9d28072174&e=de8b2615ea "Donate")
---
| Let’s do this together!
---
| Sincerely,

Emily Beach
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=65ad1a376e&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | [](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=9a1859f168&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | [](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=f3474f8acc&e=de8b2615ea)
---
| | [](https://emilybeachforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e1f6cc5ae5297bf855964ce9b&id=ae799c93b9&e=de8b2615ea)
---
|

name: Jessica LaVigne
subject: Honored to stand with Governor Roberts
body:
The momentum in this race is shifting our way. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698071/333956283/1495595426?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTEwZTc5MC03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG520_aDI40R4OlSllnJZ13i3D6WYWv4YmI1Q9Ux9OU=&emci=509d7e44-719e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3e10e790-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126)
---
| | [**Last week former Governor Barbara Roberts endorsed Tobias for Governor!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698073/333956285/1495595426?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTEwZTc5MC03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG520_aDI40R4OlSllnJZ13i3D6WYWv4YmI1Q9Ux9OU=&emci=509d7e44-719e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3e10e790-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126) The momentum in this race is shifting our way, Peter.

Governor Roberts is a legendary Governor of our state. Not only was she the first woman to serve as our Governor, she was also a trailblazing policymaker on LGBTQ rights and disability rights. She has a lifetime of service to Oregonians everywhere, and we’re honored that she’s joining our team as we build a better future.

So take it from _Willamette Week_ that this is a big deal: [**“a big boost for Read that Roberts is on his side.”**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698075/333956287/-825591912?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTEwZTc5MC03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG520_aDI40R4OlSllnJZ13i3D6WYWv4YmI1Q9Ux9OU=&emci=509d7e44-719e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3e10e790-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698077/333956289/-825591912?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTEwZTc5MC03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hG520_aDI40R4OlSllnJZ13i3D6WYWv4YmI1Q9Ux9OU=&emci=509d7e44-719e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=3e10e790-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=30662126) **The issues we’re facing with rising crime, homelessness, and flagging schools are tremendous, but if Oregonians work together there’s nothing we can’t do.** That’s why Tobias and I are proud to have you on the team alongside Governor Roberts.

Stay safe,

Jessica LaVigne

name: Tom Perez
subject: Fair maps are a civil rights issue.
body:
People should pick their representatives, not the other way around.
#

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698143/333957100/-1125576451?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjY1OTdhYy03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AdidRhQ4GDERiw0tApbmouO_-UfCePqRrQ_5u2pSIM=&emci=c3efd8a7-0d9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=426597ac-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)
Hi team,

Supporters of voting rights recently won a huge victory when a District Court judge rightly struck down a redistricting plan proposed by the Baltimore County Council.

Their proposed map was a textbook violation of the Voting Rights Act. Councilmembers now have a golden opportunity to craft a map that reflects the rich diversity of Maryland's third-largest jurisdiction.

As a crucial member of my team, I want to hear from **you** directly:
**_[Do you support the District Court Judge's decision to strike down the Baltimore County Council's map?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698144/333957101/-1125576451?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjY1OTdhYy03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AdidRhQ4GDERiw0tApbmouO_-UfCePqRrQ_5u2pSIM=&emci=c3efd8a7-0d9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=426597ac-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)_**
******[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698145/333957102/-1125576451?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjY1OTdhYy03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AdidRhQ4GDERiw0tApbmouO_-UfCePqRrQ_5u2pSIM=&emci=c3efd8a7-0d9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=426597ac-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)******
Team, I have served at the local level, and I have great respect for the challenges that the members of the County Council face on a day-to-day basis. At the same time, civil rights remains the unfinished business of America, and **voting is the most fundamental of rights.**

Now that the court has struck down this map, the County Council has a chance for a do-over to draw a fair map that allows for more equitable representation, greater civic participation, and will empower Baltimore County to better meet the diverse needs of its diverse residents. Indeed, creating a second Black majority is both a legal and moral imperative ** –****** but I want to hear from **you:**
**_[Do you support the District Court Judge's decision to strike down the Baltimore County Council's map?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698146/333957103/-1125576451?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjY1OTdhYy03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AdidRhQ4GDERiw0tApbmouO_-UfCePqRrQ_5u2pSIM=&emci=c3efd8a7-0d9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=426597ac-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)_**
******[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698147/333957104/-1125576451?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjY1OTdhYy03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AdidRhQ4GDERiw0tApbmouO_-UfCePqRrQ_5u2pSIM=&emci=c3efd8a7-0d9c-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=426597ac-729e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=14684837)******
Thank you for taking a moment to share your voice with me – I am hopeful that the council will take full advantage of this opportunity to draw a map that will empower **_everyone_****.**

Sincerely,

Tom Perez
******[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42698148/333957105/-1235548580?refcode=BPI-em-null-null-null-20220304-RedistrictingPoll&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjY1OTdhYy03MjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AdidRhQ4GDERiw0tApbmouO_-UfCePqRrQ_5u2pSIM=)******
Authority: Tom Perez for Maryland, Stanley J. Botts, Treasurer.
Tom Perez for Maryland
PO BOX 5389
TAKOMA PARK, MD 20913-5389
United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:

Friend, We’re up against the National GOP’s fundraising machine. The GOP committee fighting to flip the Senate has raised over $120 million to funnel into states like Colorado. A Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC raised over $90 million to target Democrats like Michael. And two of his GOP opponents have already resorted to writing their campaigns big checks and could continue to do so when supporter enthusiasm is low. There’s a lot of money circling Colorado’s Senate race this cycle, but our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Campaigns aren’t necessarily about who has the most money — but we do need to have a solid foundation to compete. If you start a monthly gift today, it will help us plan more strategically and help us fend off attacks against Michael’s record and amplify his victories for Colorado in the long term. And since Michael doesn’t take a dime from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs, your monthly support will make a big difference in this campaign. Some of Michael’s opponents know that if fundraising slows for a month, they can cut themselves a huge check. We rely on grassroots supporters like you, so having a set amount of dollars we can count on coming through the door every month helps us plan efficiently and win this race. **So we’re asking****: Can you commit to being a monthly supporter today? clean_body: | = Friend, We’re up against the National GOP’s fundraising machine. The GOP committee fighting to flip the Senate has raised over $120 million to funnel into states like Colorado. A Mitch McConnell-aligned super PAC raised over $90 million to target Democrats like Michael. And two of his GOP opponents have already resorted to writing their campaigns big checks and could continue to do so when supporter enthusiasm is low. There’s a lot of money circling Colorado’s Senate race this cycle, but our campaign is powered by supporters like you. Campaigns aren’t necessarily about who has the most money — but we do need to have a solid foundation to compete. If you start a monthly gift today, it will help us plan more strategically and help us fend off attacks against Michael’s record and amplify his victories for Colorado in the long term. And since Michael doesn’t take a dime from federal lobbyists or corporate PACs, your monthly support will make a big difference in this campaign. Some of Michael’s opponents know that if fundraising slows for a month, they can cut themselves a huge check. We rely on grassroots supporters like you, so having a set amount of dollars we can count on coming through the door every month helps us plan efficiently and win this race. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I don’t know how to say this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:

---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

Instead, the policies that shape our lives will continue to be dictacted by billionaires and lobbyists who have no qualms whatsoever about doing harm to our communities for the sake of profit.

body:
Read what's new with Tanya's campaign. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f65f6560b8b3/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-6797169?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
The momentum behind Team Tanya continues to grow and our team is putting in the work. Our week was spent knocking on doors, tabling at the Crosswinds Gun Show and C2 Tactical, and attending grassroots events all over AZ-04. We can feel the energy building and would love for you to join our movement. If you're interested, hit reply and we'll tell you how you can get involved!

**22 More Days to Get Tanya on the Ballot!! We need your help!!**

We need to get as many petition signatures as possible to get Tanya on the ballot, as well as to show the Democrats that we mean business in AZ-04 by blowing past our signature total goal.

If you haven't signed Tanya's petition yet, you can sign it [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=c81d107c7b&e=bd2b55b0e3).

Do you have a little time to help get your neighbors and friends on board? Whether you have 30 min, two hours or all day, any time you have would be so helpful. If you have a little spare time, hit reply or text or call us at 480-420-7822 and our team will get you everything you need.

**ICYMI: Winning for Women Endorsed Tanya**

Winning for Women, a national group committed to helping strong, viable female candidates in their primaries and general elections, endorsed Tanya this week. A record number of women have filed to run for federal office this year and Winning for Women has only endorsed 19 so far. Tanya is proud to be one of them! It's also worth noting that Winning for Women has a strong track record of success - 87% of their endorsed candidates win their primary. This shows that Tanya has what it takes to go the distance and keep fighting for East Valley families.
---
| **Don't Forget!**
* Sign Tanya's Petition [HERE](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=5c288ca22a&e=bd2b55b0e3)
* Follow the campaign trail on [Instagram](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=23ce0480a0&e=bd2b55b0e3).
* Get news and updates on [Twitter](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=6675387d0a&e=bd2b55b0e3) and [Facebook](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=8baac04050&e=bd2b55b0e3).

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Our Founders admired these heroes
body:
Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhp1131dq1jiedqmtheqafd06oh2aqnhtml4tcug_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdieeor5chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65shk69hmecb366p3dcdk6ep63cpgmti78ojnmap68t5m6ph7ec5mepir6o70s8rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup3cphh6iqjadtielj31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg6tsecjvegtmechkmdne2lofd80cq59ff2s1t98_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdieeor5chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, Do any of these names sound familiar to you: Brutus, Publius, Cato, Cicero, or Cincinnatus? While many Americans today wouldn’t recognize these names, our Founding Fathers admired and studied these heroes of the Roman Republic. If you’ve ever read _The Federalist Papers_ or visited Cincinnati, Ohio, they may ring a bell.
---
| | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf84c2aj2qmg804mqpdr2crl3pc1vbfrj51fbun8_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdieeor5chh2bs)
---
| | That’s because many of our Founders looked at the heroes of the Roman Republic as models of civic virtue to emulate. Likewise, they viewed the descent of Rome into tyranny and discord as a cautionary tale their new republican form of government was designed to address. These are a few of the reasons we’re releasing our newest free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** next month. Our Founders knew that the Roman Republic provided an essential study for every person interested in free government, military strategy, political theory, and the perennial questions of human nature. ** **Now you can learn these same lessons with Hillsdale College...for free!** Remember, courses like **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** are free and supported entirely by the generosity of friends like you. We rely on the generous funding provided by so many. I want you to know that a donation is NOT required to experience the full course—it’s truly free and open to all who wish to learn as part of the College’s mission. **So please, pre-register today, even if you can’t make a gift to support the course or our other educational outreach.** [_**You can watch the trailer and pre-register now for “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” at this secure page »**_](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi2ookoturop40q6abmmr3kh72ieal63l27v59r0_rp22sh2s8i66ob3cdieeor5chh2bs) __ Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:
| What we want to know from you today is this: The mainstream media wants us to believe that Biden is tacking to the center in the second year of his administration. **[Do you buy it?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f115a281da194b3f9bdd82c0c5b8d7d7&_e=FAJEdA6LeZDBq8O38-kgfEwvXwnSqfdy7FNEoDaAPZCOIiT2C4PoQq0tOmlIBYXU31qcx72osx_62o8n8sXUMWbAdLNwID-ioANcvNfJro0dXJO73EP9MgYgRyipPjSPWEIfw8kpuWQF1ju3zSsT7OsfePEK1JEY4Cic_lMtS3nw_BE0IyUQcWs3WLaLG9FlRGlQhVIE8xYvT2gBqXZkepszFsTQKg_OCIzDjwwhfWAt66WZQjzgEJU7GxtF2jKjaokKf2hSjwCbOHFPHPGyX0kd9Izm4E5h19MXc8IN3UA28tTCWNoALt3dMU3WFjZnr2-AZ1GEVtiSvVKwkQMwy3ug3LGHQklVBIRsXcyKQvf0XMsm9Q2aO2lZeM28eJXm3V6O_Qg61V1Plf64xdjUn5xhHL9_ls0pCC5mkI4zjLSlk-YfP8cD5SfKogHWhxkXMdVG-fc_WQa0UBkM1UHHMW_l1rWkTaVI5bm0G8EkiEQ%3D)**

| **Is Biden's move to the center all politics?**
SURVEY REQUEST FOR: _\- empty -_
ID: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

[**LET US KNOW >> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f115a281da194b3f9bdd82c0c5b8d7d7&_e=FAJEdA6LeZDBq8O38-kgfEwvXwnSqfdy7FNEoDaAPZCOIiT2C4PoQq0tOmlIBYXU31qcx72osx_62o8n8sXUMWbAdLNwID-ioANcvNfJro0dXJO73EP9MgYgRyipPjSPWEIfw8kpuWQF1ju3zSsT7OsfePEK1JEY4Cic_lMtS3nw_BE0IyUQcWs3WLaLG9FlRGlQhVIE8xYvT2gBqXZkepszFsTQKg_OCIzDjwwhfWAt66WZQjzgEJU7GxtF2jKju_wGQBS6Sp5dWbl3kXiuTNTbTQyTOG_h7oh5t34vCLSfRn2wcHf2xrX7KqRZPmsWkjNAd8JwjgDB17JK7OG71-Pg-y23DNeuaCDHoEkY5kIin8EhY9NdKvBS4wa54T4xuaL0wLxlwo8G9LBx_2xFyxmB9doAfWWgk5qIi5UlDBbfF-yMN2YxK4GiHNy9ZTEXZU1iyEUv5hP6Tz58MsH39BVdM2QYEds-gkruFwYtHCg%3D)

---

Fellow patriot,

Squad” members AOC and Cori Bush are MAD.

They’re reeling from what they **DIDN’T hear** President Biden talk about in his State of the Union speech on Tuesday night.

Whether or not the president is actually “moving to the center” in year two, as Politico put it, remains to be seen (we doubt it very much); nonetheless, progressives didn’t like what he had to say.

Rep. Cori Bush took to Twitter to urge Biden to “**Defund the police. Invest in our communities.** ”

She was joined on Twitter by AOC who offered her own stinging rebuke of the President Biden’s “**climate agenda.** ”

One senator in attendance for Biden’s speech remarked after the president left the Capitol said that “ _**They just can’t help themselves**_ ,” alluding to the President and his team’s wishes to resuscitate the “Build Back Better” bill which went to the graveyard in December.

Yep - despite calling the bill by a new name and changing the way he referenced certain pieces of the legislation – President Biden and his team still very much want to pass the Build Back Better social spending bill.

What we want to know from you today is this: The mainstream media wants us to believe that Biden is tacking to the center in the second year of his administration. **[Do you buy it?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f115a281da194b3f9bdd82c0c5b8d7d7&_e=FAJEdA6LeZDBq8O38-kgfEwvXwnSqfdy7FNEoDaAPZCOIiT2C4PoQq0tOmlIBYXU31qcx72osx_62o8n8sXUMWbAdLNwID-ioANcvNfJro0dXJO73EP9MgYgRyipPjSPWEIfw8kpuWQF1ju3zSsT7OsfePEK1JEY4Cic_lMtS3nw_BE0IyUQcWs3WLaLG9FlRGlQhVIE8xYvT2gBqXZkepszFsTQKg_OCIzDjwwhfWAt66WZQjzgEJU7GxtF2jKj6JMqqwBRMXhkHFUO6RGldLqrO3Ky7oXZvW9PAo-zIh8MrbbT77ec_ANwtI9tOJVu5kBqKnzwMc31Ck_DvxbLTcyD5E0CY_I14T40JIU93gj6Pu9Y3vr46Svb_-f4PQbp-X5CL-dsG-SBCKs5HJOnpmHSJV8_4Cuzl-_5WpL2MFWwufSDe8-aOC2HS8B-FDQArYcg_irRP2DThRlkWDliBzPvy3hTua54Y7i717jxass%3D)**

**Is Biden's move to the center all politics?**
SURVEY REQUEST FOR: _\- empty -_
ID: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>

[**LET US KNOW >> **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f115a281da194b3f9bdd82c0c5b8d7d7&_e=FAJEdA6LeZDBq8O38-kgfEwvXwnSqfdy7FNEoDaAPZCOIiT2C4PoQq0tOmlIBYXU31qcx72osx_62o8n8sXUMWbAdLNwID-ioANcvNfJro0dXJO73EP9MgYgRyipPjSPWEIfw8kpuWQF1ju3zSsT7OsfePEK1JEY4Cic_lMtS3nw_BE0IyUQcWs3WLaLG9FlRGlQhVIE8xYvT2gBqXZkepszFsTQKg_OCIzDjwwhfWAt66WZQjzgEJU7GxtF2jKjGRuzcwgjeRNLj8qQ1FlXq-PzLBctFJr0UXEo46-04y2m6shbFghUHgjc5UvfIzp3RfuRDRI4Ha92ym7TVEsztfGlxkwW3m1hLP9QP6i2R8urF2CsZReyFnwfUQTeK02T_PVk8G2JM0Mc6DKFbvAcFkRgE6QGxvINZ7hi6XFfFy-eL68iCnsEw25lj0zJXiDKlc6iKGZHyChCSeKXp2C1TrVfTsfLiEKUktX1bf9nKZE%3D)

name: Sheriff Joe Lombardo
subject: One month closer to ending Single Party Rule
body:
There’s now just eight months left until we END the Single Party Rule in Carson City that has held back our state.
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Xp3svuwMivXfWA-08zjxxl_9esUgQCZ98hO6aXTgfH67h9KRmJWezE91HD4xzmmG5Qy6VI54XpF_0-7RZLk5JNRnzgA-Y8wARO4qkABhNX_tYQMOCkuDCqK33-PULXHrl0Ub75ge6S8Dbsi81ta_efMCLr2VYFnyIDJH4P3gE0TYDtCioAMciKcEFTqgamSNu51QQyVUinjwKGIgg-TqPIMR67qg_QODtELLo4Oa6Ls=&c=C4CHAU5_yHYeEAtyDvS7O1A4-7HtoBvCazusvNFxMe3-5z-Cqo2OOQ==&ch=hcayvYxoTip_x_C6GoXBv6gOUxFdyBn5x596Vw3ATmUQ0hEi8Ueh9A==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
There's now just eight months left until we END the Single Party Rule in Carson City that has held back our state.
In their Nevada, these unchecked politicians have been prioritizing criminals. And for the police officers like me and my team who are tasked with keeping streets safe, our job becomes more difficult.
But in OUR Nevada, that all changes... We're one month closer to taking this great state back, and getting to work making it SAFER and more SECURE.
I hope you'll help the campaign finish strong in this homestretch - because Nevada isn't going to reach its potential as long as the Democrats in charge are focused on helping those who break our laws by passing legislation that is in favor of criminals and less in favor of law abiding citizens like you!
We're going to be at our best when we're looking out for the interests of folks like YOU, who make our state the greatest in the country!
---

clean_body: There’s now just eight months left until we END the Single Party Rule in Carson City that has held back our state. | | | | | | | == | | Peter, There's now just eight months left until we END the Single Party Rule in Carson City that has held back our state. In their Nevada, these unchecked politicians have been prioritizing criminals. And for the police officers like me and my team who are tasked with keeping streets safe, our job becomes more difficult. But in OUR Nevada, that all changes... We're one month closer to taking this great state back, and getting to work making it SAFER and more SECURE. I hope you'll help the campaign finish strong in this homestretch - because Nevada isn't going to reach its potential as long as the Democrats in charge are focused on helping those who break our laws by passing legislation that is in favor of criminals and less in favor of law abiding citizens like you! We're going to be at our best when we're looking out for the interests of folks like YOU, who make our state the greatest in the country! | | | == | | | == | Come November, we're going to blaze a new trail forward - our rights, our elections, our prosperity, and the freedom we enjoy as part of the Nevada Way of Life are going to be SECURED. == | | | == | Thank you for being in my corner, Sheriff Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Box 371176, Las Vegas, NV 89137 | | Sent by mailto:info@joelombardofornv.com

name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: A chance to send 3 pediatricians to Congress (for the first time!)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42690413/333918905/1531205560?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220307aaksycsplit_YC_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RhNjVmYS00YzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OfkJcwNF2T16tcrsrgpKnF2b8mnvRPw439CELcqDoo=)
---
Hello, Peter! This is shaping up to be a historic election year. For the very first time, voters could send not one, not two, but _three_ women pediatricians to Congress. I want to introduce you to these incredible women, who, like me, are also running campaigns in districts critical to Democrats’ hopes of holding the House. [_**Split a donation between all three of our campaigns today!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42690414/333918906/969657069?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220307aaksycsplit_YC_allop_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RhNjVmYS00YzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OfkJcwNF2T16tcrsrgpKnF2b8mnvRPw439CELcqDoo=)
* **Rep. Kim Schrier** , M.D. is a pediatrician and mom representing Washington State’s 8th District. Healthcare has always been Kim's passion. She was diagnosed with Type 1 diabetes as a teenager. Spending all that time in doctors' offices led to her career as a pediatrician. She knows firsthand what it means to worry about health insurance and rising costs. Rep. Schrier recently introduced legislation to make it easier to hire doctors to help with staffing shortages during this pandemic, and future crises. Kim also helped pass COVID-19 relief to families and small businesses, including the extended Child Tax Credit. Rep. Schrier’s race is one of the most competitive in the country and Cook Political Report has rated WA-08 as a "toss-up."

* **Dr. Annie Andrews** is a pediatrician, Associate Professor of Pediatrics, and community advocate in South Carolina, and Democratic candidate for South Carolina's First Congressional District. Dr. Andrews is a gun violence prevention researcher and active volunteer with Moms Demand Action, working to reduce pediatric firearm injuries and educate her community about gun safety. While Dr. Andrews is focused on improving the lives of her patients, her opponent rails against China and vaccine mandates all day on Twitter and is endorsed by Trump lackey Nikki Haley.

As pediatricians, we are all driven to help our communities, on issues ranging from bringing down drug prices and consumer costs, to protecting the environment, and rebuilding our broken infrastructure. **We believe in investing in _concrete solutions_ that will improve the daily lives of our patients and millions of Americans.** | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42690415/333918907/1531205560?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220307aaksycsplit_YC_allop_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RhNjVmYS00YzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OfkJcwNF2T16tcrsrgpKnF2b8mnvRPw439CELcqDoo=)
---
Today, I’m asking you to help us hold the House and grow our Democratic majority, so that we can ensure a brighter, healthier future for our kids and families. [_**Will you split a donation between all three of our campaigns to bring sound science and compassionate health professionals to Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42690416/333918908/1531205560?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220307aaksycsplit_YC_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RhNjVmYS00YzllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6OfkJcwNF2T16tcrsrgpKnF2b8mnvRPw439CELcqDoo=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Many thanks,
Dr. Yadira Caraveo

| Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. Her parents raised her and her siblings on her father’s construction worker’s salary in Adams County. In the legislature, Dr. Caraveo has delivered for working Coloradans by standing up to the biggest corporate bullies and entrenched special interests.
