clean_body: Thousands of patients around the world were under the care of Dr. Bob Lorinser. They entrusted him with their personal health. Dr. Bob recognized some serious problems in for-profit healthcare early in his career.| | | "I trusted Dr. Bob with my health, and I'll trust him as my Congressman" - Manuel Vigil, Master Sergeant US Air Force (Ret. '94) = "I recognized some serious problems in for-profit healthcare early in my career and made sure to always stay true to the reason I pursued medicine ─ to take care of people. I'd be honored to continue taking care of people like Manny through better policies in Congress." - Dr. Bob Lorinser = | | = MARQUETTE, Mich. ━ Dr. Bob Lorinser started his career in the '80s as a social worker in a Veteran's hospital in Minnesota. Since, he's served thousands of patients across the world, from Navajo Nation, Marquette, Sawyer Air Force Base, Crystal Falls, North Africa, Korea, East Asia, and across the Middle East. Some of his most beloved patients are here in the First District, including Manuel (Manny) Vigil, a retired Master Sergeant in the U.S. Air Force. Dr. Bob was Vigil's primary care physician during a 30-year-career of practicing medicine in Marquette. "I'm voting for Dr. Bob," said Vigil. "He is the most honest and sincere person I've known, and I say this with many years of knowing him. As my doctor, Dr. Lorinser always made me feel very comfortable. His recommendations for my meds were some he was taking himself and it made me feel good to know they were "tried, tested and approved" by a doctor. Manny Vigil reflected on an evening when Dr. Bob called him at home concerned about lab results. "That's how he was with his patients." To Dr. Lorinser, being a physician meant working where others wouldn't. Many of his patients were low-income Medicaid and Medicare recipients. He made house-calls. He administered free flu shots for youth sports teams. He served patients struggling with behavioral and mental health, the elderly, expecting mothers, new families, people with physical and cognitive disabilities, Indigenous communities, active and retired service members, and, like Manny Vigil ─ retired Veterans. = On-call or not, it was not uncommon for people in his care to page Dr. Bob late at night or early in the morning with health concerns. If serious, he would consult many patients right in his living room before recommending emergency care or facilitating hospitalization. "Vote for Dr. Bob," said Vigil. "He won't just get elected and disappear like the occupant filling this office, hobnobbing with others like him in D.C., bragging about one accomplishment in his two terms." Although Dr. Bob's opponent claims credit for the Soo Locks upgrades , many people directly involved with the legislation contest his involvement. Jack Bergman also recently voted against the Bipartisan Infrastructure Plan that allocated nearly a $500 million for the Soo Locks. "Dr. Bob will be here with us, listening to our concerns ─ not just in the U.P., but Northern Michigan as well," said Vigil. "I am proud to say Dr. Bob was my doctor, my care provider. I always trusted him with decisions concerning my health, and I will most definitely trust his decisions as Congressman in the 1st District. I will definitely be beating the drums for Congressman Lorinser." = | | = | The Friends of Dr. Bob campaign is committed to meaningful content, and we genuinely hope recipients enjoy the quality of stories we share. But, when we're not on the same page as our readers, we've already sent our least favorite kind of message. So, we take ample opportunity to highlight that you may opt out if you feel you've received our e-mails error. Please do not hesitate to. We completely understand, and hopefully we'll connect in a format you find more welcoming.# # # END OF MESSAGE Dr. Bob Lorinser is a retired member of the U.S. Department of State's Foreign Services. Manny Vigil is a retired member of the United States Air Force. The use of military or diplomatic rank, job title, and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement for Dr. Lorinser by the U.S. State Department, Department of the Air Force, or the Department of Defense. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Alexandria, Greg, and Jess are growing the progressive movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Our movement will keep fighting to elect progressive champions like Greg and Jess — but we can’t do it without your support.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220307-2845-header&t=1&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)
**Last week, Greg Casar won his primary election with 61% of the vote in TX-35!**
_“$15 an hour won. Medicare for All won. The PRO Act won. Reproductive rights won. Immigrant rights won. The Movement for Black Lives won. LGBTQIA+ rights won. Working families won.”_ — Greg
Alexandria and our movement are fighting to elect more progressive leaders to Congress who will fight to advance the legislative priorities and policies that all working families need and deserve.
**In Texas, she endorsed Greg Casar and Jessica Cisneros knowing they would champion working families. Jess pushed a nine-term incumbent into a runoff election in TX-28 after a neck-and-neck primary race, so it’s all hands on deck now to ensure another progressive win in Texas!**
[If you’re ready to join Alexandria in building a bigger progressive movement, will you split a $6 contribution today between Jessica’s campaign and our movement to help elect her?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220307?refcode=em20220307-2845-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2845_2526796_jYAgXC&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)
**[Contribute $6](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220307?refcode=em20220307-2845-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2845_2526796_jYAgXC&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)**
_"Together, we will take control back from Big Oil, private prisons, and Wall Street, and put it back where it belongs: with the people.”_ — Jessica
Jessica’s opponent is the most conservative Democrat in the US House, in fact, he’s the only member of his caucus to oppose abortion rights. And just weeks ahead of the primary, his house was searched by the FBI.
On the other hand, Jessica, a Mexican-American immigration and human rights lawyer, is fighting for healthcare as a human right, reproductive justice, and prioritizing the needs of working families.
Our movement will keep fighting to expand progressive leadership in Congress by electing progressive champions like Jess and Greg — but we can’t do it without your support.
[Join us in supporting and investing in leaders like Jessica Cisneros who who embody the ideals of racial, social, economic, and environmental justice by splitting a $6 contribution today — and let’s advance another progressive champion in Texas.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220307?refcode=em20220307-2845-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2845_2526796_jYAgXC&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)
Pa’lante!
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220307?refcode=em20220307-2845-P_FND_ANO_END&t=23&refcode2=2845_2526796_jYAgXC&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220307-2845-P_FND_ANO_END&t=24&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2845%2E2526796%2EjYAgXC)

name: Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ
subject: Your monthly foreign policy briefing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
One thing is clear at this moment: sanctions are not enough to deter Putin both now and in the long-run [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=a2d4009a4e024615b1283d7ab711a56c&_e=hCY7Qwr0GGdDbKeoq3VQP76Yma5Ofant_IHpRFSY-UhUc5MsyQUaYIB-Yg42znayiVROC_ee4PRrGDkqjsuMmaib1ik4W01mi9lL5kYPO-jx9Xb6NnKr-XPHzITJ1X0EBE2dqdjB_RnqFI_IY_muETXqB3C_sdhjLPfocA2msaQrCMD-tYn732WctIJLY4e0hrg41IQF6Rl8o-pc9WV-mIbD9Zl4KLV6KiMWtkDngOfRZrzugm4x64WnYFfADveqz6ZY8bdRXIdPSlct23Zlbq_45X9AAcicDlVWeDX7wxQbNzgCv9NJbxrl4Ypp8qIvpFafeOKHz7xQDNJwsCk5ZEcJswz9NnrhgVtTpp03zUtQOZZH2SfeLETSbaQkJ-F-oIJRKjzZ3tqh_grKF26vz_UqoqYmS3cfZLyRH_eHTZZEpo5nV65VocwvMQih07ox) Peter, As Russia continues to attack Ukraine completely unprovoked, it’s clear that sanctions are not enough to deter Putin both now and in the long run. Like Ukraine, it’s time for the Biden Administration to show some courage by arming our allies, keeping nuclear weapons out of the hands of our enemies, and ultimately stopping this war from spilling over into other parts of the world. Catch up on all of Mike’s recent interviews below and [**add your name here**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=a2d4009a4e024615b1283d7ab711a56c&_e=hCY7Qwr0GGdDbKeoq3VQP76Yma5Ofant_IHpRFSY-UhUc5MsyQUaYIB-Yg42znayiVROC_ee4PRrGDkqjsuMmaib1ik4W01mi9lL5kYPO-jx9Xb6NnKr-XPHzITJ1X0EBE2dqdjB_RnqFI_IY_muETXqB3C_sdhjLPfocA2msaQrCMD-tYn732WctIJLY4e0hrg41IQF6Rl8o-pc9WV-mIbD9Zl4KLV6KiMWtkDngOddXbLT4kiayneGxdbpy0GvcvC9gnr-vYpK2Tpa4ZR5CFhofIpmIzKq3ShOsOTpYFJwzyAnwY_kluGAePeJAIV7HUvRo9VMSUhTqNiJVbQ6mJJuD_jNw3BvWu6PHB2vQRlDpsfYJTv6EA2CIgeMPMiPOzIhog9uTsb-ncGsK1c8FtlukoHktkkibGYDhaEQZch7GaAqxrJWyarZkYrl8GpI)**** to tell Biden to take stronger action in support of Ukraine. **"It’s Time for America to Wake Up"** [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=a2d4009a4e024615b1283d7ab711a56c&_e=hCY7Qwr0GGdDbKeoq3VQP6d1c8c1PKdnDx0PGEj5caYzKMWjK4Q_ohJ_mNoDMdpgRqYosWGr2sKNmu6YIpsg3V2z52ro1ewLLUZXt077neJWMBkZFmJAZWZ46jdBLvhOBuHMU8BW6M3hil50_UuwYJh_DWloPhtzNyzke962MPz8Xqk9Prc9XSYtXt8qr1xbvgym3_0whuf2ojl7F7SxZjvObEISMpyvAbKGvpEXGi5xkwUSDZR5fD1BHan40uqnm4idqgp9jTOx6Nw28MpmPaeD6-hJLvD55zB9usikz841JPa3YdJ68yvd2Lw2nK5kQ9BYsc1f2JGsQ3TAjJDM-ZEt6VJsk3sSqSwnnXeazj5mU8ycxB4OUlpajXHrFzkwG-rDUR30a9E0RBbRM_5m6d31B3VeWAVNYwfQbRkudwU%3D) **Bottom Line:****_“_**** _Shame on us for being so slow to help a friend, our friends in Ukraine who are demonstrating the will to fight. We could have armed them to the teeth. clean_body: One thing is clear at this moment: sanctions are not enough to deter Putin both now and in the long-run Peter, As Russia continues to attack Ukraine completely unprovoked, it’s clear that sanctions are not enough to deter Putin both now and in the long run. Like Ukraine, it’s time for the Biden Administration to show some courage by arming our allies, keeping nuclear weapons out of the hands of our enemies, and ultimately stopping this war from spilling over into other parts of the world. Catch up on all of Mike’s recent interviews below and ** to tell Biden to take stronger action in support of Ukraine. "It’s Time for America to Wake Up" Bottom Line:**“ Shame on us for being so slow to help a friend, our friends in Ukraine who are demonstrating the will to fight. We could have armed them to the teeth. It wouldn't have required us to put our own boots on the ground, and made this even more difficult for Vladimir Putin.But of course, the Biden administration was wedded to this threat of sanctions, the only strategy that ultimately failed to deter Putin." “Thugs like Putin are not going to be deterredby strongly-worded statements.” Bottom Line:“ [The Biden Admin] is testing the theory that in a gunfight, they can prevail with sanctions and sternly worded statements.They have not brought guns to a gunfight. I don't think that's going to be sufficient to deter Vladimir Putin.” "Shame on us for not providing support more quickly" Bottom Line:“ The remarkable courage on display of grandmas picking up rifles to defend Kyiv, you have border guards in the South telling Russian warships to 'go to hell'. You have Zelensky himself leading from the front, begging us for more ammunition. That courage should inspire us. Shame on us for not providing support more quickly.” “Americans should not have to sacrifice and suffer for Biden's foolish decisions.” Bottom Line:“Our enemies are going to school on this, particularly China. **That's why legendary Democratic strategist James Carville is ALL IN on this battleground race – and he's asking you to join him:**

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: NEW: A top Abbott donor is trying to silence Beto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
A top Abbott donor threatened Beto for speaking out.
#
An energy CEO and top Abbott donor is threatening Beto for calling out the fact that this governor allowed corrupt profiteering by energy corporations during the deadly power grid failure. [Rush a $3 donation right now to help us fight back.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53786?refcode=ema20220307-179376&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=179376%2E444211%2E41BwC7)
---
A top Abbott donor is trying to silence Beto from demanding accountability and justice.
Here’s the damning chain of events that led to this moment:
➡️ **First** : Energy corporations made $11 billion during last year’s preventable grid failure as hundreds of Texans froze to death in their homes and millions more were stranded without water, heat, and power in the energy capital of the world. One company alone made $2.4 billion.
➡️ **Then** : The top executives of these very same price gouging corporations turned around and gave Greg Abbott $4.6 million in campaign checks after he let them off the hook and failed to put people over profits. One of these CEOs alone cut him a $1 million check — his largest contribution ever.
➡️ Now: **That top Abbott donor is threatening to take Beto to court if he doesn’t stop connecting the dots and following the money, exposing how Abbott always puts his donors’ profits over the people of this state even after Texans literally froze to death.**
Abbott and his mega donors want to silence us. They want to gag us, to try and prevent the people from seeing that they were sold out by the governor of the state of Texas.
We won’t be silent as Texans get screwed. We need your help to fight back right now.
[Please rush a $3 donation right now to help us fight back against this attempt to shut us up. Beto will never stop speaking out and fighting for the people of Texas. We’re in this together, and we need to have Beto’s back as he continues to put us first.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53786?refcode=ema20220307-179376&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=179376%2E444211%2E41BwC7)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/53786?refcode=ema20220307-179376&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=179376%2E444211%2E41BwC7)**
We won’t shut up. We won’t tolerate a governor who can’t keep the lights on and puts profits over the people of Texas. We won’t back down from this fight.
Thank you,
Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220307-179376-footer&t=22&refcode2=179376_444211_41BwC7&akid=179376%2E444211%2E41BwC7)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.

name: Great America Polling
subject: Trump vs. Biden II
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great America PAC**
body:
America NEEDS a rematch – Trump vs. Biden II – and I want to hear from you on who you think would win. | | [](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=1291423cd3514683af1aa41a371b8479&_e=8ELq2p6Xut64Da8mv0qlo4D3EFCpiU26JHRKNGU6gJ5cYlaQ1jcCzrTD2m6znUI5VLNMlrLrnxTKCpLKnt3lgMmwQMXd1ImBpXUvWRpYzPywBJvAVHIyWsnkIS01CNwCO6qcM9KJqRHVPLDMQIW1coZIrMu_af4LVoMhlhBT4tnZit6hiGLKwJZcZsnZyG9Q9krPXHS1t9i2Z46Z9A9YECNEpX50vN13ooydEDnOSAGaDGiioty8LV7JfOwyoxvzZFp9jd8Qzz35laR-iC7TLW1iOWtVPUYaef2juiJiuOoLI4VQbEcB5u1qtmgXLTsOxl8Ix-Zq56Bqa8BhRpt1fYnN_h_4XgVmYFpyzd8oH5KhGvGr2eE2JJId05hkW1jAF9q-G1wCfzpnbckLl-7MJpHbburHWHXItXbVDr0kpZ_ERGTgo6PGjMyOQHKONjAJj8GXO3dlBBNdRvmy_kuFmQ%3D%3D) | Peter,

I grew up boxing and when I was in the ring there was only one goal - **_defeating my opponent._**

Right now, conservatives need to have one goal - Saving America by defeating the disastrous Biden-Harris Administration.

President Trump Made America Great Again - and he will do it once more if he decides to run.

Joe Biden has only created disaster after disaster. He left Americans stranded in Afghanistan and was responsible for the death of 13 U.S. soldiers. His policies have created record inflation and record unemployment - crippling hard-working families.

And Biden has shown to be weak and ineffective against China and Russian – allowing them to steal, threaten, and occupy neighboring countries.

America NEEDS a rematch - Trump vs. Biden II - and [**I want to hear from you on who you think would win.**](http://links.action.greatamerica4usa.com/u/click?_t=b93111d5faf54ad99e89d66d6b494312&_m=1291423cd3514683af1aa41a371b8479&_e=8ELq2p6Xut64Da8mv0qlo4D3EFCpiU26JHRKNGU6gJ5cYlaQ1jcCzrTD2m6znUI5VLNMlrLrnxTKCpLKnt3lgMmwQMXd1ImBpXUvWRpYzPywBJvAVHIyWsnkIS01CNwCO6qcM9KJqRHVPLDMQIW1coZIrMu_af4LVoMhlhBT4tnZit6hiGLKwJZcZsnZyG9Q9krPXHS1t9i2Z46Z9A9YECNEpX50vN13ooydEDnOSAGaDGiioty8LV7JfOwyoxvzahwqnwkiy5k-54vXK03P9kuyidjKYEIU7NLwoToJyFbtl0unURuEJJwNXUMi1PQNXSD_K2QRvDQBbEWTdYALYOqIWulTMjw4yOFXMi4cg84gF7D9G5NgyzXb0BPDRjGBWry52ToRoEv1_vcWvLLJM-CkZYJYF_ol_WmwySBUwHvYzTZOT5GnsCzEkfS_XOFUzfh8CgVWg5VML7aVE7KERw%3D%3D)

Peter,

**MAJOR UPDATE: Redistricting completely changed my race in California and I now have the opportunity to represent a larger district including more conservatives!**

This means that my district is now up for grabs for Republicans and I’m the front runner. If we can win, the Republican party will be one seat closer to a House majority: in California no less!

I know that some may say California is unwinnable but I’m here to tell you that it is. Just last year we came within striking distance of recalling our radical Governor and replacing him with conservative Larry Elder.

To put it plainly, Californian’s are not happy with the way the Left has been running our state. Now, there’s a legitimate chance that Los Angeles recalls their radical Democrat District Attorney!

[**With about 2 months left until voting begins for the CA primary, I urge you to please consider giving just $5 or $10 to my campaign for Congress.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6380153f5d6a498db365acf197946a35&_e=SlApYCRzXE1PYVh9gngZ3JSNYAuU6SlPNIHiXH-9Mqk6n0kiNFvoVOuYNHOgo6LX_7zwQ5Ug3WNapVGurQpZS5ZLcfxAScW7DNtfj3wD2xCOkwY6JWVRBOPy0itm26ic4tx6mPMOTmAbEDxTrfhjHUex2nFmFXEBK37TGv-nGkEH7hW3SDeDXmXcf-JRqlsBp3AKw9ZX7__s_RYq1-r5t_gyXRDwvcf9N6i9lScyghfN5IKsDNcTKVE8il01cmNovbAI2D-oaDuDiSuFINt8pWczHhG0_9-z6XG5IYp8J2A_kcJ6euzxk6z9MO87Xa9fDTM4JcKLIaBFWhFlx_ODtl8Hmfef07KcC00RV0DJnlzO1ZBH3AidD9VUQmm7Mf8Ftkx28VrlPbcQZF-Ny6QSj5rZXODdA0GVLEjmruNRnIbzMmagwTua2gI5yzrpUvtgbt6DF5hEhRsvinMm_3kMvg%3D%3D)

[**This money won’t go to waste, I need the support of grassroots conservatives from all over America if I’m going to take a California seat from the Democrats who feel they have a God-given right to it.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6380153f5d6a498db365acf197946a35&_e=SlApYCRzXE1PYVh9gngZ3JSNYAuU6SlPNIHiXH-9Mqk6n0kiNFvoVOuYNHOgo6LX_7zwQ5Ug3WNapVGurQpZS5ZLcfxAScW7DNtfj3wD2xCOkwY6JWVRBOPy0itm26ic4tx6mPMOTmAbEDxTrfhjHUex2nFmFXEBK37TGv-nGkEH7hW3SDeDXmXcf-JRqlsBp3AKw9ZX7__s_RYq1-r5t_gyXRDwvcf9N6i9lScyghf6g8JRNZ1tAVVDcKEmWtVCKhVNYL3zz9cw-yTj_hoXQmc2a3gUt1eoWwAbNpW11BqetM8gtd1YBqxuraZU4Z90Vbm21CsN7iCa8i5LSwos9zK821iqkFoFxsWbaIrmDtrB1qrStoPJm1Sj6IDBvNWtlxe-Qo4dFfV9-3HRa059Eyn8Xe24KKLhFmhSOQm5TWqhJcL4RsnlI-wA7gaiIAog2-teyDyA2QmuIwYEmf7KNQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: this is big Peter Will you support putting another Republican in the House? | Peter, MAJOR UPDATE: Redistricting completely changed my race in California and I now have the opportunity to represent a larger district including more conservatives! This means that my district is now up for grabs for Republicans and I’m the front runner. If we can win, the Republican party will be one seat closer to a House majority: in California no less! I know that some may say California is unwinnable but I’m here to tell you that it is. Just last year we came within striking distance of recalling our radical Governor and replacing him with conservative Larry Elder. To put it plainly, Californian’s are not happy with the way the Left has been running our state. Now, there’s a legitimate chance that Los Angeles recalls their radical Democrat District Attorney! What’s more, if I can win this district, we’ll be one seat closer to removing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House and replacing her with a Republican that can stop Joe Biden from pushing his party’s radical agenda. California is becoming more conservative by the day and in my newly drawn-out district, Conservatives are of the plenty. All I need now to ensure that I win in my district in November is financial support so that I can fend off the attacks of the Left. Thank you, Aja Smith United States Air Force Veteran Republican for Congress P.S. Without your help I never would've gotten this far. People are fed up with the Left in power, even the Democrats! | Aja is a United States Air Force veteran. name: AZ Dems
subject: Honoring women who have changed Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | These women changed AZ for the better | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xTerfBqG0VHddyZFF79qWDA_0cYERoA58Z1RJw84n34BNejNOAAv3uBXiHVA92dc-lz5J75z9hNgIkQhYkU7muG69D8NPXV1LY3ln4_Z6OuakHy2oA0c13P938YXLtfg6td2inl_uTb9GRagVdo5Le2UJM_-xeV0K1vLamch7UUVyxZG1LhO5oF8BAeZWIN8RwW-OMPYFksIJgOikCQHjUmkE-joHOPzl4fn9_FHURc94T4aRPT41iQEPWedU9PCItLcrtfhOCf2fn8Ldey8F0RvnJq9d8OkS_eLtsVPb8NcivYa8NcgAFbDyH5_iMiojLKZF_7-iZR-f7wZDW2njzTzP4zto5ZqtdreNmtUIR6MfKJlYUk9sFoYAnN-OhOYpX5iD6fv5GyUQ8JwSwkKjBW41MAo_0zK9nLT87eY1ImxB07CHj_AvSTaIkLzXEZRnrTE8cJ-16DsNEwdH9x9AwL6yL5tagjRKNH7jToYXAGg/3k5/dWiGyihQQB6DZnVnv51ZXA/h0/xK6ipOUE2_p_5pxF78hf96R6khPxf9EnXS0IOYSr62I)
---
| Team, March is Women’s History Month, and we wanted to take a break from our normal fundraising to highlight three Arizona women who made a major difference in our state.

There are many remarkable Arizonan women who have made an impact or are currently making an impact on this state. Here are three who have changed our state for the better.

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh_OzWuyr9Xf7I__8G3STU5YbnAlTQ11gO98yYlSU4jwaK18SzYyVJtFkFlpdo658b5ONCB2fs-CPleSwiFknzlUQxliEXHZEUTsi9pKukDSHOei3fYaPgcww42EvtK1Ix-wawIQEps94OTP-ck3-HilZwJbTsB2XfYekGnlwc-mHkNGDy-MX1lm4V4bJSloVLFF1Ok4dAOM9GUekqJVhLWHlK5_0Ob6_07qfpVnjUmJJeHqaEWXhpRC5TRIibbdn8gmHN87RnrcRevhQWskb6eyD6QsQK_yvnB1fqWd48RpRQ/3k5/dWiGyihQQB6DZnVnv51ZXA/h1/5wf-GAIkyrW72y_MqX_e-R-Hj0fa3fxABjlEq7kxgMM) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-az-governor-says-supporting-a-white-nationalist-is-better-than-a-democrat&email_referrer=email_1466818&email_subject=honoring-women-who-have-changed-arizona)
**Rose Mofford** was the first woman to serve as governor of our state. Prior to becoming governor, she served as Arizona’s first female secretary of state from 1977 to 1988.

Mofford earned respect from both parties and won reelection as Secretary of State by a large margin in 1982 and was unopposed in 1986. When she took over as governor after the 1988 impeachment and removal of Governor Evan Mecham, she was hailed as “the healing governor” for returning stability to the state and easing racial tensions.

Remarkably, she achieved all of this despite a requirement in Arizona’s Constitution that state officeholders must be men — something Arizona’s voters quickly fixed with Proposition 103 just months after she became governor.

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh9icxzB_PEaIldLrpJWa1h-PnMcynnz4UhXSSnu5nLfKyuQXiHPlvYcfDBbj5mQITL3ci5PBtuVLJ3JgwX0r0tM-sD9kAFrj2sREsSnKBL6yuT0edOkUHxtRUa-aMq5mEUTeKVU9jSyW_yPR4wMZY2f3ya5nCrnPcyPfKXrwxYwXsTKo2Hkm7vv5jXNhYkV7iFab8azAl5D3bPKyjdmRuPb9OV6QNYpgyJe6hVwggNn0YRTlZB-ejV_MiyLrZ0ZAkeXP0gmmhmXoayUHuxvqj8EJMGn91-8QZGZBYTkjfmsFg/3k5/dWiGyihQQB6DZnVnv51ZXA/h2/H5KzvEatkooQ4nlze9bjgKqYiTXI-1nBT8bsNaEYj8Q) [](?link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-az-governor-says-supporting-a-white-nationalist-is-better-than-a-democrat&email_referrer=email_1466818&email_subject=honoring-women-who-have-changed-arizona)
**Janet Napolitano** has the honor of trailblazing several paths consecutively. Napolitano was the first woman to serve as Arizona attorney general, then became the first woman elected as Arizona governor, then became the first woman to be U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security.

As AZ governor, Time magazine named her one of the five best governors in America. Napolitano’s other honors include the Woodrow Wilson Award for Public Service and being named one of the most powerful women in the world by Forbes magazine.

| [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh9GzvJlfdj33QikRbrjSZbcPFplzjXNkbozALMcAT2msJ0-jiFBh4SbThk6TmYp386Gd8Mqy0F7u4BS7Htaw0C8tB2IOy7pjHTV1bT0c9uxiYr1sngkK6s-6oCvER60wD5BomUBSqk0sZG2itAzmGxlc2Vsfe3LtcGi4-BaBQvR5-Yd3A7rqQe4PYsERF2YOi_-rgHjqNO2Lx6nY-DRTd_CMdEpnA-HPUI0Mcx4Uz_j-TtcHizRpwwM1N8RwU7e0nF-XMilmpyuYSziRGuq4z2zePaD2acV3Cyp200zZaF93w/3k5/dWiGyihQQB6DZnVnv51ZXA/h3/WfM9_Dy8D6Zabmpmdz4JkBaTOuQhCPaK-sbGDWIW9oc) [](?link_id=6&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-az-governor-says-supporting-a-white-nationalist-is-better-than-a-democrat&email_referrer=email_1466818&email_subject=honoring-women-who-have-changed-arizona)
**Annie Dodge Wauneka,** designated “The Legendary Mother of the Navajo Nation” by the Navajo Council, was the first Native American to receive the Presidential Medal of Freedom. When she was just eight years old, the Spanish Flu Pandemic killed thousands of Navajos and many of her classmates.

While she survived with just a mild case, the experience gave her a passion for public health that she followed all the way to the Tribal Council, where she served as the head of the Health and Welfare Committee.

Through her many public health campaigns, she worked to promote modern medical practices, provide clean drinking water and improve other sanitary conditions, and fight alcoholism and disease.

**These three women made Arizona a better place.** Here at the Arizona Democratic Party, we are committed to empowering women to make history just like these three did.

Sincerely,

AZ Dems

| The Arizona Democratic Party is working around the clock to ensure Democratic candidates are elected up and down the ballot — candidates who will fight for what YOU value most, like affordable healthcare for every Arizonan, economic stability and job opportunities for working families, and representation for the most marginalized among us. **Help us continue to build a party that is fighting for all Arizonans. Become a monthly donor.**

****[Donate Monthly](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ0qyBGknsbOzbZZbBvGH6ylDVms6f45QO75VOw-CM7vT2KmFr40qODK9HKSEZTJFkOv7GFPe19OeyG-WrBUxhK2PhUtv9qb2Zvsz9L5EsMtmVgyLcvIe6nPv_7kaDnaW8oZJvdKAYyBhGOfdsGYyjV3Gv0BqPagL_j4GNO1bje_wTRP_47VnfbvzJVwXEIT2SCVbxI_q0swfAgfOs_PS1snX96vFguuZIRYtwJGr0o1ePDVg8AnN2nboftnNsi3oI8Z5V3BaQnaAIvkfXNmvhSKpeGHMBLKBeMP-YCl3_KFYyHlM1GJ3mzsYupA0EslI9Fken-NP0QhctPjk-LSSiYVXbLCn6hGzHp5uoydElfVIaK77Bq46m7M27o4mDum37isxkaU33P4uOSP1yiqsKOcO66xkCOa_JuAou18-WdX0XaBJRc7DGZc4XX_x__tXoNEXa6ZTYH_v7zR9qKaOHKyLNiWibHLksAsvVRS9WWwsL_H0un2PqVUuJDHQm1jk/3k5/dWiGyihQQB6DZnVnv51ZXA/h4/40aZ9nR6ezSKk2GzEMBI_lBKIQgCqPpPryZcTUVFyhA)****

clean_body: | | | These women changed AZ for the better | | | Team, March is Women’s History Month, and we wanted to take a break from our normal fundraising to highlight three Arizona women who made a major difference in our state. There are many remarkable Arizonan women who have made an impact or are currently making an impact on this state. Here are three who have changed our state for the better. | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-az-governor-says-supporting-a-white-nationalist-is-better-than-a-democrat&emailreferrer=email1466818&emailsubject=honoring-women-who-have-changed-arizona Rose Mofford was the first woman to serve as governor of our state. Prior to becoming governor, she served as Arizona’s first female secretary of state from 1977 to 1988. Mofford earned respect from both parties and won reelection as Secretary of State by a large margin in 1982 and was unopposed in 1986. When she took over as governor after the 1988 impeachment and removal of Governor Evan Mecham, she was hailed as “the healing governor” for returning stability to the state and easing racial tensions. Remarkably, she achieved all of this despite a requirement in Arizona’s Constitution that state officeholders must be men — something Arizona’s voters quickly fixed with Proposition 103 just months after she became governor. | ?linkid=4&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-az-governor-says-supporting-a-white-nationalist-is-better-than-a-democrat&emailreferrer=email1466818&emailsubject=honoring-women-who-have-changed-arizona Janet Napolitano has the honor of trailblazing several paths consecutively. Napolitano was the first woman to serve as Arizona attorney general, then became the first woman elected as Arizona governor, then became the first woman to be U.S. Secretary of Homeland Security. As AZ governor, Time magazine named her one of the five best governors in America. Napolitano’s other honors include the Woodrow Wilson Award for Public Service and being named one of the most powerful women in the world by Forbes magazine. | ?linkid=6&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-az-governor-says-supporting-a-white-nationalist-is-better-than-a-democrat&emailreferrer=email1466818&emailsubject=honoring-women-who-have-changed-arizona Annie Dodge Wauneka, designated “The Legendary Mother of the Navajo Nation” by the Navajo Council, was the first Native American to receive the Presidential Medal of Freedom. When she was just eight years old, the Spanish Flu Pandemic killed thousands of Navajos and many of her classmates. While she survived with just a mild case, the experience gave her a passion for public health that she followed all the way to the Tribal Council, where she served as the head of the Health and Welfare Committee. Through her many public health campaigns, she worked to promote modern medical practices, provide clean drinking water and improve other sanitary conditions, and fight alcoholism and disease. These three women made Arizona a better place. Here at the Arizona Democratic Party, we are committed to empowering women to make history just like these three did. Sincerely, AZ Dems | The Arizona Democratic Party is working around the clock to ensure Democratic candidates are elected up and down the ballot — candidates who will fight for what YOU value most, like affordable healthcare for every Arizonan, economic stability and job opportunities for working families, and representation for the most marginalized among us. Help us continue to build a party that is fighting for all Arizonans. Become a monthly donor. ** For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit ** Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Elaine Luria
subject: Bloody Sunday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elaine for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42695665/333945979/-2135409409?refcode=lur_template_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM3NmUyMC02NjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlFDJPR9y1x_McKo8pH86MCn23p85QPIfKnH65G_cwo=)

| | Folks, Today marks the anniversary of Bloody Sunday – the day in 1965 when 600 people attempted to cross the Edmund Pettus Bridge on their way from Selma to Montgomery, only to be met with brutal violence from local and state law enforcement. I’m sure most of you are familiar with the 1960s civil rights movement and the drastic voter suppression tactics that kept Black Americans from exercising their right to vote before the _Voting Rights Act_ was passed. But what you may not know is that many of these same voter suppression tactics are still being used today. To stop these tactics, we need federal legislation. [**Will you be one of the 300 people I need to join me today in calling on Congress to enact meaningful voting rights protections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42695666/333945980/591591300?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM3NmUyMC02NjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlFDJPR9y1x_McKo8pH86MCn23p85QPIfKnH65G_cwo=&emci=5d46dc8f-529e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=82c76e20-669e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7932963) | | | [Sign On »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42695668/333945981/591591300?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM3NmUyMC02NjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlFDJPR9y1x_McKo8pH86MCn23p85QPIfKnH65G_cwo=&emci=5d46dc8f-529e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=82c76e20-669e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7932963)
---
Last year alone, 19 states enacted 34 laws restricting the right to vote and 440 voter suppression bills have been introduced in 49 states.
Not to mention, the conservative majority on the Supreme Court continues to gut key provisions of the _Voting Rights Act_ to make it more difficult for people of color to vote.
It’s abhorrent to think that on the 57th anniversary of Bloody Sunday, we are still fighting to protect the right to vote for Black Americans.
I remain committed to fighting to protect the right to vote in Congress. [**Will you join me in urging Congress to pass meaningful voting rights protections by adding your name to my petition today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42695670/333945983/591591300?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM3NmUyMC02NjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlFDJPR9y1x_McKo8pH86MCn23p85QPIfKnH65G_cwo=&emci=5d46dc8f-529e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=82c76e20-669e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7932963)
| | [Sign On »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42695671/333945985/591591300?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmM3NmUyMC02NjllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlFDJPR9y1x_McKo8pH86MCn23p85QPIfKnH65G_cwo=&emci=5d46dc8f-529e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&emdi=82c76e20-669e-ec11-a22a-281878b85110&ceid=7932963)

Elaine

name: Team Harper
subject: “She’s trying to stand up for people who can’t really stand up for themselves.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
What Spectrum News saw on the road with Morgan.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220307-758-footer-ak&t=2&akid=758%2E90090%2ErGyyHJ)
“Hi, I’m Morgan. I’m running for U.S. Senate.”
A profile of our grassroots movement just came out on Spectrum News, talking about our campaign for fresh leadership to represent Ohio in the Senate.
**[This is the latest great news for our momentum in this race, and with our final FEC fundraising deadline just weeks away, we need to keep it up by ensuring we have the resources for Morgan and our organizers to continue knocking doors across the state. Can you chip in $5 to help fuel our on-the-ground efforts right now?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29290?t=3&akid=758%2E90090%2ErGyyHJ)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29296?refcode=em20220307-758&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=758%2E90090%2ErGyyHJ)**
Getting Morgan – and her message – out into the community through knocking doors, holding roundtables, and attending listening sessions is one of our top campaign priorities.
Spectrum News followed Morgan as she talked with and heard from people in overlooked communities, and people ready for a change here in Ohio.
**“Everyone is saying very consistent things, about how we’re doing things isn’t really working for enough of us,”** Morgan told Spectrum. **“And we need more resources at the community level and really supporting the grassroots.”**
What we don’t need is more empty suit politicians who take money from corporate PACs, or politicians who call Black Lives Matter activists “thugs” like our opponents in this race. And from what we’re hearing on the trail, Ohioans agree: **“She’s trying to stand up for people who can’t really stand up for themselves,” said one Columbus resident.**
People want real leadership, and that’s what Morgan is running to offer to the people of Ohio. To get the word out there and mobilize the voters we’ll need to win, we need a strong grassroots organizing program from now until Election Day. And we’re counting on your support today to fund it.
**[We’re 100% grassroots-funded, so whatever you can chip in right now will go directly toward our organizing efforts. The end of this month is our last big filing deadline before the primary. Can you help fuel our campaign in this crucial phase today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/29290?t=23&akid=758%2E90090%2ErGyyHJ)**
Morgan is the progressive champion in this election in Ohio, and is fighting for real solutions for working families. With a movement behind her, we can bring progressive change.
Thank you,
Team Harper

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220307-758-footer&t=24&refcode2=758_90090_rGyyHJ&akid=758%2E90090%2ErGyyHJ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: 3 alarming stats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, These 3 stats are alarming:
1. Median rent across the country has risen 19% over the past year.
2. Half of renters are rent burdened, meaning that housing costs take up more than 30% of their household’s income.
3. US foreclosure activity in January 2022 was the highest since the beginning of the pandemic.

[**We need a bold national housing plan, and that’s what I’ll fight for in Congress. Please chip in $3 — or whatever you can afford — to help me win and fight for housing in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42700647/333990696/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzRlMTY4MC05MDllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j8vBMvHqLYq-tnKy9OROoSTq8eDi6UqihyJ74djwm0U=) My plan includes millions of units of social housing, vacancy and luxury taxes on additional homes, evictions as civil (not criminal) matters, and federal funding for community land trusts. Community land trusts are a way to keep land and housing permanently affordable into the future. There are clear solutions to the housing crisis, but we need more people fighting to make them happen. I’ve risked arrest occupying empty buildings to get housing for our homeless community in Tacoma, and I’ll continue doing direct action when I’m in Congress. Chip in here to help me do that: clean_body: | | | Hi there, These 3 stats are alarming: 1. Median rent across the country has risen 19% over the past year. 2. Half of renters are rent burdened, meaning that housing costs take up more than 30% of their household’s income. 3. US foreclosure activity in January 2022 was the highest since the beginning of the pandemic. = My plan includes millions of units of social housing, vacancy and luxury taxes on additional homes, evictions as civil (not criminal) matters, and federal funding for community land trusts. Community land trusts are a way to keep land and housing permanently affordable into the future. There are clear solutions to the housing crisis, but we need more people fighting to make them happen. I’ve risked arrest occupying empty buildings to get housing for our homeless community in Tacoma, and I’ll continue doing direct action when I’m in Congress. Chip in here to help me do that: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**SCHOOL RESOURCE OFFICERS KEEP KIDS SAFE AND OUT OF THE CRIMINAL JUSTICE SYSTEM; WE NEED MORE OF THEM** **By: Doug Gansler**
---
_"The number one job of government is to keep people safe. But the government has been failing to do its job in Baltimore. A recently-released report** ** revealed that the number one cause of unexpected death of Baltimore children is homicide... Guns are killing our young people, and kids who get into trouble at school are at greater risk of becoming murder victims themselves._ _That 's why the state should provide funding for more Student Resource Officers to help keep guns out of schools and to help students from falling into the criminal justice system._ _A world-class education should be the right of every student in Maryland no matter what their ZIP code. Baltimore needs more investment in its schools, and it also needs more investment in public safety. Because a child cannot learn, and a teacher cannot teach, in an environment that is not safe. And parents should not have to worry that they will never see their kids again when they drop them off at school. [...]"_ **[Read the full op-ed on the Baltimore Sun website HERE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDBwjo9JxMo4A0UPMsgBN9jnJtrGDH2jN_3KJ7CVX-jxVUOlIZZVTNRvuqBkLN6mKKhKFY0vXR6I-Zbvg9pO6AaEF9XSHBuJTkoVirlXTsI9II-Ec1JGjzEGSIx7Kt_DHW-N3mUqmH4HepeSYmv9QVWxUzAn36emjaH8QpAqoz5tF8yD9YPW_CDDImmS1jyNKo2WV-uTS_1LrfyfgGRiQ1TFfKAKgHghNE5h9-l36LQV9OUVtj979W01cuDXGlZPIA0g_5tUOnrRkRLYWcZ7K0hYnDnW-oxFdyienOcBLVz4FaLCg6zF33bcGHdl90yjB_1EvMOBRxUZx8y_nNatUe-mb0WTcEuNptArr5dPeYpeXj5lWTBNGxF0tf86cmQB2cWJ4lwMx4PIhr643Hi5lN2PclTAl9fseksGSrOsZT43eSNPB6tHoVG_iinyl4AuaUTOwBCMdQY9jy47l_I-cONU/3k5/KQUeE0YmR1y2ZioE20ZPnQ/h7/UVF-QAF8LA55aKeYvEgRrgv97QM2OV2lMaZo1P_flQ8) and be sure to follow us on social media to keep up with all things happening on the campaign trail and beyond!**

clean_body: Since Doug's op-ed was published in The Baltimore Sun last week, we've heard from dozens of Marylanders who know how important safety is, especially in our children's schools. | Friends -- Since Doug's op-ed was published in The Baltimore Sun last week, we've heard from dozens of Marylanders who know how important safety is, especially in our children's schools. Doug's call to provide funding for more school resource officers would help reduce the number of guns in schools and keep students safe, but . If you missed Doug's op-ed, check out the message below and read the full article on The Baltimore Sun website! Thanks, Shaun Daniels Campaign Manager \-------Begin Message------- From: Team Gansler Subject: Doug is committed to keeping our kids safe in schools Date: March 4, 2022 at 3:56 PM EST | Hi friends, This week, Doug wrote an op-ed in The Baltimore Sun about the need for more school resource officers to keep our kids safe in school. Check out some of the highlights from the article below! | SCHOOL RESOURCE OFFICERS KEEP KIDS SAFE AND OUT OF THE CRIMINAL JUSTICE SYSTEM; WE NEED MORE OF THEM By: Doug Gansler "The number one job of government is to keep people safe. But the government has been failing to do its job in Baltimore. A recently-released report revealed that the number one cause of unexpected death of Baltimore children is homicide... Guns are killing our young people, and kids who get into trouble at school are at greater risk of becoming murder victims themselves. That 's why the state should provide funding for more Student Resource Officers to help keep guns out of schools and to help students from falling into the criminal justice system. A world-class education should be the right of every student in Maryland no matter what their ZIP code. Baltimore needs more investment in its schools, and it also needs more investment in public safety. Because a child cannot learn, and a teacher cannot teach, in an environment that is not safe. And parents should not have to worry that they will never see their kids again when they drop them off at school. [...]" and be sure to follow us on social media to keep up with all things happening on the campaign trail and beyond! Doug is committed to making Maryland a more safe, just, and strong place to live.Together, we can build a better future for our students, teachers, and families. Thanks for your support, Team Gansler By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Friends of Doug Gansler, please .

body:

It’s only been three days since we launched our **Defeat Dan Fund** , y'all — and thanks to this team, we are well on our way to hitting our goal. Our grassroots campaign set an ambitious goal of bringing in **2,000** donations in our first week to stay on track to victory this fall. We are pushing hard to ensure that we come out of this primary in the best place possible to win the runoff and defeat Dan Patrick in the general election. **[With only two days left until our deadline, can you chip in today to become a founding member of our Defeat Dan Fund? name: Leo, Deputy Campaign Manager
subject: Hey, I’m Leo!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter! It’s nice
to meet you, I’m Leo — the Deputy Campaign Manager for Team Booker.

I’m so excited to be a part of this historic movement to replace Rand Paul
and expand our majority in the U.S. Senate.

In a moment, I want to share some thoughts with you about the priorities
of our campaign and a few of the challenges we face over the next year.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16942?refcode=em20220307-1634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1634%2E346206%2EzYC4oW ]After you’re done reading, I hope you will chip in $5 or
anything you can to support our people-powered campaign so we can send a
champion for working-class families to represent Kentucky this year.

For the past couple of weeks, I’ve been on the road with Charles traveling
across Kentucky to meet voters and talk about the issues they care about
most.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16942?refcode=em20220307-1634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1634%2E346206%2EzYC4oW ][IMG]

Everywhere we go, from the hood to the holler, we hear the same thing:
Kentuckians are sick and tired of Rand Paul, and are hungry for a Senator
that will actually fight for them.

I’m going to be straight with you,
Peter. These next few months
are going to be tough. My team and I, along with thousands of Kentuckians
across the Commonwealth, are giving it our all to turn out the massive
number of voters we’ll need to win this race. We’re putting in long hours,
working weekends, and driving thousands of miles.

But let me tell you something — it will all be worth it because we believe
in Charles, and we believe in this movement.

It’s worth it because this November, we will finally elect a Senator who
understands first-hand what it’s like to stand in the unemployment line,
to ration insulin in order to to feed your family, and to feel left
behind.

It’s clear that our movement is on the rise and the GOP hasn’t failed to
notice. Rand Paul’s friends on Wall Street are already making mega
donations to help his campaign so they can flood our race with dark money.

But corporate PACs are no match to our grit and determination.

That’s why I want to ask you for a favor,
Peter: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16942?refcode=em20220307-1634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1634%2E346206%2EzYC4oW ]Will you make a
donation to help keep our movement going? Every dollar you give provides
our campaign with the power we need to overcome these attacks and continue
reaching out to voters across Kentucky.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16942?refcode=em20220307-1634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1634%2E346206%2EzYC4oW ]Contribute $5

Together,

Leo
Deputy Campaign Manager

P.S., I brought my dog Saul into the campaign office today, and thought
you’d appreciate this photo:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/16942?refcode=em20220307-1634&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1634%2E346206%2EzYC4oW ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220307-1634-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1634_346206_zYC4oW&akid=1634%2E346206%2EzYC4oW

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1634%2E346206%2EzYC4oW

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Kara Hahn
subject: The Violence Against Women Act is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42696171/333948038/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGM5NDQ4Ny02OTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yJXv81t4zRhJ_OC9vax20d8AzBKCTCQos_9xXSlEV4=)

Friend,

For me — and millions of women like me — the expiration of the Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) goes deeper than the usual frustration with partisan obstruction. It's something much more personal.

As a single mom in my early twenties, I survived incidents of domestic violence. I escaped with an order of protection in hand and moved back with my parents. I often battle the stigma of being a survivor, self-doubt, and even some lingering fear. Yet I continue to share because I know I am giving voice to an all-to-common reality that many women experience and struggle to overcome.

It's been more than three years since VAWA expired, and right now critical measures to protect women from domestic abuse, sexual assault, stalking, and more are stalled in Washington gridlock.

Renewing the VAWA would help provide stronger protections for women — and their children — who are going through similar experiences. In addition to renewing safeguards and preventative measures that have saved lives over decades, it would also close an existing loophole that allows abusers to obtain guns that threaten the safety of women and families everywhere.

I want to go to Congress to get this bill passed permanently, once and for all.

**[That's why I'm hoping you can make a contribution today to help us build a campaign that can win this seat and send a voice for women to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42696172/333948039/189849860?refcode=em22_220307_VAWA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGM5NDQ4Ny02OTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yJXv81t4zRhJ_OC9vax20d8AzBKCTCQos_9xXSlEV4=)**

In my time as a county legislator, I’ve passed legislation that helps police better evaluate the potential for repeated violence, helps victims gauge the risk of being assaulted again, and keeps guns out of the hands of those who are a threat to others. My legislation has helped empower and protect women, but there’s so much more to be done to tackle this issue.

I fully intend to bring my passion — and everything I've learned from my own personal experience — to Washington, where I will do everything possible to protect women.

But I know I can't do that without your help.

**[We're building a powerful coalition to win this race, so that the people of this district know their representative in Congress will stand up for life-saving measures like the Violence Against Women Act. If you can, please pitch in today to help make that possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42696173/333948040/189849860?refcode=em22_220307_VAWA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGM5NDQ4Ny02OTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yJXv81t4zRhJ_OC9vax20d8AzBKCTCQos_9xXSlEV4=)**

Thanks for hearing me out, and for being with me on this campaign.

— Kara

| Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!** [DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42696174/333948041/189849860?refcode=em22_220307_VAWA&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGM5NDQ4Ny02OTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yJXv81t4zRhJ_OC9vax20d8AzBKCTCQos_9xXSlEV4=) [DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/42696175/333948042/189849860?refcode=em22_220307_VAWA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGM5NDQ4Ny02OTllLWVjMTEtYTIyYS0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yJXv81t4zRhJ_OC9vax20d8AzBKCTCQos_9xXSlEV4=)

clean_body: | = Friend, For me — and millions of women like me — the expiration of the Violence Against Women Act (VAWA) goes deeper than the usual frustration with partisan obstruction. It's something much more personal. As a single mom in my early twenties, I survived incidents of domestic violence. I escaped with an order of protection in hand and moved back with my parents. I often battle the stigma of being a survivor, self-doubt, and even some lingering fear. Yet I continue to share because I know I am giving voice to an all-to-common reality that many women experience and struggle to overcome. It's been more than three years since VAWA expired, and right now critical measures to protect women from domestic abuse, sexual assault, stalking, and more are stalled in Washington gridlock. Renewing the VAWA would help provide stronger protections for women — and their children — who are going through similar experiences. In addition to renewing safeguards and preventative measures that have saved lives over decades, it would also close an existing loophole that allows abusers to obtain guns that threaten the safety of women and families everywhere. I want to go to Congress to get this bill passed permanently, once and for all. = In my time as a county legislator, I’ve passed legislation that helps police better evaluate the potential for repeated violence, helps victims gauge the risk of being assaulted again, and keeps guns out of the hands of those who are a threat to others. My legislation has helped empower and protect women, but there’s so much more to be done to tackle this issue. I fully intend to bring my passion — and everything I've learned from my own personal experience — to Washington, where I will do everything possible to protect women. But I know I can't do that without your help. = Thanks for hearing me out, and for being with me on this campaign. — Kara | Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = = *

body:
Don't believe everything you're seeing from Mainstream Media, friend.

I've been to war, and I know the difference between destroyed tanks and staged propaganda.

**So do me a favor friend,** **_Don't let Mainstream Media distract you from the real crisis - Restoring America's Strength._**

I agree that Russia is the enemy, but Europe needs to be responsible for its own issues just like we should for America.

**Afghanistan, the border, energy independence, you name it and** **_our nation has looked weak on it this past year._**

America is in a position of weakness under Biden and Pelosi, **_but we don't have to be._**

We can get America back to a position of strength, we just can't afford to sit around waiting to see what Pelosi and Biden do next.

**_Peace through strength is my policy._** Protecting our borders and restoring our energy independence is my priority.

Mainstream Media's priority is ratings and selling ads, not reporting the whole truth free of bias.

Europe can take care of itself, and America should do the same. **_Don't let Mainstream Media scare you into thinking otherwise._**

Animo Et Fide,

| What we want to know from you today is this: The mainstream media wants us to believe that Biden is tacking to the center in the second year of his administration. **[Do you buy it?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4d6c3ee2c1144d5d8e57d326ed3a6257&_e=-wVTt1JMaEpDu8bUC1JAsoiqq9iBgni4zWB-w-0OT3hQudu7p-C9bknPWgnRxcsWCPWzh5R3r37scbA9L4UbkY-QHgABTxADNzq0fpL0GVCuqab1UTdzVgRYDJnhQgNbp51J3xalb1M4Rum5vxgQ5JRLv7LT3-iSKijMDaGgirq-eTRfSHFKrhzLdxXGTiYnETGxzXD9INdeVU4ONQBhRZxQVceisBCHgBZBV9w8ICDcPZj3WdzVDj60xrYUdzq7gE5r0DTDlm3fnpwHMWFpi_csbNy-LDT1i12MjqflEuBN6a7AmiqTTVO4AzdZhnAaxwIRM31xv7rjFDLZcIt3Iy7auOYHUhRys-nHGZ9-qEdIexdabxz-DrDi2MOM5lT-xtgVYUvW0AI4GpjLhDBzQ577TNkahwXtiwYSx83Sji0_BFFqiJBGz9EPjphJbqYaMSCzs2_KBDBOQaR4C0bC4hW7p_j7G_XEayh0rpHs29Y%3D)**

| **Is Biden's move to the center all politics?**

[**LET US KNOW >> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4d6c3ee2c1144d5d8e57d326ed3a6257&_e=-wVTt1JMaEpDu8bUC1JAsoiqq9iBgni4zWB-w-0OT3hQudu7p-C9bknPWgnRxcsWCPWzh5R3r37scbA9L4UbkY-QHgABTxADNzq0fpL0GVCuqab1UTdzVgRYDJnhQgNbp51J3xalb1M4Rum5vxgQ5JRLv7LT3-iSKijMDaGgirq-eTRfSHFKrhzLdxXGTiYnETGxzXD9INdeVU4ONQBhRZxQVceisBCHgBZBV9w8ICDcPZj3WdzVDj60xrYUdzq7gE5r0DTDlm3fnpwHMWFpi73agGXzUhKpDUnwBdUspF00E7veZMiOjuGXYhSpA2-dIBOG0QKVHZB-zmXe4Nb8PewuhChOsTzAr6zn3kQArYq5kR71eUxEaP0rvdtpjzgNeRVL9KVFtpmDQTIp4pfUcM-D5aBIoRIQsWQTD9CnA7vaiBDdZbUJSSeXU9B905tl4iRwKpgKImK2D3ljtklF-5w_psl2KOiFRRiVXEdpDx8%3D)

---

Fellow patriot,

Squad” members AOC and Cori Bush are MAD.

They’re reeling from what they **DIDN’T hear** President Biden talk about in his State of the Union speech on Tuesday night.

Whether or not the president is actually “moving to the center” in year two, as Politico put it, remains to be seen (we doubt it very much); nonetheless, progressives didn’t like what he had to say.

Rep. Cori Bush took to Twitter to urge Biden to “**Defund the police. Invest in our communities.** ”

She was joined on Twitter by AOC who offered her own stinging rebuke of the President Biden’s “**climate agenda.** ”

One senator in attendance for Biden’s speech remarked after the president left the Capitol said that “ _**They just can’t help themselves**_ ,” alluding to the President and his team’s wishes to resuscitate the “Build Back Better” bill which went to the graveyard in December.

Yep - despite calling the bill by a new name and changing the way he referenced certain pieces of the legislation – President Biden and his team still very much want to pass the Build Back Better social spending bill.

What we want to know from you today is this: The mainstream media wants us to believe that Biden is tacking to the center in the second year of his administration. **[Do you buy it?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4d6c3ee2c1144d5d8e57d326ed3a6257&_e=-wVTt1JMaEpDu8bUC1JAsoiqq9iBgni4zWB-w-0OT3hQudu7p-C9bknPWgnRxcsWCPWzh5R3r37scbA9L4UbkY-QHgABTxADNzq0fpL0GVCuqab1UTdzVgRYDJnhQgNbp51J3xalb1M4Rum5vxgQ5JRLv7LT3-iSKijMDaGgirq-eTRfSHFKrhzLdxXGTiYnETGxzXD9INdeVU4ONQBhRZxQVceisBCHgBZBV9w8ICDcPZj3WdzVDj60xrYUdzq7gE5r0DTDlm3fnpwHMWFpiyQbdxvhgl32berlA5vJCGoSOQRn7LuO9UkY6WCSqTyR84pyTEdDownQwMOxjT16ROQQ0Y58oUlxssUwJoD04Tdf-OFmawTiac0_iryDAt0Sx5_rkuaH3CJv4JJoF-Rh3Pzd9XwtJPjN_Hk2RpWuXvAOJx2ST_qnjpB9bcwHnjhlkfqOqt37g1HsNYFecWBxze7Ut13tUvt67sjWrWCbCmk%3D)**

**Is Biden's move to the center all politics?**

clean_body: | What we want to know from you today is this: The mainstream media wants us to believe that Biden is tacking to the center in the second year of his administration. | Is Biden's move to the center all politics? SURVEY REQUEST FOR: \- empty - ID: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> Fellow patriot, Squad” members AOC and Cori Bush are MAD. They’re reeling from what they DIDN’T hear President Biden talk about in his State of the Union speech on Tuesday night. Whether or not the president is actually “moving to the center” in year two, as Politico put it, remains to be seen (we doubt it very much); nonetheless, progressives didn’t like what he had to say. Rep. Cori Bush took to Twitter to urge Biden to “Defund the police. Invest in our communities. ” She was joined on Twitter by AOC who offered her own stinging rebuke of the President Biden’s “climate agenda. ” One senator in attendance for Biden’s speech remarked after the president left the Capitol said that “ They just can’t help themselves ,” alluding to the President and his team’s wishes to resuscitate the “Build Back Better” bill which went to the graveyard in December. Yep - despite calling the bill by a new name and changing the way he referenced certain pieces of the legislation – President Biden and his team still very much want to pass the Build Back Better social spending bill. What we want to know from you today is this: The mainstream media wants us to believe that Biden is tacking to the center in the second year of his administration. Is Biden's move to the center all politics? We hope you’ll consider making a donation today: | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4lwHxvLM44SpgUw8RXWnN_VOtV_myy_T9nYOeyAm6QxPDqpmhQRhnpWTlM3etoQ1v1NOX1OxA-2jkFqEbxMj6HJ-_CeGCXNR-ni8CEaXMXMVoXELRLEG7pcxN1AeJ9tW4GrvFncIGUrIwg2bTPjMxdvdB5WHSrHJHkVkj4_dvZcP76G1692Oya5kNPleCyy614/3k5/jj7mL3laSXyEZ8frt_fgnA/h0/6LhE8OU3nMO_WWUt2vdszypX8Qi6WwxI9G9ocVZfxzc) Peter,

We have 78 days until the runoff election. [**_Here are [4] reasons why we need your support now more than ever to help Jessica Cisneros win:_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCHwZ8akAclJNBWU0nRSBqKem8y_tsks8KsVGUsME7adUmylOVZAp8kDbYfyWoC38n32sRnCIxnyWMH5lqgeS8HDafb5XKUEnR26z_WjDlO_2sqDNtpnEXH2cwzifQmqf0Uqcu-sf8oj9fVSD_UGsryD6C3qFdqCvGHo0RyfqApZ0cFHJKDlTgKHshkO2VvCmkRRLyWwhASnTASFzN0ImpTuR0HdmMf9rXZjK3823EwZ5e42utehki8He_uLyoZd9P2lkmodnhZ5AFxkRcz-PdbWE6g_Gyn32_QjATJ17mIrg/3k5/jj7mL3laSXyEZ8frt_fgnA/h1/CI7GtQbmnWBq6PtH83lIsJTpU5HkOoeGCggHcoeNVGk)
1. **First, all eyes are on the TX-28 House race.** Jessica has an opportunity to defeat one of the most conservative Democrats to Congress and bring progressive change to South Texas. So Henry Cuellar and his conservative pundits are paying close attention to our fundraising progress. The more we raise, the more we can propel our campaign to victory. If we don’t raise enough, we won’t be able to compete with Henry Cuellar’s multi-million-dollar fundraising base.

2. **Second, South Texas demands and deserves new representation.** Given the news on Henry Cuellar being investigated by the FBI, many voters from Laredo to San Antonio are questioning if Cuellar is really fit to lead. If more people give to our campaign, it will send a clear message that our district is more than ready for new representation and show the resilience of our movement heading into the runoff and general election.

3. **Third, Republicans are keeping their eyes on this race too!** Our opponents, especially Texas Republicans, are expecting us to have low numbers, and so we need to show them the exact opposite. Ted Cruz is funding thousands of dollars to help his Republican challenger in this race.

4. **Fourth (and last), if we can raise $6,000 in the next 24 hours, we’ll be off to a great start on covering our GOTV expenses.** If we’re successful, we can blow away the expectations of everyone (including the naysayers) who are watching our campaign and fund the tools we need to defeat Henry Cuellar and elect Jessica Cisneros to Congress.

[**_So we must ask you, Peter, will you consider making a contribution today? Your contribution will put our campaign over the edge._**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCHwZ8akAclJNBWU0nRSBqKem8y_tsks8KsVGUsME7adVzadhm4UrOnSEB1MWz3dBoexsIdB-_FVf5jcYG94yQpNTy2-E0b6_NVBo9Wu9M6sbafcVRkZgUaTf_gBfr9Wk1PtF2IGbifp2EJcgG0YhaW3hsPNN6Xwozvw5OCsJBCIgWCtX0uIjvzf3yc0uV0boifamksMyShfIWtuLFgiDoJKIZ9TAyx3Dh5GiVHp4Lfb6yGcYkdv7oc3JJv1cBqiEUrYigpnzUt8edNyH-Z4ccLJ3dl5ySdDVizmy_esTbZz0/3k5/jj7mL3laSXyEZ8frt_fgnA/h2/aggdFiakp2KbX88LL3-En0wHE-SEK1ZjoYaoR1cEheE) clean_body: We hope you’ll consider making a donation today: | | | Peter, We have 78 days until the runoff election. [Here are [4] reasons why we need your support now more than ever to help Jessica Cisneros win:]() 1. First, all eyes are on the TX-28 House race. Jessica has an opportunity to defeat one of the most conservative Democrats to Congress and bring progressive change to South Texas. So Henry Cuellar and his conservative pundits are paying close attention to our fundraising progress. The more we raise, the more we can propel our campaign to victory. If we don’t raise enough, we won’t be able to compete with Henry Cuellar’s multi-million-dollar fundraising base. 2. Second, South Texas demands and deserves new representation. Given the news on Henry Cuellar being investigated by the FBI, many voters from Laredo to San Antonio are questioning if Cuellar is really fit to lead. If more people give to our campaign, it will send a clear message that our district is more than ready for new representation and show the resilience of our movement heading into the runoff and general election. 3. Third, Republicans are keeping their eyes on this race too! Our opponents, especially Texas Republicans, are expecting us to have low numbers, and so we need to show them the exact opposite. Ted Cruz is funding thousands of dollars to help his Republican challenger in this race. 4. Fourth (and last), if we can raise $6,000 in the next 24 hours, we’ll be off to a great start on covering our GOTV expenses. If we’re successful, we can blow away the expectations of everyone (including the naysayers) who are watching our campaign and fund the tools we need to defeat Henry Cuellar and elect Jessica Cisneros to Congress. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Thank you for sticking with us. We couldn’t have gotten this far without you. 🙏 — Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: New York City’s War on Election Fairness
body:
Gotham’s new mayor is getting kudos for standing up to radicals on guns and crime and schools, but when it comes to election integrity the Left is taking him to the cleaners. Unchecked, it’s an electoral death sentence for Mayor Eric Adams and fair elections in New York City.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 7, 2022
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26897&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbnljcy13YXItb24tZWxlY3Rpb24tZmFpcm5lc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[New York City’s War on Election Fairness](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26897&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbnljcy13YXItb24tZWxlY3Rpb24tZmFpcm5lc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** Gotham’s new mayor is getting kudos for standing up to radicals on guns and crime and schools, but when it comes to election integrity the Left is taking him to the cleaners. Unchecked, it’s an electoral death sentence for Mayor Eric Adams and fair elections in New York City. The war on election fairness is being waged on two fronts — one in broad daylight, and the other from the shadows. In both cases, the vehicle for the radical takeover of New York is the city’s failed Board of Elections. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26897&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbnljcy13YXItb24tZWxlY3Rpb24tZmFpcm5lc3MvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26898&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjYwLW1pbC10by1wcm9tb3RlLWVxdWl0eS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) | **[U.S. Starts Disbursing $260 Mil to Promote Equity in Unemployment Benefits](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26898&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjYwLW1pbC10by1wcm9tb3RlLWVxdWl0eS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)** Months after the Biden administration announced it was dedicating an unprecedented $260 million to promote “equitable access” to government unemployment benefits the money is starting to flow so states can address disparities, increase public awareness of the program and boost the number of applicants. This week the Department of Labor (DOL) announced that three states—Oregon, Pennsylvania and Virginia—and the District of Columbia will split the initial $20 million, described by the agency as first of their kind grants to advance equity in state unemployment insurance. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26898&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMjYwLW1pbC10by1wcm9tb3RlLWVxdWl0eS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26892&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGhlLWNsaW50b25zLXJ1c3NpYS11a3JhaW5lLWdyaWZ0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) | **[The Clintons’ Russia-Ukraine Grift](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26892&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGhlLWNsaW50b25zLXJ1c3NpYS11a3JhaW5lLWdyaWZ0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)** Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton was quick to cast blame as war unfolded in Ukraine. On MSNBC last week, she blasted former President Trump for “giving aid and comfort to Vladimir Putin” with an offhand remark that the Russian president was a “genius.” Mrs. Clinton conveniently omitted mention that not too long ago, she and her husband had raked in millions working both sides of a Russia-Ukraine grift. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26892&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvdGhlLWNsaW50b25zLXJ1c3NpYS11a3JhaW5lLWdyaWZ0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26899&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2hpbmEta2V5LWNvdmlkLWluZm8vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==) | **[Judicial Watch: Fauci Agency Records Show China Failed to Provide Key COVID Info](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26899&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2hpbmEta2V5LWNvdmlkLWluZm8vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)** The records also show that, nearly two years before the coronavirus outbreak, the U.S. National Institutes of Health (NIH) sent “experts” from the NIH-supported P4 lab at the University of Texas Medical Branch to train Wuhan Institute of Virology lab technicians in lab management and maintenance due to the Wuhan lab’s shortage of trained staff. The same April 2018 cable noted that an official from EcoHealth Alliance “plans to visit Wuhan to meet with Shi [Zhengli],” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26899&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2hpbmEta2V5LWNvdmlkLWluZm8vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==)

### [Secret Service Unable to Locate Multiple Years of Hunter Biden Travel Records ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26875&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLXRyYXZlbC1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) The Epoch Times The U.S. Secret Service (USSS) says it can’t locate years of records on communications regarding agents guarding Hunter Biden, the son of President Joe Biden.

Chris Farrell, director of investigations and research for Judicial Watch, told The Epoch Times that it’s “highly improbable” that the USSS lost the records in question. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26875&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaHVudGVyLWJpZGVuLXRyYXZlbC1yZWNvcmRzLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)

### [How The Left’s Push For ‘Equity’ Is Destroying Equality ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26858&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGVmdHMtcHVzaC1mb3ItZXF1aXR5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=) The Federalist Setting all the math aside, policies like those implemented in California and throughout private companies are unjust and very likely illegal. At least that’s what Judicial Watch and the Free Enterprise Project of the National Center for Public Policy Research have concluded. Both groups have filed lawsuits exposing the laws for what they are — racist, sexist, and discriminatory on many fronts. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26858&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbGVmdHMtcHVzaC1mb3ItZXF1aXR5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=)

### [New documents show US officials knew China was withholding data, trained Wuhan Institute scientists ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26893&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2hpbmEtd2l0aGhvbGRpbmctZGF0YS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz) Fox News Judicial Watch obtained the records, first obtained by Fox News Digital, via a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request. The emails draw attention to records between the State Department and National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), run by Dr. Anthony Fauci, that suggest U.S. officials were aware of the Chinese Communist Party withholding key information on the coronavirus before the pandemic outbreak. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58253&L=26893&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2hpbmEtd2l0aGhvbGRpbmctZGF0YS8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz)
