clean_body: Gotham’s new mayor is getting kudos for standing up to radicals on guns and crime and schools, but when it comes to election integrity the Left is taking him to the cleaners. Unchecked, it’s an electoral death sentence for Mayor Eric Adams and fair elections in New York City. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 7, 2022 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Gotham’s new mayor is getting kudos for standing up to radicals on guns and crime and schools, but when it comes to election integrity the Left is taking him to the cleaners. Unchecked, it’s an electoral death sentence for Mayor Eric Adams and fair elections in New York City. The war on election fairness is being waged on two fronts — one in broad daylight, and the other from the shadows. In both cases, the vehicle for the radical takeover of New York is the city’s failed Board of Elections. == ---|--- | | | | | Months after the Biden administration announced it was dedicating an unprecedented $260 million to promote “equitable access” to government unemployment benefits the money is starting to flow so states can address disparities, increase public awareness of the program and boost the number of applicants. This week the Department of Labor (DOL) announced that three states—Oregon, Pennsylvania and Virginia—and the District of Columbia will split the initial $20 million, described by the agency as first of their kind grants to advance equity in state unemployment insurance. ---|--- | | | | = | = Former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton was quick to cast blame as war unfolded in Ukraine. On MSNBC last week, she blasted former President Trump for “giving aid and comfort to Vladimir Putin” with an offhand remark that the Russian president was a “genius.” Mrs. Clinton conveniently omitted mention that not too long ago, she and her husband had raked in millions working both sides of a Russia-Ukraine grift. = ---|--- | | | | == | == The records also show that, nearly two years before the coronavirus outbreak, the U.S. National Institutes of Health (NIH) sent “experts” from the NIH-supported P4 lab at the University of Texas Medical Branch to train Wuhan Institute of Virology lab technicians in lab management and maintenance due to the Wuhan lab’s shortage of trained staff. The same April 2018 cable noted that an official from EcoHealth Alliance “plans to visit Wuhan to meet with Shi [Zhengli],” == ---|--- | | | = The Epoch Times The U.S. Secret Service (USSS) says it can’t locate years of records on communications regarding agents guarding Hunter Biden, the son of President Joe Biden. Chris Farrell, director of investigations and research for Judicial Watch, told The Epoch Times that it’s “highly improbable” that the USSS lost the records in question. = = The Federalist Setting all the math aside, policies like those implemented in California and throughout private companies are unjust and very likely illegal. At least that’s what Judicial Watch and the Free Enterprise Project of the National Center for Public Policy Research have concluded. Both groups have filed lawsuits exposing the laws for what they are — racist, sexist, and discriminatory on many fronts. = Fox News Judicial Watch obtained the records, first obtained by Fox News Digital, via a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request. The emails draw attention to records between the State Department and National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID), run by Dr. Anthony Fauci, that suggest U.S. officials were aware of the Chinese Communist Party withholding key information on the coronavirus before the pandemic outbreak. = = = = = = | CLIPS == | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2022, All Rights Reserved == |

subject: 1 month into our campaign! [photos]

body:
#
Friends,
Exactly one month ago today, Alessandra announced her campaign for Congress!
Since then, we’ve received the endorsements of so many of Alessandra’s friends and colleagues, including Rep. Jamaal Bowman and Comptroller Brad Lander.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?source=em220307-1-30&refcode2=540_59515_R8jUbY&akid=540%2E59515%2ER8jUbY)
And just last week, we kicked off petitioning to get Alessandra’s name on the ballot this June.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?source=em220307-1-30&refcode2=540_59515_R8jUbY&akid=540%2E59515%2ER8jUbY)
It’s important that we reach every corner of this district, from Westchester to Long Island and everywhere in between, so we’re so grateful for all the volunteers who have joined us to collect signatures so far.
And Alessandra, and all of us here at Team Biaggi, are loving the opportunity to meet residents of District 3 and hear more about what matters to working class New Yorkers.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?source=em220307-1-30&refcode2=540_59515_R8jUbY&akid=540%2E59515%2ER8jUbY)
Alessandra is ready to bring this people-powered movement to Congress, but she can’t do it without your help.
**[So please, make a contribution of $5 today to help elect Alessandra. We’re about 3 weeks away from our first FEC deadline of the primary, so anything you can give will go a long way.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?source=em220307-1-30&refcode2=540_59515_R8jUbY&akid=540%2E59515%2ER8jUbY)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-march/?source=em220307-1-30&refcode2=540_59515_R8jUbY&akid=540%2E59515%2ER8jUbY)**
Thank you for your support!
\- Team Biaggi

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=540%2E59515%2ER8jUbY).

name: Fetterman HQ
subject: Can’t believe we lost this endorsement (not)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We weren’t expecting to send this email, to say the least.
#
That’s right, Derek. **Joe Exotic, murder-for-hire plotter of Tiger King infamy, just endorsed our Republican opponent Dr. Oz.**(Keep scrolling to see his bizarre endorsement for yourself.)
Congratulations, we guess? 🤣
Meanwhile, this feels like a weirdly good moment to ask you something, Derek...
Every day, we’re hard at work building a people-powered campaign that has earned support from hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors. While Oz is busy self-funding ads, pulling publicity stunts, and apparently getting endorsements from felonious Oklahoma zookeepers, John is doing what he’s been doing for 25 years —**fighting for working people across PA + the country.**
**[So we’re humbly asking: Will YOU sign on to endorse John Fetterman’s campaign for U.S. Senate, Derek? Honestly, your endorsement means 💯times more than Joe Exotic’s — and we hope we’ve earned it.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/citizen-endorsement/?source=em20220307-4876&t=1&akid=4876%2E434096%2E6gFwYV)**
**[Sign Now →](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/citizen-endorsement/?source=em20220307-4876&t=2&akid=4876%2E434096%2E6gFwYV)**
We didn’t think we’d ever send you an email about Joe Exotic, but as bizarre as this whole thing is, we’re really, really grateful to have this chance to officially ask you to endorse John. 🙏 Because we don’t care about the endorsement from some TV celebrity— **we care about the support of real working people.**
— Team Fetterman
P.S. Please behold — Joe Exotic’s endorsement of Dr. Oz. What a world we live in, Derek. What a world.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/citizen-endorsement/?source=em20220307-4876&t=3&akid=4876%2E434096%2E6gFwYV)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220307-4876-footer&t=4&refcode2=4876_434096_6gFwYV&akid=4876%2E434096%2E6gFwYV)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
